Headhunters_Delivery_Outpost_desc_001.en:
Got a box sitting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that needs to make its way over to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Any chance you can knock this out real quick?

Might be the easiest gig I’ve ever assigned out. Only real threat would be tripping over your own feet. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_Delivery_Outpost_desc_001.tr:
在  有個箱子需要送到 。你能不能快點把這個搞定？

這可能是我分配的最簡單的任務了。唯一的危險就是絆倒自己。帶個<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>也是個聰明選擇。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

roughready_delivery_station_desc_001.en:
Any chance you’re at [DESTINATION]?

Need a box hustled from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Get it there on time and unbroken and it’ll be the easiest creds you’ll ever earn.   

-Smokey
roughready_delivery_station_desc_001.tr:
你在 [DESTINATION] 嗎？

需要把一箱貨從  運送到 。準時且完好無損地送到，那將是你賺到的最輕鬆的錢。

- “煙霧”

headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_M_desc_001.en:
Word came down from the Judge that we're to hit [LOCATION]. It's owned by CFP and security there have been less than hospitable to some of the locals, so they gotta go.

They may talk a big game about bringing security, but they got guns and are more than happy to use 'em.

Stows out.
headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_M_desc_001.tr:
來自判官的指示，要求我們襲擊位於 [LOCATION]。它歸繁榮公民所有，並且那裡的安保對一些當地人不太友好，所以他們必須滾。

他們或許在口頭上大談安全，但他們手裡有槍，而且很樂意使用。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

- 阿茲卡夫 “點火器” 狙擊步槍

- 棉布臂甲 戰術
- 棉布胸甲 戰術
- 棉布腿甲 戰術
- 棉布頭盔 戰術
- 阿茲卡夫狙擊步槍電池 (8發)

headhunters_maintenance_M_desc_001.en:
Need somebody handy with tools to pop over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and help out with some repairs. Our last repair guy knocked out most of the fixes but there's still some stuff that could use looking at.

I think if you've got <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to patch up around five pipes</EM4>, you should be covered.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
headhunters_maintenance_M_desc_001.tr:
需要個懂工具的人去  幫忙修點東西。上個維修工搞定了大部分問題，但還有些地方需要檢查。

我覺得你帶上 <EM4>六個保險絲</EM4>、<EM4>打撈工具</EM4> 和 <EM4>足夠修補五根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4> 應該就夠了。

希望你知道該怎麼做，不過以防萬一，你 mobiGlas 日誌裡的 <EM4>《維修指南》</EM4> 或許值得翻翻。

斯托斯通訊完畢。

cfp_defend_headhunters_M_desc_001.en:
Headhunters have launched an unprovoked attack against [LOCATION]. Although we don't support the use of violence, Citizens for Prosperity won't let innocent people die. We need qualified security personnel to retake the outpost.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend_headhunters_M_desc_001.tr:
獵頭幫對 [LOCATION] 發起了無端攻擊。雖然我們不支持使用暴力，但繁榮公民不會讓無辜的人死去，我們需要合格的安保人員來奪回前哨站。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民


**********  **********
- 卡納 步槍
- 阿蒂麥斯 臂甲
- 阿蒂麥斯 胸甲
- 阿蒂麥斯 腿甲
- 阿蒂麥斯 頭盔
- 卡納 步槍電池 (35 發)

cfp_defend_boss_Generic_desc_001.en:
We just received reports of a massive attack against [LOCATION] by a large group of armed individuals led by [TARGET], a notorious outlaw who has been threatening Citizens for Prosperity personnel for months. Details are still yet to be confirmed but we know there have been multiple casualties.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any qualified security personnel to go and retake the outposts from these hostile elements. Our understanding is that [TARGET] tends to hide behind their soldiers, but will emerge if you take enough of the rank-and-file out.

While we don't like to resort to violence, management can see no other way of resolving this situation and continuing our good work in the system.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend_boss_Generic_desc_001.tr:
我們剛收到關於 [LOCATION] 遭到一大群武裝人員攻擊的報告，他們由 [TARGET] 領導，這是一名臭名昭著的不法分子，已經威脅繁榮公民的工作人員好幾個月了。具體細節尚未確認，但我們知道已經有多人傷亡。

繁榮公民正在尋找任何合格的安全人員前去奪回這些前哨站。我們瞭解到 [TARGET] 往往藏在他們的士兵後面，但如果你消滅足夠多的普通士兵，他們會出現。

雖然我們不喜歡訴諸暴力，但管理層認為沒有其他辦法來解決這個情況並繼續我們在星系中的良好工作。

祝好運，

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民


**********  **********
- 卡納 步槍
- 阿蒂麥斯 胸甲 箭筒
- 阿蒂麥斯 臂甲 箭筒
- 阿蒂麥斯 腿甲 箭筒
- 阿蒂麥斯 頭盔 箭筒
- 卡納 步槍電池 (35 發)

headhunters_maintenance_H_desc_001.en:
The storms over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are getting to be a real pain in the ass. One of our outposts got absolutely reamed yesterday and needs some serious repairs so we're looking for help.

Figure you'd need to bring <EM4>about six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to deal with at most eight busted pipes</EM4>. We think that’ll cover, but you'll get exact numbers on site.

Hell with this place.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, that <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
headhunters_maintenance_H_desc_001.tr:
那邊的風暴真是要命，昨天我們一個前哨站被徹底摧毀了，需要大修，所以來找幫手。

估計你得帶 <EM4>六個保險絲</EM4>、<EM4>打撈工具</EM4>，還有 <EM4>足夠處理最多八根破裂管道的 RMC 罐</EM4>。我們覺得應該夠用，但具體數量得到現場確認。

這破地方真見鬼。

希望你知道該怎麼做，不過以防萬一，你 mobiGlas 日誌裡的 <EM4>《維修指南》</EM4> 或許值得翻翻。

斯托斯通訊完畢。

headhunters_maintenance_local_E_desc_001.en:
Hey if you’re reading this, we need a hand. An outpost of ours down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> got hit by a nasty storm and suffered some damage. None of our usual techs are available (or alive) to swing by so we wanna hire someone to go fix some fuses (no idea how many but <EM4>no more than three</EM4> I think). If you can bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC canisters to sort out around three pipes</EM4>, we should be good.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
headhunters_maintenance_local_E_desc_001.tr:
如果你看到這個，我們需要幫手。我們在  的前哨站被惡劣風暴襲擊受損。平常的技術員不是沒空就是已經掛了（字面意思），所以想僱人去修幾個保險絲。要是你能帶個 <EM4>打撈工具</EM4> 和 <EM4>足夠修理三根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4>，應該就能搞定。

希望你知道該怎麼做，不過以防萬一，你 mobiGlas 日誌裡的 <EM4>《維修指南》</EM4> 或許值得翻翻。

斯托斯通訊完畢。

headhunters_killship_gen_vlrt_desc_001.en:
Got a small fry who thinks they can hit the Headhunters and get away with it. So [TARGET] tried to knock over one of our stashes and think they can get away with it. 

Last we heard they were spotted around [LOCATION]. We need someone to head over and send a very clear message who is the reigning power in the system.

Do it quick and clean.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_gen_vlrt_desc_001.tr:
有個小角色以為他們可以沒有代價地襲擊獵頭幫。所以 [TARGET] 試圖搶走我們的一處藏匿點，還以為自己能逃脫。

我們最後聽說他們在 [LOCATION] 附近被發現。我們需要有人過去，給他們傳達一個非常明確的資訊：誰才是星系中的主宰。

幹得乾脆利落點。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。


**********  **********
<EM4>包含多個藍圖池<EM4>
任務地點在派羅 I、歿氧星、死局空間站、補丁城附近時

- 大錘 III 電磁加農炮

vaughn_assassination_description_E.en:
[TARGET] needs to be eliminated. My contacts tell me they will have one or two escorts, but nothing you can't handle. Find them near [LOCATION].

Most Sincerely,
Vaughn

[TARGET] 需要消失。 我的聯絡人告訴我他會有一兩個陪同人員，但是沒有你應付不了問題，對吧？你可以在[LOCATION]找到他們。

謹啟，
沃恩

openbounty_desc.en:
The Civilian Defense Force needs YOU! Everyday, in the Stanton system innocent civilians are preyed upon by vicious outlaws and heartless criminals.

NO MORE.

Under the authority of the UEE and the Militia Mobilization Initiative, the CDF is deputizing all combat minded individuals in good legal standing* to engage and neutralize any individuals or vehicles that they verify to have an active CrimeStat.

In exchange for these selfless contributions to the general populaces safety, the CDF will financially compensate those who successfully bring these criminals to justice with a reward** of [REWARDVALUE_WANTED1] UEC per outlaw dealt with. 

Now is your chance to help bring about a positive change for yourself and all other Stanton travelers. Sign up today and do your part!

* Be aware, acquiring a CrimeStat will revoke CDF membership and cancel any outstanding contracts.
** Please note, criminals encountered as part of paid contract work do not qualify for the reward.

cdf_openbounty_desc_001.tr:
民事防禦部隊需要你！斯坦頓星系中無辜的平民無時無刻不在受到邪惡和冷血的罪犯蹂躪。

決不能這樣下去了。

在EE和民兵動員協會的授權下，民事防禦部隊現在委託所有渴望戰鬥並且法律紀錄良好*的個人去進攻和消滅任何被識別帶有生效中犯罪等級的個人或者船隻。

為回報這些對於公共安全的無私貢獻，民事防禦部隊會對那些成功將罪犯們捉拿歸案的個人給予每名罪犯 [REWARDVALUE_WANTED1] UEC的資金獎勵**。

現在，你為斯坦頓星系中所有旅行者和你自己做出積極貢獻的時刻到了！現在就報名並完成職責吧！


*請注意，如果獲得犯罪等級就會廢除您的民事防禦部隊成員身份，任何進行中的合約也將終止。
**請知悉，在其他僱傭合約中遭遇的罪犯並不計入本項目的獎勵。

vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_intro.en:
Firstly, allow me to introduce myself. To put it rather dramatically, I deal in lives. 

People hire me when some soul needs to be extinguished, and I in return employ the perfect person to serve as the extinguishant. This provides security to all parties involved as none know the identity of the other. An ideal situation as far as these things go.

I was recently made aware that you may possess skills that would make you of service to me and decided that it would be worthwhile to pursue the validity of this claim. 
 
If you have any interest in forging a working relationship, I will need a demonstration of said skills. 

Seek out and discreetly kill [TARGET] over at [LOCATION].

Do so successfully and you will be rewarded. Not only that, but you will have proven yourself worthy of further consideration.

Sincerely,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_intro.tr:
首先，請允許我介紹一下我自己。誇張點兒說，我做的是人命的活計。

有人要殺人，就會來找我，而我會僱傭一個完美的殺手。這種方式對所有人來說都安全，因為沒有人知道對方是誰，就我們這活兒的性質來說再好不過了。

最近我聽說你的手藝不錯，能擔得起這活兒，這說法到底對不對，我覺得值得一試。

你要是有興趣給我做事兒，那就展示下你傳說中的身手吧。

目標是 [TARGET]，他們在 ，悄悄得殺掉他們。

辦成了，你不僅有錢可拿，而且也是你實力的證明，以後還會有活兒給你。

此致，
沃恩

vaughn_assassination_description_M.en:
The latest name for our list is [TARGET].

They will be traveling around [LOCATION] in a better class of ship and with a better class of escort. Approach with caution, and try to make this a clean kill.

Regards,
Vaughn

vaughn_assassination_M_desc_001.tr:
名單上的最新名字是 [TARGET]。

他們將乘坐更好級別的船在 [LOCATION] 附近徘徊，也配有更好的護航船。請謹慎處理，把這事辦的乾淨利落。

致謝，
沃恩

vaughn_assassination_description_H.en:
Killing [TARGET] may end up being quite the challenge. They are aboard a well-protected ship near [LOCATION] and are most likely in the company of skilled escorts.

A cautious approach may be wise.

Warmest Regards,
Vaughn

vaughn_assassination_H_desc_001.tr:
殺掉 [TARGET] 可能是一個挑戰。 他們在[LOCATION]附近的一艘受到良好保護的飛船上，很可能還有技術熟練的護航陪同。

謹慎行動或許是明智的選擇。

最誠摯的問候，
沃恩

searchbodyspace_desc_VH.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP66432
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need a skilled operator with combat experience to investigate the last known location of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Their employer hired us to look for they as they were carrying some highly valuable cargo, but the trackers have been disabled and the pilot is no longer responding.

We suspect that outlaws have attacked the ship and seized the cargo for themselves. The client has expressed that they consider the cargo lost but would like to know if the pilot is dead so they can inform their family. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Investigate <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s ship. If you are able to find the pilot’s body, confirm their status so we may inform the client.

Additional Notes:
Backup is highly recommended for this encounter.

Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP66432

We suspect that outlaws have attacked the ship and seized the cargo for themselves. The client has expressed that they consider the cargo lost but would like to know if the pilot is dead so they can inform their family.

Additional Notes:
Backup is highly recommended for this encounter.

vaughn_searchbody_space_VH_Desc_001.en:
It is with deep disappointment that I send this message. A peerless contractor of ours was out on a job, but it seems like the target may have gotten the better of them.

I need you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and see if our contractor, <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, is truly gone.

I suspect that the location will be somewhat chaotic since there will most likely still be multiple threats on site. Therefore, a supporting crew is strongly advised.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
vaughn_searchbody_space_VH_Desc_001.tr:
我很遺憾地發送這條消息。我們一位出類拔萃的承包商在外執行任務時，好像目標占了上風。

我需要你前往 ，看看我們的承包商  是否真的沒了。

我猜那裡會有點亂，因為現場很可能還有多個威脅。因此，強烈建議你帶個支援團隊一起去。

此致，
沃恩

headhunters_ChainElimAll_1C_AttackCFP_E_.en:
Been getting word that CFP security have been getting a little more aggressive and started pushing people out of the homes they've built out of the scrap in the system and they want payback, so they came to us.

Head out to [LOCATION] and clear out the CFP there. Should be pretty cut and dry with a nice payday.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_1C_AttackCFP_E_.tr:
聽說繁榮公民的安保變得更加激進，開始把人們從他們用廢料建造的家中趕出去，他們想要報復，所以找上了我們。

前往 [LOCATION] 清理那裡的繁榮公民，這應該很簡單，而且能賺到一筆不錯的報酬。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

Sincerely,
Vaughn

處決掉 [TARGET]。你能在  找到他們。

我不覺得他們能做出多激烈的反抗，再怎麼也不會很難解決。

此致，
沃恩

Headhunters_eliminateall_caves_desc_01.en:
Hey,

Some two-bit thugs are holed up in [LOCATION]. Wouldn’t pay them any mind, except the arrogant skags tried to hit an outpost under our protection.

We chased 'em off with little trouble, but we can't let that kind of disrespect go unpunished. Our Clips are busy with some bigger fish, so we'd like you to take care of this for us. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_eliminateall_caves_desc_01.tr:
嘿、

一些二流子窩在 [LOCATION] 裡。我們本來不想理會他們，但這群傲慢的傢伙試圖襲擊受我們保護的前哨站。

我們沒費什麼事就把他們趕走了，但我們不能讓這種無禮行為不受懲罰。我們的狙擊手正忙著對付更大的敵人，所以我們希望你能幫我們解決這個問題。

斯托斯通訊完畢。

[TARGET] is aboard a very heavily armed vessel protected by at least two equally armed escorts. They are traveling near [LOCATION].

Not for the faint of heart.

Fondly,
Vaughn

恐怕這是又一項需要你動用所有手段使上渾身解數才能完成的任務。
在一條全副武裝的飛船上，並且至少有兩艘同等武裝的飛船保衛。他們在[LOCATION]附近徘徊。

膽小的可幹不來這個

眷念你的，
沃恩

vaughn_assassination_description_VH.en:
An tricky assignment has just arrived that I think you will be ideally suited for.

Expect to encounter [TARGET] aboard a heavily armed vessel near [LOCATION] and accompanied by some of the most highly-seasoned pilots that can be hired. 

Deal with the escorts as you wish. As long as you kill [TARGET], I will be more than satisfied.

Respectfully,
Vaughn

Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_VH_desc_001.tr:
一項棘手的任務剛到，我想你會非常適合。

預計 [TARGET] 會在一艘重武裝飛船上，他們會在 [LOCATION] 附近徘徊，並且僱傭了一些非常有經驗的飛船駕駛員來護航。

護航船隨便你怎麼處置，只要 [TARGET] 死了我就心滿意足了。

恭敬地，
沃恩

Vaughn_EliminateSpecific_FPS_Rockcracker.en:
I've been having a hard time tracking this target down. They're part of a gang known as the Claw Salamanders who tend to be quite itinerate. However, it seems the group has been trying to get an old QV Breaker Station operational again and I think this just may be the chance to take out [TARGET] once and for all. 

Start your search at [LOCATION].  These stations can apparently be quiet cavernous at  times so it may take a bit of effort to locate the target once you're on site.

However, I have all the confidence in your abilities,
Vaughn
Vaughn_EliminateSpecific_FPS_Rockcracker.tr:
這目標真的難盯。他屬於那幫神出鬼沒的爪蜥幫，平時東躲西藏、行蹤不定。不過最近聽說他們正拼命想重啟一座老掉牙的 QV 碎岩站。這倒是個千載難逢的機會，說不定這次真能一勞永逸地幹掉 [TARGET]。

先從 [LOCATION] 開始搜起吧。這種前哨站空蕩蕩的，像個大山洞似的。你一進去怕是得花點力氣才能把人揪出來。

但是，我對你有十足的信心，
沃恩

Vaughn_EliminateSpecific_FPS_Rockcracker.en:
There is a member of the Nyx gang the Claw Salamanders, [TARGET], who has made it on to my naughty list. They had been on the run for quite awhile, but just recently popped back up at an old mining station in the Keeger Belt. Our lucky day shall be their last.  

Word is that you can find them at [LOCATION].  Unfortunately, there is a strong chance you may have to do some repairs to the station itself before you can gain access to that particular area.

But I'm sure you're more than up to the challenge.

Sincerely,
Vaughn
Vaughn_EliminateSpecific_FPS_Rockcracker.tr:
尼克斯幫派爪蜥幫的一名成員 - [TARGET] - 已列入我的黑名單。此人長期在逃，近期卻突然現身於基格小行星帶的一座廢棄採礦空間站。今日便是我們的幸運日，也將是他們的末日。

據說這個人位於 [LOCATION]。遺憾的是，這地方可能因損毀嚴重，在你進入那個特定區域之前，要先對站點進行一定維修。

不過我相信，這點挑戰對你而言不過是小菜一碟。

此致，
沃恩

Vaughn_EliminateSpecific_FPS_Rockcracker.en:
A request has made its way to my desk regarding the untimely end of one [TARGET], a member of the Claw Salamander who is currently scuttling around an old QV Breaker Station. 

It is highly likely that you will find them at [LOCATION].  Be mindful though that with a station this large it may take a bit of searching to track them down. 

Hope you enjoy your time in Nyx,
Vaughn
Vaughn_EliminateSpecific_FPS_Rockcracker.tr:
剛有份請求遞到我桌上，說的是爪蜥幫有個人，叫 [TARGET] 的，死得有點“趕巧”。眼下正鬼鬼祟祟地在一座老舊 QV 碎岩站裡亂竄。

他們八成就在 [LOCATION] 那兒，不過這空間站實在太大，得仔細找一找，別漏了犄角旮旯。

祝你在尼克斯星系玩得痛快，
沃恩

Adagio_Industrial_Salvage_Universal_Intr.en:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About us <
As the leading procurer and distributor of salvage rights, Adagio Holdings are now looking to expand into the acquisition and distribution of salvageable materials to both small and large-scale businesses.

> About the job <
As a part of this initiative, we need keen-eyed contractors capable of identifying salvageable materials, efficiently stripping them, and delivering the Recycle Material Composite (RMC) and salvaged components to us.

This introductory contract will require you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and strip an abandoned ship approved for salvage.

Once you've gathered the RMC, you'll deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
Adagio_Industrial_Salvage_Universal_Intr.tr:
阿德吉奧集團
一家自豪的平等機會僱主

> 關於我們 <
作為打撈權的主要採購商和經銷商，阿德吉奧集團現在正計劃拓展業務，向中小型及大型企業收購併經銷可回收材料。

> 關於工作 <
作為這項計劃的一部分，我們需要目光敏銳的承包商，能夠識別可回收材料，高效拆解，並將再生符合材料及打撈的組件交付給我們。

這份入門合約要求你前往 ，拆解一艘獲准打撈的廢棄飛船。

等你收集完 RMC 後，你需要將其送到位於  的貨運電梯。

> 工作要求 <
     - 任意級別 / 尺寸的打撈飛船

如需打撈建議，請查閱你手持終端日誌中的<EM4>打撈者物資收集指南</EM4>。

> 免責聲明 <
承包商有責任確保其收集的物資來自根據現行 UEE 法律被視為合法打撈目標的載具。阿德吉奧集團對承包商所犯任何罪行或輕罪概不負責，亦不會向受這些行為影響的任何人提供賠償或補償。

RAIN_collectresources_multiple_GEN_desc_.en:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_collectresources_multiple_GEN_desc_.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

拉亞利科學家們正努力解決再生技術失效的問題。目前，他們的工作因缺乏材料而受阻，他們認為這些物資可能對他們的實驗至關重要。

特別是，我們在  的科學家們因耗盡這些資源而不得不暫停工作。由於供應短缺，我們的常規供應商數月內無法供貨，因此我們將為任何能協助補充這些物資的人提供豐厚報酬。

有關這些動物的更多資訊，請參閱您日誌中的《探險家的可採集物指南》。

攜手共進，我們可以讓宇宙變得更美好。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

BHG_Certification_VeryHard_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: With your proven track record, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn an Advanced Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Very High-Risk Targets (VHRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with heavy escorts. With multiple hostiles to deal with, encounters with these targets can often be lethal.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a VHRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

賞金獵人公會
處理與分配部門

賞金獵人公會已授權一份官方賞金

姓名：[TARGET]
星系：[SYSTEM]

此執照表明您有資格跟蹤和逮捕極高風險目標。 這些罪犯在大型多人船上行動並且帶有大量護航。 您要應對很多敵人，與這些目標的接觸可能是致命的。

您必須成功緝拿這個名為  的極高風險目標，才能通過認證，他最後一次出現是在 。


賞金獵人公會
追求正義

賞金獵人公會是一個由僱傭兵公會批准的安保服務，根據《外星貿易授權法案》被授權在 UEE 及其以外地區開展行動。

cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_ElimSpec_GenAttack_E.en:
We need any available security personnel to report to [LOCATION]. A group of armed individuals have attacked one of our outpost clusters and we're in desperate need of help. Although the group seems to be unaffiliated with any of the known gangs, we've received word that their leader is [TARGET], a local outlaw with a vicious reputation.

Please head out as soon as you can and secure the area by taking out the outlaws and [TARGET].

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_ElimSpec_GenAttack_E.tr:
我們需要任何有空的安全人員前往 [LOCATION] 報到。一群武裝人員襲擊了我們的前哨站集群，我們迫切需要幫助。雖然這群人似乎與任何已知的幫派無關，但我們收到消息，他們的首領是 [TARGET]，一個臭名昭著的當地不法分子。

請儘快出發，確保區域安全，消滅不法分子和 [TARGET]。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

vaughn_assassination_FPS_UGF_illegal_bos.en:
I am not sure if you’re acquainted with [LOCATION], but [TARGET] is the one who calls the shots there. I need them eliminated.

That is easier said then done, I'm afraid. They are notoriously reluctant to see to matters personally, preferring their underlings to handle the dirty work. That said, eliminate enough of the underlings and they will have no choice but to deal with you themselves.

Earnestly,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_FPS_UGF_illegal_bos.tr:
不知道你熟不熟悉 [LOCATION]，[TARGET] 是那一片的地頭蛇。我現在需要他們死。

這活計可沒那麼簡單，他們是出了名的不喜歡親自動手，什麼髒活累活都扔給手下去幹。所以，只要你殺掉他們足夠多的部下，他們就不得不親自出來和你戰鬥了。

你真誠的，
沃恩

CleanAir_RecoverCargo_Easy_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Cargo Retrieval 
APPROVAL CODE = JJ-11

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

With all these Alliance Aid ships hauling valuable cargo around, outlaws in the area have gone into a feeding frenzy. We just got word of one of their latest targets via emergency beacon and need you to go over to the <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, assess the situation, <EM4>neutralize any remaining hostiles</EM4> in the area, and if needed, secure the shipment for delivery to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the cargo. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
CleanAir_RecoverCargo_Easy_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：貨物取回
授權程式碼 = JJ-11

需要立即處理

這麼多援助聯盟飛船滿載貴重物資來回跑，附近的不法分子直接樂瘋了。我們剛通過緊急信標收到他們最新目標的消息，需要你趕去 ，評估現場情況，<EM4>清除區域內所有剩餘敵對勢力</EM4>，如有必要，把貨物護送到 。

記得帶上<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>來處理貨物。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Bulk_Filters_.en:
POSTING: Resource Gathering 
LOCATION: Pyro System, Stanton System
WORK EXPERIENCE: Mining, Commodity Trading
TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is stepping up to help stop the spread of the People’s Ailment. Our facilities are helping in the efforts to produce much needed ventilation filters to replace the faulty ones responsible for the spread of the dangerous Molina Mold, but we need your help to hit that ambitious goal. 

Our current stockpiles of an important resource are not sufficient enough, so we need contractors who can deliver a large-scale haul of it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Resources tied to another contract will not be accepted.   

*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Bulk_Filters_.tr:
發佈：資源收集
地點：派羅星系，斯坦頓星系
工作經驗：採礦，商品貿易
條款*：
舒賓星際正加大力度協助遏制人民病的蔓延。我們的設施正在努力生產急需的通風過濾器，以替換那些導致危險莫利納黴菌擴散的故障濾芯。但我們需要你的幫助才能達成這一雄心勃勃的目標。

我們目前的關鍵資源庫存不足，因此需要承包商將大批量該資源運送到 。

與其他合約綁定的資源不會被接受。

*舒賓星際致力於保護合約雙方的公平權益。接受本合約意味著你已經知悉本合約中所述工作內容附帶包含的全部可能風險，舒賓星際將不對在完成本合約中所述工作內容的過程中所產生的一切損害負責。

CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Supply_Filter.en:
POSTING: Resource Gathering 
LOCATION: Pyro System, Stanton System
WORK EXPERIENCE: Mining, Commodity Trading
TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is switching a sizable portion of our focus to assist in the production of ventilation filters to help stop the spread of Molina Mold. Even though we have the capacity and desire to help, our access to one resource is hampering our efforts.

We’re looking for motivated individuals willing to procure and deliver a medium scale supply of it to our facility at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> so relief efforts can continue humming along.

Resources tied to another contract will not be accepted.

*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Supply_Filter.tr:
發佈：資源收集
地點：派羅星系，斯坦頓星系
工作經驗：採礦，商品貿易
條款*：
舒賓星際正將大量資源轉向協助生產通風過濾器，以遏制莫利納黴菌的擴散。儘管我們具備能力和意願提供幫助，但某種關鍵資源的獲取受限，拖慢了整體進度。

我們正在尋找願意主動採購並運送中等規模物資的熱心人士，將其送達至我們的設施 ，以便救援工作能持續順利推進。

與其他合約綁定的資源不會被接受。

*舒賓星際致力於保護合約雙方的公平權益。接受本合約意味著你已經知悉本合約中所述工作內容附帶包含的全部可能風險，舒賓星際將不對在完成本合約中所述工作內容的過程中所產生的一切損害負責。

CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Small_Filters.en:
POSTING: Resource Gathering 
LOCATION: Pyro System, Stanton System
WORK EXPERIENCE: Mining, Commodity Trading
TERMS*: 
As a member of Alliance Aid, Shubin Interstellar is dedicated to assisting in the production of as many high quality ventilation filters as possible. These filters are key to stopping the spread of Molina Mold and keeping more people from being stricken with the People’s Ailment. 

We’ve just received word from our facility at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> that their stockpile of a vital resource is getting low. Our normal supplier won’t be able to do a resupply run for a while, so we’re hoping you might be able to do a small scale run of it now to bridge the gap. 
 
If you’re available, simply acquire it as you see best and bring it to our facility, and we’ll compensate you well.

Resources tied to another contract will not be accepted.

*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Small_Filters.tr:
發佈：資源收集
地點：派羅星系，斯坦頓星系
工作經驗：採礦，商品貿易
條款*：
作為援助聯盟的一員，舒賓星際致力於協助生產儘可能多的高品質通風過濾器。這些過濾器是阻止莫利納黴菌傳播、防止更多人感染人民病的關鍵。

我們剛收到位於  的設施消息，稱其儲備的一種關鍵資源已所剩無幾。我們的常規供應商暫時無法補給，因此希望你能儘快運送一小批物資，填補這段空檔。

若你有空，請自行設法獲取並運送到我們的設施，我們將給予豐厚報酬。

與其他合約綁定的資源不會被接受。

*舒賓星際致力於保護合約雙方的公平權益。接受本合約意味著你已經知悉本合約中所述工作內容附帶包含的全部可能風險，舒賓星際將不對在完成本合約中所述工作內容的過程中所產生的一切損害負責。

CleanAir_Courier_Combat_desc.en:
ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 

PICKUP LOCATION – An FTL ship carrying a delivery for Alliance Aid went down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Courier needed to retrieve package and continue delivery.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package must be taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – There is a strong chance that the courier was attacked by outlaws eager to acquire the vital supplies needed to stop the Molina mold out break in Levski. <EM4>Medium level engagements</EM4> expected.

TRAVEL –  All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

FTL Courier Services thanks you for helping us do our part for Alliance Aid.
CleanAir_Courier_Combat_desc.tr:
全體超光速快遞員注意
急需分配

**合約細節**

取件地點 – 一艘載有援助聯盟物資的超光速快遞飛船在  墜毀了，需要快遞員去取回包裹並繼續完成投遞。

投遞地點 – 包裹必須被送到 。

威脅等級 – 有很大可能，那名快遞員是被一幫不法分子襲擊了，他們想搶走那些能阻止萊夫斯基地區莫利納黴菌爆發的關鍵物資。預計會遇到<EM4>中等強度的戰鬥</EM4> 。

交通方式 – 所有交通需求應由快遞員自行安排。

超光速快遞服務感謝您幫助我們為援助聯盟盡一份力。

CleanAir_Transport-Milestone1_desc.en:
All right, this one is going to be a bit different. See, with everything going on with Alliance Aid, we had a screw up with our contracts and an important shipment got overlooked. Since lives are at stake, and you've already done so much to help the Transport Division, I was kinda hoping that you'd be able to step up and do a double run for us?

There's a medium scale haul of <EM4>Molina Mold treatment on microtech</EM4> and shipment of <EM4>ventilation filters on Hurston</EM4> waiting for pick-up. You'll need to make both stops, load up everything, and bring it all to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 
 
To handle the cargo, your ship should be big enough to carry cargo containers up to <EM4>2 SCU</EM4> in size. 

And I would double check to make sure you have your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you before heading out. Would be a huge headache if you forgot to bring one!  

It's really amazing of you to be helping out like this,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'
CleanAir_Transport-Milestone1_desc.tr:
好吧，這次任務有點不一樣。你看，由於援助聯盟那邊事情太多，我們的合約出了點差錯，導致一批重要物資被漏掉了。現在人命關天，而你之前已經為運輸部門幫了那麼多忙，我挺希望你能再挺身而出，幫我們跑兩個地點？

有一批<EM4>位於微科星的莫利納黴菌治療用品</EM4>和一批<EM4>位於赫斯頓的通風過濾器</EM4>，中等規模，等著你去取貨。你需要跑完兩個地點，把所有貨物裝上，然後全部送到 。

為了搬運這些貨物，你的飛船得夠大，能裝載最大尺寸達的集裝箱。

出發前，我建議你再三確認隨身帶著<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>，要是忘了帶，那可就麻煩大了！

你願意這樣幫忙，真的太好了。

艾拉·蒂埃諾
初級物流協調員
科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”

CleanAir_EscortShip_Easy_desc.en:
Citizens for Prosperity need a combat-experienced pilot to provide extra support to an Alliance Aid pilot who is making a vital trip from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> for the ongoing relief effort. 

Outlaws have been launching more attacks thanks to the increased activity brought on by the Molina Mold outbreak, so it’ll be your job to make sure that they stay safe while they’re completing their work. This route is relatively safe, so I'm not expecting too much trouble, but its better not to take the risk.

If you’re interested, you’ll rendezvous there and await further instructions.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CleanAir_EscortShip_Easy_desc.tr:
繁榮公民需要一位經驗豐富的飛行員來為一位援助聯盟飛行員提供幫助，該飛行員正在執行關鍵航程，從出發，參與正在進行的救援任務。

由於莫利納黴菌疫情爆發後救援活動頻繁，不法分子的襲擊也隨之增加，因此你的任務是確保他們在執行工作期間的安全。這條航線相對安全，我預計不會有太多麻煩，但最好還是不要冒險。

如果你對此感興趣，請前往該地點集合並等待後續指示。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席排程員
繁榮公民
由於莫利納黴菌疫情爆發後救援活動頻繁，不法分子的襲擊也隨之增加，因此你的任務是確保他們在執行工作期間的安全。這條航線相對安全，我預計不會有太多麻煩，但最好還是不要冒險。如果你對此感興趣，請前往該地點集合並等待後續指示。利瑪·恩迪科特首席排程員繁榮公民

CleanAir_Killship_Hard_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Neutralize Ship 
APPROVAL CODE = RT-06

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of Nyx's local gangs, the Moraine, have been taking advantage of the current emergency happening in Levski and have one of their best pilots, <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, leading attacks against any Alliance Aid haulers they can get their hands on. At the rate they've been stealing supplies from the effort, unless they're stopped soon, its going to lead to whole bunch of sick people on Levski not getting the help they need.

We've been able to track the group to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, but before you head out, you're going to need to some recruiting of your own. Unless you <EM4>take a few wingmen with you</EM4>, not sure you'll be able to neutralize this particular outlaw pack. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
CleanAir_Killship_Hard_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：擊毀飛船
授權程式碼 = RT-06

需要立即處理

尼克斯本地幫派冰磧幫趁萊夫斯基當前緊急狀況作亂，派出他們最頂的飛行員 ，專門襲擊所有能抓到的援助聯盟運輸船。照他們這麼偷物資的架勢，若不盡快制止，萊夫斯基將有一大堆病患得不到急需的救助。

我們已追蹤到這夥人藏身於 ，但在你出發前，得先自己拉點人手。除非你<EM4>帶上幾個僚機</EM4>，否則恐怕搞不定這群特別難纏的不法分子。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。
合約 & 派遣合約類型：擊毀飛船授權程式碼 = RT-06需要立即處理尼克斯本地幫派冰磧幫趁萊夫斯基當前緊急狀況作亂，派出他們最頂的飛行員 <EM4>~missionTargetName</EM4>，專門襲擊所有能抓到的援助聯盟運輸船。照他們這麼偷物資的架勢，若不盡快制止，萊夫斯基將有一大堆病患得不到急需的救助。我們已追蹤到這夥人藏身於 <EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>，但在你出發前，得先自己拉點人手。除非你<EM4>帶上幾個僚機</EM4>，否則恐怕搞不定這群特別難纏的不法分子。該合約不可轉讓。此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

Hey,

Help us put an end to the People's Affliction by hauling new vent filters to places that need replacements. 

Here's a run of them from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. This is a large scale haul, so bring a ship that can fit everything. The manifest also specifies that that largest container you'll be dealing with is <EM4>16 SCU</EM4>. Would strongly recommending bringing a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to deal with those. 

Thanks for joining us and Alliance Aid to help bring this crisis to an end!

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

嘿，

幫我們終結人民病吧——把新的通風過濾器運送到急需更換的地方。

這趟任務是從  運到 。這是個大規模運輸任務，記得帶一艘能裝下所有貨物的飛船。貨單上還特別註明，你將要處理的最大集裝箱尺寸是 ，強烈建議帶上一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>來應對這些大件。

感謝你加入我們和援助聯盟，一起努力讓這場危機早日結束！

艾拉·蒂埃諾

Pick up for this haul is at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. You’ll be dealing with containers that are up to <EM4>8 SCU</EM4> in size. Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and a ship that can fit containers that size. 

Ella Tieno

A special containment team at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has collected and securely packaged enough Molina mold samples for a large scale haul. Researchers at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> are eagerly awaiting its arrival so they can continue their tests. Any chance you can do this run for us?

I've confirmed with the containment team that they used biohazard-grade containers, so there's no risk of you catching the People's Aliment. Just bring a ship that can haul <EM4>16 SCU</EM4> cargo containers and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

Hope its a safe and smooth haul for you,

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

位於  的一支特殊收容小組已收集並安全封裝了足量的莫利納黴菌樣本，準備進行大規模運輸。位於  的研究人員正熱切等待樣本抵達，以便繼續他們的實驗。你方便幫我們跑這一趟嗎？

我已向收容小組確認，他們使用的是生物危害等級容器，因此你不會感染人民病。只需帶上一艘能裝載  尺寸集裝箱的飛船，以及一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>即可。

艾拉·蒂埃諾
初級物流協調員
科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”

Hi,

With medical facilities completely overwhelmed by the Molina mold outbreak, they've resorted to putting people in cyropods to keep them from getting sicker. Thankfully, the folks at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> have freed up hospital space to treat a handful of the affected people. All they need now are the patients.

Looking for someone willing to pick up some cryopods from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> with a ship that can hold containers up to <EM4>2 SCU</EM4> in size. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. Not sure if you've moved a cryopod before, but it's not exactly something you can haul around by hand.   

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

嗨，

由於醫療設施被莫利納黴菌爆發徹底壓垮，他們只好把病人塞進冷凍艙來防止病情惡化。好在  那邊騰出了醫院空間，能收治一批受影響的患者，現在就差把人送過去了。

想找個人幫忙從  取幾臺冷凍艙，你得有一艘貨艙能裝下最大尺寸為  的集裝箱的飛船，還得帶上一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>。不確定你以前搬過冷凍艙沒，這玩意兒可真不是能徒手扛著走的。

艾拉·蒂埃諾
初級物流協調員
科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”

 那兒有批中等規模的新通風濾芯，正等著運到 。你有空接這單嗎？

CleanAir_Hauling_Supply_MedicalSupplies_.en:
I hope this message finds you well,

Things are a bit crazy than normal around here because of how many of our pilots ended up getting sick while doing runs to Levski. Thankfully, Covalex is contributing to 'Alliance Aid' so hopefully we can put this whole affair behind us soon. 

Currently, I've got a medium scale haul of medical supplies waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Really need someone to take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, so the team there can operate at full capacity. 

The biggest container on this run will be <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> in size, so have a ship that can handle those. Oh, and don't forget your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.  

Thanks for joining us and Alliance Aid to help bring this crisis to an end!

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

CleanAir_Hauling_Small_MedicalSupplies_d.tr:
嘿，

自從莫利納黴菌爆發以來，醫療物資的需求量激增。正因如此，位於  的醫療團隊手頭幾種必需品已所剩無幾，等不到常規補給了。你現在有空跑一趟緊急運輸嗎？

貨物已在  備好待運。雖然只是小規模運輸，但你仍需帶上一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>。看起來集裝箱最大會達到  的尺寸。

祝你一路平安順利！

艾拉·蒂埃諾
初級物流協調員
科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”

CleanAir_Hauling_Small_MoldSample_desc.en:
Hello,

Scientists at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> are desperate to get their hands on Molina mold samples so they can put it through a battery of tests. Just got word that there’s a small haul of samples waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> for them to use. Are you available to make this run? 

You’ll need a ship that can hold cargo containers up to <EM4>1 SCU</EM4> in size, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to deal with them. Finally, for your peace of mind, the mold samples have been safely and securely packaged inside the crates so there’s no risk of it getting you sick. 

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'
CleanAir_Hauling_Small_MoldSample_desc.tr:
你好，

 的科學家們急著拿到莫利納黴菌樣本，好對它們做一系列測試。剛收到消息，有一批小規模樣本正放在  等他們取用。你有空跑這一趟嗎？

你需要一艘貨艙能裝下最大尺寸為  集裝箱的飛船，再帶上一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>來搬運。最後放心，這些黴菌樣本已安全密封在箱子裡，不會讓你感染生病。

艾拉·蒂埃諾
初級物流協調員
科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”

CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Bulk_MoldRese.en:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are working around-the-clock to assist with the treatment for the current fungal outbreak in Levski. Due to logistic issues, our team at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is running low on a key resource in their research. Losing production at that location would hamper the Alliance Aid’s effort to cure people suffering from this terrible affliction in a timely manner.

That’s why we're eager for the help of anyone who can find and deliver this vital supply to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Bulk_MoldRese.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

拉亞利的科學家們正晝夜不停地協助治療當前在萊夫斯基爆發的真菌疫情。由於物流問題，我們在  的團隊研究所需的關鍵資源已所剩無幾。若該地點停產，將嚴重阻礙援助聯盟及時治癒受此可怕疾病折磨的民眾。

因此，我們迫切需要任何能尋獲並運送這批關鍵物資至  的人士伸出援手。

請謹記：合約貨物受其合法所有者追蹤，無法接受非合約物品。

攜手同心，我們能讓宇宙變得更美好。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Small_MoldRes.en:
To all available contractors,

Rayari needs your assistance. As part of the Alliance Aid effort, our scientists have shifted their entire focus to assisting Levski deal with Molina mold. Unfortunately, the team’s progress has stalled due to a lack of a key resource.

Obtaining it from our regular distributors could take weeks. Considering how many people desperately need help, stopping research for that long would seriously impact our effort. We’re hoping to find motivated individuals willing to procure and deliver a small scale haul of it for delivery to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

If you need help locating this resource, I suggest checking the <EM4>'Forager's Guide'</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal for more information.

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Small_MoldRes.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

拉亞利需要你的幫助。作為援助聯盟行動的一部分，我們的科學家已將全部精力轉向協助萊夫斯基以應對莫利納黴菌。不幸的是，由於缺乏一種關鍵資源，團隊的研究進度已陷入停滯。

從常規供應商處獲取該資源可能需要數週時間。考慮到眼下有大量民眾急需救助，若研究中斷這麼久，必將嚴重影響我們的努力。我們希望能找到願意主動採購並運送少量物資的熱心人士，送至 。

如果你需要幫助尋找這種資源，建議查看你 mobiGlas 日誌中的<EM4>“覓食者指南”</EM4>，以獲取更多資訊。

請記住，合約綁定的貨物由其合法所有者追蹤，恕不接受。

讓我們攜手，為所有人創造更美好的宇宙。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Supply_MoldRe.en:
To all available contractors,

Good news! Rayari is working hard to help cure the People’s Ailment. Unfortunately, it has been extremely difficult to procure one key resource through our normal sources. To help us expand our access to it, we will be offering an excellent rate for those who help find and deliver it to our scientists at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Supply_MoldRe.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

好消息！拉亞利正全力投入，幫助治癒民眾的頑疾。可惜的是，通過常規渠道獲取一種關鍵資源異常困難。為了擴大我們對它的獲取途徑，我們將為協助尋找並運送該物資至我們位於  的科學家處的人士提供優厚報酬。

請記住，合約綁定的貨物由其合法所有者追蹤，恕不接受。

讓我們攜手，為所有人創造更美好的宇宙。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

CleanAir_Hauling_Bulk_MedicalSupplies_de.en:
Hello,

With the ongoing emergency in Levski, Alliance Aid needs all hands on deck to help transport enough medical supplies to save as many lives as possible. There's a large scale haul over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ready to be brought to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This run needs a hauler with a ship that can hold <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to deal with the crates.    

Please let me know if you can handle this for us.   

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
CleanAir_Hauling_Bulk_MedicalSupplies_de.tr:
你好，

萊夫斯基那邊還在緊急狀態，援助聯盟需要所有人幫忙儘快把醫療物資運過去，能救多少人算多少。在  那邊有大批貨等著運到 。

這趟活兒得找個能裝下  尺寸集裝箱的運輸船，還得帶上便攜式牽引光束來搬那些箱子。

你要是能接，請告訴我一聲。

運輸平安，
雷耶斯·玲
貨運物流協調員
玲家快遞

玲家快遞深知宇宙危險莫測，因此制定了多項協議，以保護你和客戶貨物的安全。為確保你不會因不可控因素受罰，總報酬將按成功交付的貨物比例計算。每趟運輸都會設置交付倒計時，倒計時結束時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為被盜，並按盜竊處理。所有取貨和送貨必須通過自動裝載或貨運電梯完成。

CleanAir_Collect-Milestone1_desc.en:
Let me start by saying that your continuing work helping the Alliance Aid efforts so far have made a considerable difference not only to us at Rayari, but to the rest of the organizations coordinating with the Collections Division. It's why I wanted to reach out to you directly. 

While we have been making great strides in combating this ongoing health crisis, there is concern amongst our researchers that Molina Mold has the potential to mutate into a new fungal strain. 
In order in ensure that our ongoing investigation into the mold is as accurate as possible, we would like you to head to the source of the growth in Levski and <EM4> harvest new samples of the Molina Mold </EM4> there directly. 

Once you have the samples collected, you will then need to deliver them to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Thank you for your assistance at this vital juncture. 

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
CleanAir_Collect-Milestone1_desc.tr:
首先，我想說，你迄今為止持續協助援助聯盟工作的努力，不僅對我們拉亞利公司意義重大，也對與收集部門協調的其他組織產生了顯著影響。正因如此，我才想直接聯繫你。

雖然我們在應對這場持續的健康危機方面已取得巨大進展，但我們的研究人員擔心莫利納黴菌有可能變異成一種全新的真菌菌株。
為了確保我們對這種黴菌的調查儘可能準確，我們希望你前往萊夫斯基的黴菌滋生的源頭，並直接<EM4>採集新的莫利納黴菌樣本</EM4>。

採集完樣本之後，你需要將它們送到。

感謝你在這一關鍵時間節點提供的幫助。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

CleanAir_EscortShip_Hard_desc.en:
Alliance Aid has a ship vital to the relief effort leaving from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They have received credible threats that they may be attacked and are looking to bring on additional security.

When you're ready, head to the rendezvous with yourself and <EM4>any additional combat ships you can recruit</EM4>  and await further instructions.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CleanAir_EscortShip_Hard_desc.tr:
援助聯盟有一艘對於救援行動十分重要的飛船正從出發。他們收到可靠情報，可能被襲擊，因此正在尋求額外的安保支援。

準備好後，前往集合點，<EM4>儘可能招募額外增援飛船</EM4>，等待後續指示。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席排程員
繁榮公民
準備好後，前往集合點，<EM4>儘可能招募額外增援飛船</EM4>，等待後續指示。利瑪·恩迪科特首席排程員繁榮公民

CleanAir_Killship_Medium_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Neutralize Ship 
APPROVAL CODE = RT-05

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

It seems that the People's Alliance aren't the only ones eager to get their hands on the resources needed to fight their Molina Mold outbreak. The Moraine gang has been hitting the shipping lanes hard trying to get their hands on as many haulers as they can. One particular member, <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, and their crew have been especially successful, knocking over over a dozen ships. The folks organizing Alliance Aid are pretty eager to see this growing problem dealt with.

Recent reports have their hunting grounds over near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head there with any support ships you want to take and neutralize them before any more vital supplies are lost. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
CleanAir_Killship_Medium_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：擊毀飛船
授權程式碼 = RT-05

需要立即處理

看來，除了人民聯盟，冰磧幫也急著搶奪對抗莫利納黴菌爆發所需的資源。他們瘋狂襲擊航線，拼命攔截運輸船。其中一名成員  及其團伙尤其“高效”，已打劫了十幾艘船。負責援助聯盟的那幫人，非常渴望看到這個日益嚴重的問題得到解決。

最新情報顯示，他們的活動區域就在  附近。帶上你想帶的支援飛船趕過去，在更多關鍵物資流失前把他們消滅掉。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。
合約 & 派遣合約類型：擊毀飛船授權程式碼 = RT-05需要立即處理看來，除了人民聯盟，冰磧幫也急著搶奪對抗莫利納黴菌爆發所需的資源。他們瘋狂襲擊航線，拼命攔截運輸船。其中一名成員 <EM4>~missionTargetName</EM4> 及其團伙尤其“高效”，已打劫了十幾艘船。負責援助聯盟的那幫人，非常渴望看到這個日益嚴重的問題得到解決。最新情報顯示，他們的活動區域就在 <EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4> 附近。帶上你想帶的支援飛船趕過去，在更多關鍵物資流失前把他們消滅掉。該合約不可轉讓。此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

CleanAir_EscortShip_Medium_desc.en:
I was just contacted by an Alliance Aid rep who is deeply concerned for one of their contractors heading out from  <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The ships helping the relief effort have been drawing a lot of outlaw attention and they're worried that without extra protection they won't be able to finish their vital work.  

Owing with the increased risk level and the value of the ship, it might behoove you to <EM4>bring some combat support</EM4> of your own along.

If you’re interested, head to the rendezvous and await further instructions.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CleanAir_EscortShip_Medium_desc.tr:
我剛剛收到了一位援助聯盟代表的聯絡，他們非常擔心一名從出發的承包商。參與救援行動的非常引起了大量不法分子的注意，他們擔心若是沒有額外的保護，無法完成這項重要任務。

鑑於風險等級的上升和飛船的重要價值，建議你自行<EM4>帶上戰鬥支援</EM4>。

如果你有興趣，請前往集合點並等待進一步指示。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席排程員
繁榮公民
鑑於風險等級的上升和飛船的重要價值，建議你自行<EM4>帶上戰鬥支援</EM4>。如果你有興趣，請前往集合點並等待進一步指示。利瑪·恩迪科特首席排程員繁榮公民

You figure these outlaws would have the decency not to interfere with relief efforts but unfortunately we've gotten word that an Alliance Aid convoy is under attack. These criminals seem to be a serious threat so it would be recommended to <EM4>bring some support along</EM4> with you. 

Once you're ready, head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and face these criminals head on.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

準備就緒後，前往<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>與這些罪犯正面交鋒。


利瑪·恩迪科特
首席排程員

CleanAir_DefendShip_Easy_desc.en:
We’ve lost contact with an Alliance Aid supply convoy and are concerned it might be under attack from outlaws. We need you to hurry to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and support them. Any delays to the ongoing relief efforts could cost lives in Levski.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CleanAir_DefendShip_Easy_desc.tr:
我們與一支援助聯盟的物資車隊失去了聯絡，擔心它可能遭到不法分子的襲擊。我們需要你儘快前往支援他們。任何延誤都可能導致萊夫斯基地區人員傷亡。


利瑪·恩迪科特
首席排程員
繁榮公民
利瑪·恩迪科特首席排程員繁榮公民

CleanAir_DefendShip_Hard_desc.en:
Everyone has been joining with Alliance Aid to help with the ongoing crisis in Levski, but it seems you can't do good in this 'verse without attracting the bad. One of the critical relief convoys was just attacked by a powerful outlaw fleet. We need you to <EM4>put together a fleet of your own</EM4> and deploy to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as soon as possible. With any luck, you may be able to right this wrong before it's too late.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CleanAir_DefendShip_Hard_desc.tr:
所有人都在與援助聯盟合作，幫助解決萊夫斯基正在發生的危機，但在這個宇宙中，似乎做好事總會招來麻煩。一支重要的救援運輸隊剛剛遭到一支強大的不法分子艦隊的襲擊。我們需要你<EM4>組建一支自己的艦隊</EM4>，並儘快前往。如果一切順利，你或許能在為時已晚之前力挽狂瀾。


利瑪·恩迪科特
首席排程員
繁榮公民
利瑪·恩迪科特首席排程員繁榮公民

CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Small_MoldRes.en:
To all available contractors,

Rayari needs your assistance. As part of the Alliance Aid effort, our scientists have shifted their entire focus to assisting Levski deal with Molina mold. Unfortunately, the team’s progress has stalled due to a lack of a key resource.

Obtaining it from our regular distributors could take weeks. Considering how many people desperately need help, stopping research for that long would seriously impact our effort. We’re hoping to find motivated individuals willing to procure and deliver a small scale haul of it for delivery to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Small_MoldRes.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

拉亞利需要你的幫助。作為援助聯盟行動的一部分，我們的科學家已將全部精力轉向協助萊夫斯基以應對莫利納黴菌。不幸的是，由於缺乏一種關鍵資源，團隊的研究進度已陷入停滯。

從常規供應商處獲取該資源可能需要數週時間。考慮到眼下有大量民眾急需救助，若研究中斷這麼久，必將嚴重影響我們的努力。我們希望能找到願意主動採購並運送少量物資的熱心人士，送至 。

請記住，合約綁定的貨物由其合法所有者追蹤，恕不接受。

讓我們攜手，為所有人創造更美好的宇宙。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

CleanAir_RecoverCargo_Medium_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Cargo Retrieval 
APPROVAL CODE = JJ-12

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Nothing like an emergency to bring out the worst in people. This Molina mold is killing people left and right, and what do the scum of this system decide to do? That's right, they're out there trying to highjack vital shipments. Alliance Aid wants us to make sure they don't get away with it. 

You're going to head to the <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, assess the situation, <EM4>neutralize any remaining hostiles</EM4> in the area, and secure the shipment for delivery to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. I expect these jackers to put up a good fight, so feel free to take along some backup if you want.

Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the cargo.  

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
CleanAir_RecoverCargo_Medium_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：貨物取回
授權程式碼 = JJ-12

需要立即處理

沒什麼比緊急情況更能把人最壞的一面逼出來了。這種莫利納黴菌正在肆意奪人性命，可這星系裡的渣滓們卻在幹啥？沒錯，他們正到處試圖劫走關鍵物資。援助聯盟希望我們確保他們不會逃脫懲罰。

你得趕去 ，評估現場情況，<EM4>清除區域內所有剩餘敵對勢力</EM4>，並把貨物護送到 。我猜這些劫匪會拼死抵抗，所以如果你需要，儘管帶上些支援力量。

記得帶上<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>來處理貨物。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

CleanAir_Killship_Easy_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Neutralize Ship 
APPROVAL CODE = RT-04

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

With valuable shipments being transported to Levski thanks to this whole Alliance Aid thing, outlaws have been happy as clams targeting the loaded-up haulers. One particular scumbag, <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, has hit a half-dozen ships so far and everyone's pretty eager to stop their spree in its tracks.

They were last spotted harrassing ships over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head there and take out their ship. Payment will be issued once they're neutralized. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
CleanAir_Killship_Easy_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：擊毀飛船
授權程式碼 = RT-04

需要立即處理

多虧了“援助聯盟”這檔子事，運往萊夫斯基的貴重物資接連不斷，不法分子們樂得像撿了寶似的，專挑滿載貨船下手。有個特別欠揍的混蛋叫 ，至今已襲擊了六艘船，大夥兒都巴不得趕緊把他這股歪風剎住。

他們最後一次被目擊是在  附近騷擾過往船隻。你去那兒把他的飛船幹掉，等他被消滅後，報酬立馬到賬。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。
合約 & 派遣合約類型：擊毀飛船授權程式碼 = RT-04需要立即處理多虧了“援助聯盟”這檔子事，運往萊夫斯基的貴重物資接連不斷，不法分子們樂得像撿了寶似的，專挑滿載貨船下手。有個特別欠揍的混蛋叫 <EM4>~missionTargetName</EM4>，至今已襲擊了六艘船，大夥兒都巴不得趕緊把他這股歪風剎住。他們最後一次被目擊是在 <EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4> 附近騷擾過往船隻。你去那兒把他的飛船幹掉，等他被消滅後，報酬立馬到賬。該合約不可轉讓。此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

CleanAir_RecoverCargo_Hard_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Cargo Retrieval 
APPROVAL CODE = JJ-13

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Alliance Aid just comm'd in a panic. A vital shipment that they were counting on hasn't shown up. All signs point to it getting jacked by thieves along the way so they're counting on us to make sure it gets delivered.  

You're going to head to the <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, assess the situation, <EM4>neutralize any remaining hostiles</EM4> in the area, and secure the shipment for drop off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Be sure to have a <EM4>few support ships</EM4> with you just in case things get extra rough. 

Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the cargo.  

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
CleanAir_RecoverCargo_Hard_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：貨物取回
授權程式碼 = JJ-13

需要立即處理

援助聯盟剛急匆匆發來消息，他們指望的一批關鍵物資遲遲沒到。種種跡象表明，貨在路上被竊賊劫了，所以他們指望我們確保這批貨能安全送達。

你得趕去 ，評估現場情況，<EM4>清除區域內所有剩餘敵對勢力</EM4>，並把貨物護送到 。最好帶上<EM4>幾艘支援飛船</EM4>，以防情況特別棘手。

記得帶上<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>來處理貨物。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

CleanAir_Hauling_Bulk_MoldTreatment_desc.en:
Hi,

People are breathing a sigh of relief that a treatment for the People's Aliment has been found, but we're not out of the woods just yet. There's still plenty of folks suffering . We're hoping you can help the cause by handling a large scale haul of the stuff.  

If you're available, we need you to pick up from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and then fly it over to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
CleanAir_Hauling_Bulk_MoldTreatment_desc.tr:
嗨，

人們得知人民病的治療方法已被找到後都鬆了一口氣，但我們還沒完全脫離困境——仍有不少人正在受苦。我們希望你能幫忙，接手這批大規模運輸任務。

如果你有空，請從  取貨，然後運送到 。記得帶上一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>，以及一艘能裝載  尺寸集裝箱的飛船。

運輸平安，
雷耶斯·玲
貨運物流協調員
玲家快遞

玲家快遞深知宇宙危險莫測，因此制定了多項協議，以保護你和客戶貨物的安全。為確保你不會因不可控因素受罰，總報酬將按成功交付的貨物比例計算。每趟運輸都會設置交付倒計時，倒計時結束時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為被盜，並按盜竊處理。所有取貨和送貨必須通過自動裝載或貨運電梯完成。

CleanAir_Hauling_Supply_MoldTreatment_de.en:
Hey,

Pretty heartbreaking hearing what's happening to the people out in Levski with this Molina mold outbreak? Our family has decided to do all we can to help out with Alliance Aid.  Got a medium scale haul of antifungal waiting to be picked up at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Think you can handle this for us?

Before you go, please make sure you bring a ship that can hold <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to deal with the containers. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
CleanAir_Hauling_Supply_MoldTreatment_de.tr:
嘿，

聽說萊夫斯基那邊的人正遭莫利納黴菌肆虐，真是讓人心碎。我們全家都決定盡己所能參與“援助聯盟”。手頭有一批中等規模的抗真菌藥，正等著從  取貨，運到 。你方便接這單嗎？

出發前記得帶艘能裝下  尺寸集裝箱的船，還得備上一支<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>來搬那些箱子。

運輸平安，
雷耶斯·玲
貨運物流協調員
玲家快遞

玲家快遞深知宇宙危險莫測，因此制定了多項協議，以保護你和客戶貨物的安全。為確保你不會因不可控因素受罰，總報酬將按成功交付的貨物比例計算。每趟運輸都會設置交付倒計時，倒計時結束時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為被盜，並按盜竊處理。所有取貨和送貨必須通過自動裝載或貨運電梯完成。

CleanAir_Hauling_Small_MoldTreatment_des.en:
Hi,

We’ve joined the effort to help those affected by the Molina mold outbreak. There’s a small scale haul of urgently needed treatment waiting to be picked up from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Any chance you’re available?  
   
All you’ll need is a ship that can fit <EM4>1 SCU cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to make moving the stuff easier on you. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
CleanAir_Hauling_Small_MoldTreatment_des.tr:
嗨，

我們已加入援助受莫利納黴菌爆發影響人群的行動。有一批急需的治療物資正等著從  取貨，送往 。你有空幫忙跑一趟嗎？

你只需一艘能裝下  尺寸集裝箱的飛船，再帶上一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>，搬運起來會輕鬆些。

運輸平安，
雷耶斯·玲
貨運物流協調員
玲家快遞

玲家快遞深知宇宙危險莫測，因此制定了多項協議，以保護你和客戶貨物的安全。為確保你不會因不可控因素受罰，總報酬將按成功交付的貨物比例計算。每趟運輸都會設置交付倒計時，倒計時結束時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為被盜，並按盜竊處理。所有取貨和送貨必須通過自動裝載或貨運電梯完成。

CleanAir_Defense-Milestone1_desc.en:
Since you've been doing so much work helping out the Defense Division I wanted to come to you with this contract direct. It's a bit of a delicate one. Two VIPs fell ill and the worry was that if word got out they were being transported they would become major targets.

Unfortunately, it seems that's exactly what happened. Our attempts to smuggle them from Nyx to Stanton for medical treatment have failed, and now the ship carrying them is under attack. 

We need you to hurry to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, neutralize the attackers and ensure that the cryopods make it safely to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

In fact, I want you to make sure you have a ship that can carry the cryopods just in case their original transport is too damaged to go on.

I sincerely hope you manage to pull this rescue mission off. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CleanAir_Defense-Milestone1_desc.tr:
鑑於你一直在協助防衛部門做了大量工作，我想直接把這份合約交給你。這事兒有點敏感。有兩位重要人物生病了，我們擔心一旦消息走漏，他們被運送的消息會讓他們成為主要目標。

不幸的是，情況似乎正是如此。我們試圖將他們從尼克斯秘密送往斯坦頓接受治療的行動失敗了，現在載著他們的飛船正遭到攻擊。

我們需要你火速趕往 ，擊退襲擊者，並確保冷凍艙安全抵達  的貨運電梯處。

實際上，我希望你準備一艘能運載冷凍艙的飛船，以防他們原來的運輸工具受損嚴重無法繼續使用。

我真心希望你能順利完成這次救援任務。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

CleanAir_Courier_Derelict_desc.en:
ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 

PICKUP LOCATION – An FTL ship carrying a delivery for Alliance Aid has not completed it's contract. The last known location has it still over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. A courier needed to retrieve package and continue delivery.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package must be taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – It is unclear what happened to the ship, but we expect a malfunction. Still, caution is advised. <EM4>Low level engagements</EM4> expected.

TRAVEL –  All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

FTL Courier Services is proud to be assisting in Alliance Aid efforts to help fight the Levski outbreak.
CleanAir_Courier_Derelict_desc.tr:
全體超光速快遞員注意
急需分配

**合約細節**

取件地點 – 一艘搭載著援助聯盟物資的超光速快遞飛船未能完成其合約。最後已知位置顯示它仍停留在 。需要一名快遞員取回包裹並繼續完成配送。

投遞地點 – 包裹必須被送到 。

威脅等級 – 目前尚不清楚飛船發生了什麼，但我們推測是出現了故障。不過仍需謹慎行事。預計會遇到<EM4>低級別交火</EM4>。

交通方式 –  所有交通需求應由快遞員自行安排。

超光速快遞服務很榮幸能夠協助援助聯盟，共同抗擊萊夫斯基的疫情。

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_M_desc_001.en:
One of our Clips put out a kill order on a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Feel like making ‘em happy by taking it out?

Here’s what you need to know. The target and their escort are scheduled to pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Looks like there’s an emission cloud nearby that can hide your ship’s sig. Wait there until you’re ready to strike. 

The Clip only cares about wiping out the target. Anything of value you find floating in the wreckage is all yours. 

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>5</EM4> Council Scrip to sweeten the pot. 

- Stows
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_M_desc_001.tr:
咱們獵頭幫有個金主掛了懸賞要搞掉 。幹完這票讓他樂呵樂呵？

情報如下：目標船隊會經過 。附近有有片輻射雲能藏住飛船信號，貓那兒等動手時機就行。

金主只要目標死透。殘骸裡撈到的好貨都歸你。

更重要的是，我還會額外獎勵給主承包商 <EM4>�0� 個堂會憑證</EM4> 作為甜頭。

- 斯托斯

Foxwell_X2_ShipAmbush_Desc.en:
Been handed some strong intel on a XenoThreat strike wing's flightpath. Looking for contractors who can dust off now and be set up at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ahead of them. Local conditions will mask your scanner signatures so you can give them the surprise of their lives. Let's turn the hunters into the hunted.

Interested?

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_X2_ShipAmbush_Desc.tr:
已收到關於異種威脅打擊編隊飛行路線的可靠情報。現招募承包商，即刻出發並在  提前部署待命。當地環境將遮蔽你的掃描信號，讓你給對方一個大大的驚喜。讓我們把獵人變成獵物。

有興趣嗎？

凱文·沃爾頓
調度員，福克斯韋爾安保
“安全，盡在掌握”

福克斯韋爾安保是一家獲得 UEE 全境執業許可的擔保安全專家公司。我們始終歡迎新的幹員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的任何人對此感興趣，請與我們的合約代表聯繫。

vaughn_assassination_PA_S_desc.en:
I am thrilled to inform you that we have a particularly ambitious assignment for you.

<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has been marked for termination. You may know them already: a particularly high-profile member of the People’s Alliance who is notorious for having thwarted numerous attempts against their life. We initially considered it too troublesome until our client offered an even more outrageous amount of credits to see this to completion.

The target’s last known location was at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Expect a top-of-the-line ship and a skilled escort.

We look forward to hearing about their untimely demise.

Sincerely,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_PA_S_desc.tr:
我很高興地通知你，我們有一個特別有挑戰性的任務交給你。 已經被標記為清除目標。你可能已經認識他們了：人民聯盟一個特別高調的成員，以多次挫敗謀殺他們的企圖而臭名昭著。我們最初覺得這太麻煩了，直到我們客戶願意開價更高的信用點來完成這個任務。

目標最後已知的位置在 。預計他們會有一艘頂級飛船和一名技術嫻熟的護衛陪同。

我們期待聽到他們意外死亡的消息。

此致，
沃恩

vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_rehire.en:
It is not often in life that we get another chance to make a first impression, but I am going to provide to you with just that.

To say I was disappointed in how things last transpired on your last assassination attempt would be a severe understatement. However, here is your chance to prove yourself capable of more. 

Kill [TARGET] over at [LOCATION] and I will consider the slate wiped clean. 

Sincerely,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_rehire.tr:
在生活中，我們很少能再獲得一次給別人留下第一印象的機會，但我會為你提供這樣的機會。

要是說我對你上次的暗殺任務的表現感到失望，實在是輕描淡寫。然而，現在你有機會證明自己的能力不止於此。

殺了 [TARGET]，地點在  ，之後過往不究。

此致，
沃恩

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SandArmour.en:
Hello, know many humans want saldynium for regen problem. Credits good, yes, but Wikelo can use that, kopion horn, and other things to make special armor. 

Once done, you be very tough. Very scary.

You see items needed. Bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and I make for you.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SandArmour.tr:
你好。知道很多人需要爍迪銀解決再生問題。信用點商品固然不錯，但維科洛可以用它，加上寇駢犬角和其他材料，打造特殊護甲。

完成後你將堅不可摧，兇悍駭人。

你看到需要的物品了。帶到，我會為你製作。

再見。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SpikeyArmor.en:
Vanduul have strange ways. I never talk to them, old souli used to, but not Wikelo. Anyway, though not friendly, they make interesting thing. If you like, Wikelo can make you look more like.

Bring things. Will do.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SpikeyArmor.tr:
凡杜有他們自己的怪東西。我從來不和他們說話。以前商會會，但維科洛不會。總之。雖然他們不友好，卻能做出很有意思的東西。如果你喜歡，維科洛可以讓你看起來更像他們。

帶東西過來。我就做。

再見。

TheCollector_Ships_Anvil_Asgard_Desc.en: Wikelo mod Asgard and so that it fights more. You in a fight, this mod is what you want. Plus, good deal on the trade. Just bring items here and I give you the ship.
TheCollector_Ships_Anvil_Asgard_Desc.tr: 維科洛改的阿斯加德，讓它戰鬥能力更強。你在打架時候，這個改款就是你想要的。而且。交易價格很優惠。只要把東西帶來，我就給你這艘船。

Intersec_TSG_Assist_Solo_Desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat Ready
Briefing: 
An Idris-class People's Alliance security vessel named Tranquility is currently engaged with a <EM>Vanduul capital ship</EM4> near an old <EM4>QV Extraction station</EM4> and Intersec is looking for combat pilots to lend some support.

Scramble to the AO and <EM4>engage Vanduul fighters so the Tranquility can focus on the capital ship</EM4>. 

Good luck,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Intersec_TSG_Assist_Solo_Desc_001.tr:
任務說明

行動區域：尼克斯星系
敵對勢力：梵杜
裝備規格：戰鬥級飛船
任務簡報：
一艘名為寧靜號的伊德里斯級的人民聯盟安保飛船正在一處舊的<EM4> QV 萃取站</EM4>附近與一艘<EM4>梵杜主力艦</EM4>交戰，互安正招募戰鬥飛行員前去支援。

趕緊趕往行動區域，<EM4>幹掉那些梵杜戰鬥機，好讓寧靜號專心對付那艘主力艦</EM4>。

祝好運，

迪肯·託賓
運營經理
互安防務

本通訊內容包含機密內容，僅限收件人閱讀。如誤收請忽略並通知發件人。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，並須遵守適用的 UEE 及星系法律。

cfp_defendship_MRT_bombingrun_desc_001.en:
One of our people is currently under attack at [LOCATION]. They have attempted to elude their attackers to get to safely, but the outlaws have proven too skilled for them to break away. 

We need you to fly there, engage with the attackers, and then destroy the nearby fuel reserves. The hope is that this display of destruction will dissuade them from continuing pursuit.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_MRT_bombingrun_desc_001.tr:
我們的一名成員目前在 [LOCATION] 遭到攻擊。他們試圖躲避攻擊者以安全撤離，但不法分子太過高明，導致他們無法擺脫。

我們需要你飛到那裡，與攻擊者交戰，然後摧毀附近的燃料儲備。希望這種破壞的展示能讓他們放棄繼續追擊。

利馬·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

cfp_defend_cave_Generic_desc_001.en:
We received a distress call from [LOCATION] saying that they're being robbed by a small group of outlaws. [LOCATION] Though remote, this outpost is a crucial piece of CFP's infrastructure in the area so we need to take it back.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend_cave_Generic_desc_001.tr:
我們收到來自 [LOCATION] 的求救信號，報告稱他們正遭到一小群不法分子的搶劫。[LOCATION] 雖然偏遠，但這個前哨站是繁榮公民在該地區基礎設施的重要組成部分，所以我們需要奪回來。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民


**********  **********
- 卡納 步槍
- 阿蒂麥斯 臂甲
- 阿蒂麥斯 胸甲
- 阿蒂麥斯 腿甲
- 阿蒂麥斯 頭盔
- 卡納 步槍電池 (35 發)

TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad3_Desc.en: Wikelo give deep red and green colors to make ATLS legs look like they cooling from heat. Very pretty.
TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad3_Desc.tr: 維科洛給深紅色和綠色。使 ATLS 的腿看起來像它們從熱中冷卻。非常漂亮。

TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad2_Desc.en: Many Human work place have orange color there. Must mean work to you. This suit does work. Make sense.
TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad2_Desc.tr: 許多人類工作地點有橙色在那裡。對你肯定意味著工作。這套動力服做工作。講得通。

TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad1_Desc.en: Wikelo travel to one Human planet and find very cold, but very pretty. This remind of that.
TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad1_Desc.tr: 維科洛旅行到過一個人類行星。並且發現非常冷。但是非常漂亮。這讓我想起了那個。

cfp_eliminateall_fromCFP_Gen_E_desc_001.en:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available combat operators to [LOCATION]. A group of outlaws have launched an unprovoked attack and our security personnel are desperately in need of support.

Please dispatch to [LOCATION] with all urgency and good luck.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_eliminateall_fromCFP_Gen_E_desc_001.tr:
繁榮公民正在尋找任何有空的戰鬥員前往 [LOCATION] 。一群不法分子發起了毫無理由的攻擊，我們的安全人員迫切需要支援。

請儘快趕往 [LOCATION]，祝你們好運。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民


**********  **********
- 卡納 步槍
- 阿蒂麥斯 胸甲 箭筒
- 阿蒂麥斯 臂甲 箭筒
- 阿蒂麥斯 腿甲 箭筒
- 阿蒂麥斯 頭盔 箭筒
- 卡納 步槍電池 (35 發)

headhunters_defend_xt_desc_001.en:
Those XenoThreat punks launched an attack against [LOCATION] so we're looking for people to go fend them off. 

Get out there and waste every XenoThreat you see.

Stows out.
headhunters_defend_xt_desc_001.tr:
那些異種威脅的朋克們正在襲擊 [LOCATION]，所以我們需要找人去抵禦他們。

出發，把你看到的每一個異種威脅都幹掉。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。


**********  **********
- 尤巴列夫手槍
- 尤巴列夫 “幻影迷彩” 手槍
- 尤巴列夫 “點火器” 手槍
- 揚塵臂甲 戰術
- 揚塵胸甲 戰術
- 揚塵腿甲 戰術
- 揚塵頭盔 戰術
- 尤巴列夫手槍電池 (10發)

headhunters_defendship_MRT_PA_desc_001.en: Some People’s Alliance members with a death wish decided to target one of our ships. Need someone to hustle over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show ‘em what happens when you mess with the Headhunters.\n\nStows out.
headhunters_defendship_MRT_PA_desc_001.tr: 有些人民聯盟的成員想找死，決定襲擊我們的飛船。需要有人趕緊去 ，讓他們知道惹上獵頭幫會有什麼後果。\n\n斯托斯通訊完畢。

blackbox_recover_desc_S_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR547384
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
This request comes down from Head Office. 

We’ve just learned that a recent ship attack near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> might have been the work of a notorious and equally elusive outlaw ringleader. The last time they popped their head above water was years ago, so this is a rare opportunity to catch them. This is an opportunity that our client does not want to pass up. We need a <EM4>top-tier operative</EM4> with elite combat experience to retrieve the blackbox of this downed ship in order to prove the ringleader’s involvement.

<EM4>There will be highly-trained hostiles present on the scene</EM4> who will put up significant resistance to your presence. Eliminate them and complete the mission.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Immediately scramble to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and clear the surrounding airspace in order to secure the blackbox. Once obtained, deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Head Office stresses that this will be an incredibly difficult mission to pull off. Make sure you bring your A-game.

BitZeros_blackbox_S_Desc_001.en:
Got a big job for a big player. We’re in the process of making someone disappear, like completely vanish, and a part of that is recovering the blackbox from the “accident” that they had recently over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.
Only problem is, seems the people this person hired to stage the accident have gotten it in their heads that there’s more money to be made. So much so that they’re still keeping tabs on the now deceased’s ship.
These guys aren’t playing around either. You’ll need a couple of friends to help you do this. But if you can get the blackbox out of there and into our hands by dropping it at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, we can really make it worth your while.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_S_Desc_001.tr:
我們有個大活兒要找個真正的狠角色。我們正在想辦法讓某個人徹底消失，消得一乾二淨，其中一部分就是從那個人最近在  那邊出的“事故”裡把黑匣子撈出來。

問題是——這個人僱來策劃這場事故的傢伙們，現在覺得這事兒能賺更多，乾脆賴在那艘死人飛船旁邊不走了，不肯撒手。

這幫人可不講武德，你最好帶倆幫手，不然分分鐘涼透。但只要你能把黑匣子搞出來，送到 ，咱保證讓你賺得盆滿缽滿。

- 零比特

- 箭頭 狙擊槍
- 飛鳥 臂甲
- 飛鳥 胸甲
- 飛鳥 腿甲
- 飛鳥 頭盔
- 伯勞鳥 胸甲

- 伯勞鳥 腿甲
- 伯勞鳥 頭盔

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_S_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #BR547384
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
這個請求來自總部。

我們剛剛得知，最近在  附近發生的飛船襲擊可能是由一個臭名昭著且難以捉摸的非法分子團伙所為。他們上次露面已經是多年前的事了，所以這是一個難得的機會。我們的客戶不想錯過這個機會。我們需要一名具有精英戰鬥經驗的<EM4>頂級特工</EM4>來回收這艘被擊落飛船的黑匣子，以證明該團伙的參與。

<EM4>現場將有訓練有素的敵對勢力</EM4>，它們會對你的到來進行強烈抵抗。消滅它們並完成任務。

合約調查員的行動：
立即前往 ，清理周圍的空域以確保黑匣子的安全。一旦拿到黑匣子，將其送往 。

補充說明：
總部強調，這將是一個極其艱鉅的任務。一定要全力以赴。

blackbox_recover_desc_M_001.en:
We were a little too smart with this one and it’s kinda backfired. Sometimes you gotta dream big, you know? Anyway. we were looking to move some encrypted data to one of our data havens and decided to hide it in a ship’s blackbox. They filled the ship with “valuable” stuff as a decoy in case it got attacked. The plan worked a little too well and the cargo might have attracted the wrong kind of attention. They stole all the cargo but missed the blackbox. Bad news is the ship is now swarming with outlaws.

The data on that blackbox is useless to them, but we need it. If you can get it back for us, we can give you a nice cut from what we make. Seems like a fair deal, right?

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and after you’ve done your thing take the flight recorder to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_M_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR74382
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A known outlaw attacked and destroyed a ship near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The agency has been contracted to retrieve the ship’s blackbox in order to build a case against them and lobby for Advocacy intervention. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
An operative is needed to head to the crime scene at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, secure the area from any hostiles present to procure the blackbox, and deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be advised that there are still <EM4>hostile forces in the area</EM4> that will attack. These will most likely have some experience fighting, so be prepared. 

This contract has been flagged as a <EM4>combat mission</EM4>.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_M_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #BR74382
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
一夥已知的不法分子在  附近襲擊並摧毀了一艘飛船。事務所已委託你回收該飛船的黑匣子，以便為他們建立案件並爭取督導局的介入。

合約調查員的行動：
需要一名特工前往  的犯罪現場，確保該區域安全，排除任何敵對勢力，然後取回黑匣子並將其送往 。

補充說明：
請注意，該地區仍有<EM4>敵對勢力</EM4>存在，它們可能會有戰鬥經驗，因此要做好準備。

此合約已被標記為<EM4>戰鬥任務</EM4>。

blackbox_recover_desc_E_001.en:
So we were expecting a pretty important package earlier today but turns out the pilot got ghosted and they ripped the tracking chip from it and got away. Pretty clever right? Not really, because they forgot to take the flight recorder too.

Get the blackbox from the wreck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. We’ll send you the creds when you’re done.

Oh and watch out for scavs, people are pretty desperate these days, even if it just some busted courier ship.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_E_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR83215
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Client hired the agency to look into the destruction of one of their ships near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They are claiming that the ship was destroyed by an ex-partner and need the blackbox to prove it.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Dispatch to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate the derelict ship. Secure the area from any hostiles. Retrieve the blackbox and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Whoever destroyed the ship could still be in the area so be prepared for a fight, as such this has been flagged as a <EM4>combat mission</EM4>.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_E_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #BR83215
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
客戶聘請了事務所調查他們的船隻在  附近被毀的事件。他們聲稱是前合作伙伴所為，並需要黑匣子來證明這一點。

合約調查員的行動：
前往  找到那艘失事的船隻。確保該區域安全，防止任何敵對勢力的入侵。取回黑匣子並送達 。

補充說明：
毀船的人可能仍在附近，因此要做好戰鬥準備，因此此合約已被標記為<EM4>戰鬥任務</EM4>。

BitZeros_blackbox_E_Desc_001.en:
So we were expecting a pretty important package earlier today but turns out the pilot got ghosted and they ripped the tracking chip from it and got away. Pretty clever right? Not really, because they forgot to take the flight recorder too.

Get the blackbox from the wreck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. We’ll send you the creds when you’re done.

Oh and watch out for scavs, people are pretty desperate these days, even if it just some busted courier ship.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_E_Desc_001.tr:
今天早些時候我們本該收到一個挺重要的包裹，結果飛行員直接跑路了，還把追蹤晶片給撬了，挺機靈是吧？其實沒那麼聰明，因為他們忘了把飛行記錄儀一塊兒帶走。

去  的殘骸裡把黑匣子撈出來，然後送到 ，你幹完活兒我們立馬把酬金髮你。

對了，小心點垃圾佬，現在這年頭大家都快餓瘋了，哪怕只是艘報廢的快遞船，也有人敢下手。

- 零比特

blackbox_recover_desc_VH_001.en:
I’m not gonna give you the whole backstory of what this person has done to us, but all you need to know is that some scumbag is trying to get a payout for a ship crash and the insurance company wants to see the blackbox recording to make sure everything is “above board”.

We’re not gonna let that happen though.

Snatch that blackbox at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bring it to us instead so we can do some “creative editing” on the recording.

Apparently, this area is a bit of a hot zone. Probably why they staged the accident there. You should probably bring some backup so you don’t get ghosted before you can bring the blackbox to us at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros
blackbox_recover_desc_VH_001.tr:
I’m not gonna give you the whole backstory of what this person has done to us, but all you need to know is that some scumbag is trying to get a payout for a ship crash and the insurance company wants to see the blackbox recording to make sure everything is “above board”.

We’re not gonna let that happen though.

Snatch that blackbox at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bring it to us instead so we can do some “creative editing” on the recording.

Apparently, this area is a bit of a hot zone. Probably why they staged the accident there. You should probably bring some backup so you don’t get ghosted before you can bring the blackbox to us at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VH_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR23665
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Operative with <EM4>extensive combat experience</EM4> needed to retrieve a <EM4>blackbox</EM4> from a compromised ship at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Client hasn’t specified why they need it but are paying good money to have it back. 

Analysis of the wreck indicates that there are some serious hostiles in the area, so any attempt to retrieve will likely require a fight. Our records indicate that these hostiles are highly trained and aggressive, so prepare accordingly.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Route to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and secure the blacbox by any means necessary. Once obtained, deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for payment.

Additional Notes:
Operations wanted to reiterate that this will be a <EM4>heavy combat mission</EM4> so make sure you bring allies or equipment to handle it.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VH_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #BR23665
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
需要一名具有<EM4>豐富戰鬥經驗</EM4>的特工從  的一艘受損飛船中取出黑匣子。客戶沒有說明他們為何需要這個黑匣子，但他們願意支付豐厚的報酬來取回它。

對殘骸的分析表明，該地區有一些危險的敵對勢力，因此任何取回黑匣子的嘗試都可能引發戰鬥。我們的記錄顯示這些敵對勢力訓練有素且具有攻擊性，所以請做好相應準備。

合約調查員的行動：
前往 ，想盡一切辦法確保黑匣子的安全。一旦拿到黑匣子，將其送到  以獲取報酬。

補充說明：
運營部門再次強調，這將是一次<EM4>高強度戰鬥任務</EM4>，請確保帶上盟友或相應的裝備來應對。

BitZeros_blackbox_VH_Desc_001.en:
I’m not gonna give you the whole backstory of what this person has done to us, but all you need to know is that some scumbag is trying to get a payout for a ship crash and the insurance company wants to see the blackbox recording to make sure everything is “above board”.

We’re not gonna let that happen though.

Snatch that blackbox at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bring it to us instead so we can do some “creative editing” on the recording.

Apparently, this area is a bit of a hot zone. Probably why they staged the accident there. You should probably bring some backup so you don’t get ghosted before you can bring the blackbox to us at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_VH_Desc_001.tr:
我就不跟你說這王八蛋對咱們幹過啥了，反正關鍵是這個混蛋想通過飛船墜毀去騙保，保險公司想看黑匣子錄像來確認一切是不是“光明正大”的。

我們肯定不能讓這事兒發生。

去  把黑匣子搶出來，給我們送到這兒來，我們好對錄像做點“創意編輯”。

話說這片區域有點危險，估計也是他們選這兒策劃事故的原因。你最好帶上幾個幫手，別還沒把黑匣子運到  給咱們就被人整沒了。

- 零比特

blackbox_recover_desc_VE_001.en:
Someone of interest to us recently kicked the bucket (not our fault) over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and we’re pretty curious what happened. We need you to grab the blackbox from the ship and drop it off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This is a shipwreck by the way, so chances are some scavs will be around there too. But don’t worry, that’s been factored into your pay too.

-Bit Zeros
