Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VE_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR56263
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to extract the blackbox from a destroyed ship. The ship’s owner claims that it was genuinely lost in an outlaw attack, but the insurance company has doubts. We’ve been hired to find out which is true.

I suspect that the perpetrators are long gone by now, so you shouldn't run into any resistance.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Proceed to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, secure the black box in the derelict spaceship there and return it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
You will need to EVA for this one so make sure you got a suit.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VE_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #BR56263
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
需要一名特工從一艘被摧毀的飛船中提取黑匣子。飛船的所有者聲稱黑匣子確實是在一次非法分子的襲擊中遺失的，但保險公司對此表示懷疑。我們受僱來查明真相。

我懷疑作案者早就逃走了，所以你應該不會遇到任何抵抗。

合約調查員的行動：
前往 ，在廢棄的飛船中找到黑匣子，並將其帶回 。

補充說明：
這次任務你需要進行艙外活動，所以一定要穿上宇航服。

BitZeros_blackbox_VE_Desc_001.en:
Someone of interest to us recently kicked the bucket (not our fault) over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and we’re pretty curious what happened. We need you to grab the blackbox from the ship and drop it off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This is a shipwreck by the way, so chances are some scavs will be around there too. But don’t worry, that’s been factored into your pay too.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_VE_Desc_001.tr:
有個我們關注的人最近在  那兒掛了（不是咱們乾的），我們得搞清楚怎麼回事。你去把飛船上的黑匣子拿出來，送到  就行。

順便說一下，那是個沉船現場，估計會有垃圾佬在那兒轉悠。不過別擔心，咱們已經把這筆麻煩錢加到你的工資裡了。

- 零比特

blackbox_recover_desc_H_001.en:
Don’t know if you’ve heard, but there’s a bunch of ships over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> surrounding a burnt-out ship. You curious why? I know we are.
Think you can get in that wreck, grab the blackbox, and get out? We’ll pay you for it.

Based on the number of sketchy ships in the area, you should bring some friends with to watch your ass, unless you’re some crazy solo act, but we’d prefer if you actually survived this so you can drop off the blackbox at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for us. 

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_H_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR744152
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Contract’s come through to look into a recent attack near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Client claims that they were ambushed by a serious outlaw pack and need the proof. An operative with <EM4>significant combat experience</EM4> is needed to fly to scene and retrieve blackbox.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Find site of derelict ship at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, secure the blackbox, and deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Expect heavy resistance from outlaws present on the scene. As such, this has been flagged as a <EM4>combat mission</EM4>.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_H_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #BR744152
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
收到合約，要求調查最近在  附近發生的襲擊事件。客戶聲稱他們遭到了一個危險的不法分子團伙的伏擊，需要證據。需要一名具有<EM4>豐富戰鬥經驗</EM4>的特工飛往現場取回黑匣子。

合約調查員的行動：
找到位於  處失事船隻的位置，確保黑匣子的安全，並將其送至 。

補充說明：
預計現場會有不法分子強烈抵抗，因此此合約已被標記為<EM4>戰鬥任務</EM4>。

BitZeros_blackbox_H_Desc_001.en:
Don’t know if you’ve heard, but there’s a bunch of ships over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> surrounding a burnt-out ship. You curious why? I know we are.
Think you can get in that wreck, grab the blackbox, and get out? We’ll pay you for it.

Based on the number of sketchy ships in the area, you should bring some friends with to watch your ass, unless you’re some crazy solo act, but we’d prefer if you actually survived this so you can drop off the blackbox at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for us. 

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_H_Desc_001.tr:
你聽說沒？ 那兒一堆船圍著艘燒得只剩架子的飛船，知道為啥不？我們可好奇死了。你能不能溜進那堆廢鐵裡，找到黑匣子再溜出來？事成之後我們付錢。

這地方到處都是不靠譜的傢伙，你最好帶幾個幫手盯著後背，除非你真打算一個人單幹——但咱還是希望你能活下來，好把黑匣子送到  這兒來。

不過嘛，咋幹你說了算，只要事兒能辦成。

- 零比特

recovery_desc.en:
If you want something done right, you gotta do it yourself. That's what they say, right? Wish I had the time for that, but I have a business to run.

Some of our goods have been mislaid and I need a contractor to put this right for me. Got some info that the guys at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ghosted one of my gang and got their hands on our gear. I need you to grab the stuff, deal with anyone at the location and take it to the drop-off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me. Get it done and I'll sort out your payment.

-Twitch
recovery_desc.tr:
If you want something done right, you gotta do it yourself. That's what they say, right? Wish I had the time for that, but I have a business to run.

Some of our goods have been mislaid and I need a contractor to put this right for me. Got some info that the guys at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ghosted one of my gang and got their hands on our gear. I need you to grab the stuff, deal with anyone at the location and take it to the drop-off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me. Get it done and I'll sort out your payment.

-Twitch

BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.en:
Managed to hunt down a rare piece of tech only for it to get snagged by someone right at the last second. Tracking it isn't exactly hard, but I'd rather not keeping chasing this thing.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and get it back for us. The people over there probably don't even know what it is, so let's do them a favor and take it off their hands. No idea if it's being guarded, so up to you how you wanna deal with any potential threats.

Once you've got it, take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and then we'll send over the creds.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.tr:
好不容易追蹤到一件稀有的科技裝備，結果就在最後一刻被別人搶走了。追蹤它倒不算難，但我實在不想一直追著這東西跑。

去 <EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4> 把它拿回來。那邊的傢伙八成連這玩意兒是什麼都不知道，不如幫個忙，把它從他們手裡拿走。不知道有沒有人看守，所以遇到潛在威脅時怎麼處理全憑你自己。

拿到手後，把它送到<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>，我們會把報酬轉給你。

-零位元

BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.en:
If you're looking to make some primo creds then we've got a job for you. Someone stole a piece of tech from one of our transporters and is trying to sell it back to us.

The nullbrain didn't even realize we were tracing their comms when they comm'd us up trying to extort us. Now all you have to do is go to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, grab the tech, and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. We don't know what the situation is over there so maybe bring a weapon or two with you. Could be fine though.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.tr:
如果你想賺點大錢，我們正好有個活兒給你。有人從我們的運輸船上偷走了一件科技裝備，現在正試圖把它賣回給我們。

那個蠢貨聯絡我們勒索時，甚至沒意識到我們正在追蹤他的通訊。現在你只需前往<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>，取回那件裝置，然後將其送往<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>。我們不清楚那邊的具體情況，所以最好帶上一兩件武器以防萬一。不過，說不定一切都會很順利。

-零位元

BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.en: We need someone to head over <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and find a piece of tech for us. You don't need to know what the tech is/who it belongs to/why we need it, all you have to do is take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll get you paid. There could be people protecting it, but that's kind of your problem.\n\n-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.tr: 我們需要有人前往 ，幫我們找一件科技裝備。你不需要知道那是什麼裝置、歸誰所有，也不用知道我們為什麼需要它，你只需要把它帶到 ，我們就會付錢給你。可能會有人在看守它，但那算是你的問題。\n\n-零位元

DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.en:
If you want something done right, you gotta do it yourself. That's what they say, right? Wish I had the time for that, but I have a business to run.

Some of our goods have been mislaid and I need a contractor to put this right for me. Got some info that the guys at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ghosted one of my gang and got their hands on our gear. I need you to grab the stuff, deal with anyone at the location and take it to the drop-off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me. Get it done and I'll sort out your payment.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.tr:
想把事情辦妥，就得親力親為。大家都是這麼說的，對吧？真希望我有時間親自處理，但我得打理生意。

我們的一些貨物遺失了，我需要找個承包商幫我解決這個問題。我得到訊息，<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>那幫人把我的一個手下搞消失了，還順手拿走了我們的裝備。我要你把那些東西找回來，處理掉現場的所有人，然後把裝備送到<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>的交貨點。辦妥之後，我會給你報酬。

-“刺痛”

DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.en:
Plan is to start expanding our operations in Nyx and step one is to control the supply line. If the other gangs in this system know what's good for them they'll stay out of our way.

Got word that one of our competitors is stashing some gear over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and I need you to grab it for me. When you're done, take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and don't be afraid to deal with anyone that gets in your way.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.tr:
我們計劃開始在尼克斯擴大我們的業務了，第一步是控制供應鏈。如果這個星系裡的其他幫派知道什麼對他們有利，他們就會避開我們。

聽說我們的一個競爭對手正在<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>那裡囤積物資，我要你幫我把那些東西搞過來。搞定後，把物資運到<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>，遇到擋路的人，別客氣，直接解決掉。

-“刺痛”

DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.en:
One of my crew was supposed to be picking up some goods at a dead drop just outside Levski, but they ended up coming back to me with their tail between their legs empty handed.

Anyway, long story short, turns out it all got a bit messy and some other gang ended up getting a hold of our gear and taking it to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We can't afford to let perfectly good merchandise slip away like that, so you're gonna head over there and get it back for us. Once you've done that, take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll get you paid.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.tr:
我手下的一名成員本該去萊夫斯基郊外的一個秘密交貨點取貨，結果卻灰溜溜地空手回來了。

總之，長話短說，事情搞得有點亂，結果被另一個幫派搶走了我們的貨物，並把它們帶到了<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>。我們可不能眼睜睜看著好貨就這樣溜走，所以你得過去把貨追回來。辦妥之後，把貨送到<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>，我會給你報酬。

-“刺痛”

Headhunters_defend_XT_VH_desc_001.en:
XenoThreat are on the warpath right now. They’ve launched simultaneous attacks on several Headhunters sites and stretched our fighters thin. Got word they’re planning to storm [LOCATION] next, and we can’t get anyone there to defend it. 

I’m looking to pay someone to pull together a crew, gather supplies, and mount a strong defense for us. Gonna be honest with you, this is shaping up to be a hell of a fight. Xenos are sending some of their most experienced forces there. Not much else I can say except that they’ll probably stagger the arrival of their forces, wipe them all out and you’ll be paid handsomely. 

Think you can rise to the occasion?  

-Stows
Headhunters_defend_XT_VH_desc_001.tr:
異種威脅現在正處於戰爭狀態，他們正同時對好幾個獵頭幫站點發動攻擊，把我們的戰士們逼得筋疲力盡。我得到消息，他們計劃下一個突襲 [LOCATION]，而我們找不到人來保衛它。

我想僱個人來著急一群人，準備好補給，為我們建立一個強大的防禦力量。實話跟你說，這會是一場激烈的戰鬥。異種們派了一些最有經驗的部隊過去。我只能說他們可能會錯開他們的部隊，把他們全部殲滅，你會得到豐厚的報酬。

你覺得你能應對的了嗎？

- 斯托斯


**********  **********
- 阿茲卡夫 狙擊步槍
- 阿茲卡夫 “點火器” 狙擊步槍
- 阿茲卡夫 “幻影迷彩” 狙擊步槍
- 棉布臂甲 戰術
- 棉布胸甲 戰術
- 棉布腿甲 戰術
- 棉布頭盔 戰術
- 阿茲卡夫狙擊步槍電池 (8發)

headhunters_bombingrun_M_CFP_desc_001.en:
I'm getting pretty bloody sick of Citizens for Prosperity sticking their noses where they don't belong. 

Started thinking that it might be pretty nice to ground their fleet for a little bit. We blow up their fuel tanks at [LOCATION] and those little pissheads won't be going nowhere quick.

Sound like your kinda thing?

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_M_CFP_desc_001.tr:
我對繁榮公民插手不該管的事感到非常厭煩。

我開始覺得讓他們的艦隊暫時趴一陣子可能會不錯。讓我們在 [LOCATION] 炸掉他們的燃料罐，這些小傢伙就不會輕易動了。

這聽起來像是你喜歡的事嗎？

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

headhunters_bombingrun_H_XT_desc_001.en:
It seems that XenoThreat has gotten the same intel we did and are looking to pull off the same job as us. 

I want you to knock the competition out of the picture. Go to [LOCATION] and take out the fuel tanks they got there.

Then my people can finish up without worrying about XenoThreat crashing the party.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_H_XT_desc_001.tr:
似乎異種威脅也得到了和我們一樣的情報，想要乾和我們一樣的活。

我想讓你把競爭對手清除掉。去 [LOCATION] 摧毀他們那裡的燃料罐。

這樣我的人就能毫無顧慮地完成任務，不用擔心異種威脅來搗亂。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_nocivs_des.en:
Hey, 

Got a contract for you that requires a bit more tactics than usual. A high-level criminal by the name [TARGET] is hiding with a large contingent of outlaws at [LOCATION]. 

Our intel suggests that [TARGET]’s forces most likely will act as defensive line in order to protect their boss. My best guess is that you will have to deal with them before you gain access to [TARGET].

That said, I don’t want you shooting indiscriminately. Sometimes these outlaws keep civilians around and they should be treated like non-combatants.

Best of luck,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_nocivs_des.tr:
嘿，

有一份需要比平時更多策略的合約。一個叫做 [TARGET] 的高等級罪犯正與大量非法分子躲藏在 [LOCATION]。

我們的情報顯示出 [TARGET] 的手下很可能是為了保護他們的老闆而集結的。我猜你必須先解決掉他們才能找到 [TARGET]。

話雖如此，我並不希望你進行無差別攻擊。有時這些法外之徒身邊會有一些平民，應該把他們當作非戰鬥人員。

祝你好運

佈雷登·科查多
後勤官員 - 斯坦頓分部
北境之巖服務團隊

northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_desc_001.en:
Hey, 

Have an interesting bounty for you. A high level criminal by the name [TARGET] has been located at [LOCATION]. 

Based on our intel, its highly unlikely that the target’s going to be sitting and waiting out in the open. You most likely will have to infiltrate the facility and draw them out. 

Something like a large firefight should be enough to do the trick. 

Best of luck,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_desc_001.tr:
嘿，

這裡有份有趣的合約，一個叫做 [TARGET] 的高等級罪犯已經被定位藏在 [LOCATION]。

根據我們的情報，目標在開闊地區坐以待斃的可能性極低。你很有可能需要滲透進入設施內將他們引誘出來。

來一場大型槍戰或許就能辦到了。

祝你好運

佈雷登·科查多
後勤官員 - 斯坦頓分部

headhunters_defendship_multi_HRT_PA_desc.en:
Sent ships to investigate a distress beacon only for it to turn into an ambush by the People’s Alliance. They’ve been fighting like hell to get away but can’t seem to extract themselves.

Let’s get ‘em some help on the double. Think you can go on over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to give ‘em some support?

-Stows
headhunters_defendship_multi_HRT_PA_desc.tr:
我們派了飛船去調查一個求救信號，結果卻遭遇了人民聯盟的埋伏。他們拼命戰鬥想要逃脫，但似乎還是沒能脫身。

我們得趕緊給他們派些支援。你覺得你能去  給他們提供一些幫助嗎？

-斯托斯

TheCollector_Ships_Scorpius_Desc.en: Don't know what the name mean, but ship is very fast, very good in fight. With tweak, can better. You see list of what Wikelo need, go get and I make. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Scorpius_Desc.tr: 不知道這個名字是什麼意思。但船很快。很擅長戰鬥。有了調整。才能更好。你看到了維科洛需要的東西。拿過來。我來做。再見。

Covalex_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.en:
Hi,

Here's the situation. After spending an hour on comms talking to the hauler, trying to help them diagnose what's wrong with their ship, it's been decided that we now need to get someone to head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and complete the delivery.

This is a pretty big one. You'll need a ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and unless you're super strong a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to shift it all.

I would really appreciate if we could just get this one done. Take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we can put this all behind us.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.tr:
嗨，

情況是這樣的，我跟那個承包商打了一小時通訊，幫他排查飛船故障，最後實在搞不定，只能換人上。現在得趕緊派你去  那兒幫忙完成交付。

這單不小，你得開艘能裝得下  的貨運電梯那裡去，這樣這事兒就算翻篇了。


艾拉·蒂埃諾
初級物流協調員
科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”


科瓦萊什貨運是一家有限責任公司，為鼓勵及時交付和防止貨運欺詐，科瓦萊什貨運將設定交貨時間限制。到期後，任何未交付的貨物將被視為被盜。總酬金將會根據貨物成功交付的百分比按比例支付。

cfp_defend_regionshift_desc_001.en:
We've received a distress call from [LOCATION]. A group of unknown assailants have launched an attack. There have been multiple deaths reported and we need to reclaim the outpost.

I know this is far from your current position, but we're desperate to secure the area and get the outpost back and running again.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend_regionshift_desc_001.tr:
我們收到了來自 [LOCATION] 的求救信號。一群身份不明的襲擊者發起了攻擊，已經報告了多起死亡事件，我們需要奪回這個前哨站。

我知道這離你現在的位置很遠，但我們迫切希望能確保該地區的安全，恢復前哨站的運轉。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_XTAttack_VH.en:
Although Citizens for Prosperity is committed to change through non-violent means, it's become apparent that exceptions might have to be made. CFP safe zones near [LOCATION] were recently and violently taken by XenoThreat forces under the command of [TARGET].

We're looking for any available combat operatives to help take these outposts back. This will undoubtedly be a difficult endeavor as XenoThreat are highly trained and eager to fight, so you should prepare accordingly.

Aside from clearing each cluster of XenoThreat forces, you will need to take out [TARGET], who's loss will certainly make the system safer.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_XTAttack_VH.tr:
雖然繁榮公民致力於通過非暴力手段實現變革，但顯然可能需要做出例外。位於 [LOCATION] 附近的繁榮公民安全區最近被異種威脅部隊在 [TARGET] 的指揮下暴力奪取。

我們正在尋找任何有空的作戰人員來幫助奪回這些前哨站。這無疑將是一項艱鉅的任務，因為異種威脅部隊訓練有素且渴望戰鬥，所以你應該做好相應的準備。

除了清理每個集群的異種威脅部隊之外，你還需要解決 [TARGET]，他的失去無疑會讓星系更加安全。

祝你好運。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民


**********  **********

- 阿蒂麥斯 臂甲（改）

mg_miles_capturegang_desc_006.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ME-01

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Maltrox Arlington has been keeping a low profile recently, but we think he's come out of hiding. A patrol was refueling at a station when one of their ships was boosted. Maltrox is the most likely suspect. While the regtag was temporarily deactivated, we have been able to trace the ship’s quantum signature and have provided you those coordinates.

A third generation criminal, the Arlington gang has been under Maltrox’s leadership for the past six years. Be aware, this is a smart, aggressive, and very dangerous target. The more resources you can bring to bear, the more likely it is that we can bring Maltrox in one and for all. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
mg_miles_capturegang_desc_006.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 差事

合約類型：集體逮捕令
合約狀態：獨立
授權程式碼 = [CONTRACTOR]

需要立即處理

*********
__背景資訊__
臭名昭著的阿靈頓幫居然試圖從一個修船廠中盜竊一艘伊德里斯級護衛艦，作為回應，他們每個人都在這一份集體逮捕令中。這次盜竊被阻止了，那群渣滓落荒而逃，分開躲進了黑暗中。到底是無膽鼠輩，大難臨頭各自飛。埃克哈特安保收到了一份對阿靈頓幫高級成員的即時賞金逮捕令。成員包括：馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓，卡斯·登特，尼克斯·坎特威爾，薩姆“愛哭鬼”阿靈頓，奧斯陸·阿靈頓和萊斯·阿靈頓。
*********

馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓近來十分低調，但道高一丈，我們還是發現了他的蛛絲馬跡並定位了一處可能是其藏身處的座標。近日，一艘巡邏隊艦船被盜竊，事發時該巡邏艦正隨其所屬巡邏隊在一個燃料補給站補充燃料。馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓是該案件最大的嫌疑人。該巡邏艦註冊的可追蹤標籤被臨時停用了，但通過分析並追蹤艦船的量子特徵，我們得出了該艦目前的座標。

馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓出生於一個犯罪之家。這個家族三代人都以犯罪為生。這六年來，馬爾特克斯一直作為阿靈頓幫領袖活動著。當心。馬爾特克斯是一個不好搞定的目標。他陰險，聰明，而且交戰手段通常十分激進。此行動有很大可能會演變成一場持久戰。帶上你所能承擔得起的一切補給，無論是彈藥還是醫用品，能帶多少帶多少。把馬爾特克斯一勞永逸的幹掉，給他的罪惡一生畫上句號。

你被授權使用任何必要的火力，槍炮刀劍都無所謂，把他幹掉。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

mg_miles_capturegang_desc_005.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ME-01

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Two bank guards were reported missing last week. A few hours ago, their bodies turned up in a trash heap in Magnus with their biometrics stolen. Thankfully, a nearby dumpling cart had a security camera that captured the corpses being dropped. Facial recognition was able to ID one Kass Dent, romantic partner to Maltrox Arlington and parent of Les Arlington. Using the vid to construct a timeline, we have provided the coordinates of where Kass is currently believed to be hiding. 

Kass is suspected of a long list of murders, with these two only being the most recent. We recommend only bringing highly skilled wingman to try and keep the casualty count at a minimum.  

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
mg_miles_capturegang_desc_005.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 差事

合約型別：集體逮捕令
合約狀態：獨立
授權程式碼 = [CONTRACTOR]

需要立即處理

*********
__背景資訊__
臭名昭著的阿靈頓幫居然試圖從一個修船廠中盜竊一艘伊德里斯級護衛艦，作為回應，他們每個人都在這一份集體逮捕令中。這次盜竊被阻止了，那群渣滓落荒而逃，分散躲進了黑暗中。皆是無膽鼠輩，大難臨頭各自飛。埃克哈特安保收到了一份對阿靈頓幫高階成員的即時賞金逮捕令。成員包括：馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓，卡斯·登特，尼克斯·坎特威爾，薩姆“愛哭鬼”阿靈頓，奧斯陸·阿靈頓和萊斯·阿靈頓。
*********

上禮拜，有兩名銀行守衛失蹤。幾小時前，有人在馬格努斯的一個垃圾堆裡發現了他們的屍體。屍體完整，但是他們的生物特徵證件被竊取了。幸運的是，附近的餃子車上有一個攝影頭記錄下了拋屍的全過程。經過面部識別調查後，我們鎖定了拋屍者：卡斯·登特。此人與阿靈頓幫首領馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓的關係十分曖昧，且是萊斯·阿靈頓的母親。我們根據影像重建了目標拋屍的時間軸。根據時間軸，我們推測出了卡斯當前隱藏的座標。

 不止此次拋屍，卡斯還涉嫌參與一長串的謀殺案件，其中有兩件是最近發生的我們建議你攜帶一名或多名訓練有素的助手與目標交鋒以避免可能的傷亡。

你被授權使用任何必要的火力，槍炮刀劍都無所謂，把他幹掉。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

該合約不可轉讓。

__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell,  Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

An anonymous comm has tipped us off that Les Arlington, child of gang leader Maltrox Arlington, had been spotted picking up a delivery at a Covalex transfer center. We will provide you with the coordinates of where we believe their current whereabouts are.

Les is an experienced pilot who has been flying for almost as long as they’ve been walking and usually serves as the gang’s get-away pilot. It may be worthwhile to bring extra support ships in order to cut off any attempts at escape.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target.

埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 差事

合約類型：集體逮捕令
合約狀態：獨立
授權程式碼 = [CONTRACTOR]

需要立即處理

*********
__背景資訊__
臭名昭著的阿靈頓幫居然試圖從一個修船廠中盜竊一艘伊德里斯級護衛艦，相應的，他們每個人都在這份集體逮捕令中。這次盜竊被阻止了，那群渣滓也落荒而逃，分散躲進了黑暗中。無膽鼠輩，大難臨頭各自飛。埃克哈特安保收到了一份對阿靈頓幫高級成員的即時賞金逮捕令。成員包括：馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓，卡斯·登特，尼克斯·坎特威爾，薩姆“愛哭鬼”阿靈頓，奧斯陸·阿靈頓和萊斯·阿靈頓。
*********

我們的一個匿名線人告訴我們，阿靈頓幫的領導人，馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓 的孩子，萊斯·阿靈頓，被發現在一個科瓦萊什轉運中心取快遞。我們將為您提供我們認為他們現在所在位置的的座標。

萊斯是一位經驗十分豐富的飛行員，據說他的飛行時間比他出生到現在走路的時間還多，因此他通常都是該犯罪組織的撤離飛行員。可能有必要組織一艘額外的支援艦船以防止目標可能的逃脫行為。

你被授權使用任何必要的火力，槍炮刀劍都無所謂，把目標幹掉。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

該合約不可轉讓。

While we we’re unable to positively confirm if the terminal was hacked by Oslo or not, we feel it is worth investigating.

Extremely intelligent, tech savvy and a renowned strategist, Oslo has proven difficult to capture in the past. If this lead does result in finding Oslo, a well coordinated tactical strike team would be advantageous to a successful engagement.

__背景資訊__
臭名昭著的阿靈頓幫居然試圖從一個修船廠中盜竊一艘伊德里斯級護衛艦，作為回應，他們每個人都在這一份集體逮捕令中。這次盜竊被阻止了，那群渣滓落荒而逃，分開躲進了黑暗中。皆是是無膽鼠輩，大難臨頭各自飛。埃克哈特安保收到了一份對阿靈頓幫高級成員的即時賞金逮捕令。成員包括：馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓，卡斯·登特，尼克斯·坎特威爾，薩姆“愛哭鬼”阿靈頓，奧斯陸·阿靈頓和萊斯·阿靈頓。
*********

我們最近得知，有人使用一組自訂加密密鑰非法破解並訪問了一個安全終端，而這組自訂密鑰在去年曾經被阿靈頓幫領導人馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓的一個名為奧斯陸·阿靈頓的“年輕有為”的小弟用於一次搶劫活動中。儘管這次入侵可能並不是奧斯陸本人所為，但這次非法訪問仍然值得我們調查。

 儘管是個惡棍，但不得不承認，奧斯陸的確十分有才。他極其聰明，精通各種現金技術的使用且善於編寫程式碼。過去幾次對他的抓捕行動都以失敗告終。如果這次入侵的確是奧斯陸本人所為，那麼我們建議你組織一隊裝備精良且訓練有素的小隊對目標進行突擊，速戰速決，免得這傢伙又跑了。

你被授權使用任何必要的火力，槍炮刀劍都無所謂，把他幹掉。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

Weepy is gang leader Maltrox Arlington’s uncle and main enforcer. His anger issues combined with a long history of substance abuse make him a true wildcard. Expect him to put up significant resistance when cornered by you and your mustered forces.

*********
__背景資訊__
臭名昭著的阿靈頓幫居然試圖從一個修船廠中盜竊一艘伊德里斯級護衛艦，作為回應，他們每個人都在這一份集體逮捕令中。這次盜竊被阻止了，那群渣滓落荒而逃，分開躲進了黑暗中。到底是無膽鼠輩，大難臨頭各自飛。埃克哈特安保收到了一份對阿靈頓幫高級成員的即時賞金逮捕令。成員包括：馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓，卡斯·登特，尼克斯·坎特威爾，薩姆“愛哭鬼”阿靈頓，奧斯陸·阿靈頓和萊斯·阿靈頓。
*********

薩姆“愛哭鬼”阿靈頓最近被捲進了一場酒後鬥毆。很巧的是，這次鬥毆後他被自動安保系統標記並彙報了。彙報顯示他在一個休息&放鬆空間站裡。這愛哭鬼挺精的，空間站反應小組到來之前他一定已經把所有他來過的痕跡清理過了。但他肯定沒想到我們找到了某種方式來追蹤他。

薩姆是阿靈頓幫領袖馬爾特克斯·阿靈頓的侄子與主要的打手之一。雖然名字裡有“愛哭鬼”，但是易怒症與長期的成癮性藥物濫用經歷相結合，使他成為了真正的性格飄忽不定的人物。別指望他會放棄抵抗，就算你召集了一支軍隊並把他圍困也不見得能讓他自己投降。

你被授權使用任何必要的火力，槍炮刀劍都無所謂，把他幹掉。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

Foxwell_EliminateAll_NonHostiles_desc_00.en:
We’ve been contracted to take care of a delicate situation. A gang has settled into <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that we need to get cleared out. Only issue is that there’s still some civilians there too. 

Looking for someone with the skills and good trigger sense to get rid of those outlaws without harming any innocent people. If that’s you, grab your gear and get over there. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateAll_NonHostiles_desc_00.tr:
我們被委託處理一個棘手的情況。一個幫派已經在  安營紮寨，我們需要將他們清除。唯一的問題是那裡還有一些平民。

我們在尋找具備相應技能和良好判斷力的人，能夠在不傷害無辜者的情況下清除這些不法分子。如果你符合條件，帶上你的裝備，趕快過去。

馬庫斯·克倫
福克斯韋爾安保
“安全，盡在掌握”

福克斯韋爾安保是一家獲得 UEE 全境執業許可的擔保安全專家公司。我們始終歡迎新的幹員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的任何人對此感興趣，請與我們的合約代表聯繫。


**********  **********
- 安騰 臂甲 慄紅
- 安騰 胸甲 慄紅
- 安騰 腿甲 慄紅
- 安騰 頭盔 慄紅
- 安騰 頭盔 苔蘚迷彩
- 安騰 臂甲 苔蘚迷彩
- 安騰 胸甲 苔蘚迷彩
- 安騰 腿甲 苔蘚迷彩

LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_Intro_desc.en:
Hi,  
 
This is Petra Ling, and I’m proud to offer you a new and exciting opportunity to partner with Ling Family Hauling. When my parents started this company, their goal was to provide fast and reliable courier deliveries around the greater Crusader area. It quickly became a success, and as our reputation grew, so did our operations.  
 
Now, under my stewardship, Ling Family Hauling is taking the next big step – cargo hauling. Demand for this new service is growing faster than I expected, and that’s great news for both of us.   
 
If you’ve ever wanted to be a hauler, then I can make your dreams come true. Best way to learn something is by doing it, and I’ve got a haul of <EM4>[ITEM]</EM4> that needs to go from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.  

No prior experience is necessary, but here’s a few things to keep in mind. All pick-ups and deliveries must be done at a freight elevator or autoloaded. You will need a ship that can hold <EM4>2 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move them around. 
 
Upon successful completion of this delivery, you will be promoted to a ‘trusted contractor’ status and more hauls will become available to you.     

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling 

 

 

 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_Intro_desc.tr:
嗨，

我是佩特拉·玲，很榮幸能為你提供與玲家快遞合作的新機會。我爸媽當初開這家公司，就是想在十字軍這一帶做又快又穩的快遞服務，結果一炮而紅，名氣越大，生意也越做越大。

現在，在我的管理下，玲家快遞即將邁出新的重要一步——開展貨運業務。這項新服務的需求增長速度超出了我的預期，這對我們雙方來說都是好消息。

如果你一直想從事貨運行業，那麼這個機會能幫你實現夢想。實踐是最好的學習方式，我正好有一單  需要從  運到 。

雖然不需要有相關經驗，但有以下幾點需要注意：所有提貨和交付都必須通過貨運電梯完成，或者使用自動裝載。你需要有一艘能裝得下最大  **********
- 幽魂pectre [量子 S1 隱形 A]
- 和風ephyr [量子 S1 隱形 B]
- 雷電olt [量子 S2 隱形 B]
- 刺針picule [量子 S2 隱形 A]
- 守衛uardian [護盾 S1 工業 B]
- 要塞itadel [護盾 S2 工業 B]
- 外堡arbican [護盾 S3 工業 B]

LingFamily_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_.en:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>2 SCU</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_.tr:
嗨，

 那幫人估計是準備要開派對了，急著把東西湊齊。你得跑好幾個地方提貨，其中一個還得去尼克斯拿點“金克斯金酒”——你沒喝過吧？那可是尼克斯的招牌，有人嫌它粉嘟嘟地發光，但我超愛，就愛喝那一口獨特的勁道。

以下是取貨地點：

取貨地點（任意順序）


別忘了帶上<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>，集裝箱最大能到  **********
- 幽魂pectre [量子 S1 隱形 A]

Headhunters_HaulCargo_AToB_OLP_Illegal_d.en:
Need someone to snag some cargo for us. We were using an old Hathor PAF for dead drops, but a local gang has dug in and we can’t get our shit.

If you feel like kicking some ass, grab the cargo from the freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

From what I’ve heard this place is full of all sorts. Won’t be easy getting out stuff back, but that’s what we’re paying you for.

Just make sure you got a ship that can handle a <EM4>32 SCU</EM4> load, and try not to get shot in the process. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_HaulCargo_AToB_OLP_Illegal_d.tr:
需要有人幫我們拿些貨物。我們之前在一個老舊的哈索爾平臺校準設施上進行秘密情報傳遞，但當地的幫派已經在那裡紮根了，我們無法取回我們的東西。

如果你想動手的話，從  貨物的飛船，並儘量在過程中不要被打中。帶個<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>也是個聰明選擇。

斯托斯通訊完畢。

CFP_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Description.en:
More and more CFP ships are being targeted lately, and despite our best efforts to keep our trading routes quiet, we're still losing haulers to outlaw attacks.

Our pilot over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is the latest casualty. It pains me to think about how much we've lost, but as long as there are people who need our help, we have to keep on fighting.

If you have a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>, we need you to head to the above location and recover that cargo.

This won't be easy, the pilot was one of our best and wouldn't go down without a fight. Let's not underestimate these outlaws, bring a trustworthy crew and watch each other's backs.

Once you've got the cargo, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll get it processed.

Good luck and take care,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Description.tr:
最近越來越多繁榮公民的飛船遭到襲擊，儘管我們竭盡全力保持貿易航線低調，仍不斷有運輸員在不法分子的攻擊中喪生。

位於  的飛行員就是最新一位犧牲者。想到我們已損失如此之多，實在令人心痛；但只要還有人需要我們的幫助，我們就必須繼續戰鬥。

如果你有一艘能裝載  的貨運電梯處，我會安排後續處理。

祝你好運，務必小心，

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民


**********  **********

- C54 衝鋒槍
- S71步槍
- ORC-mkX 臂甲 林地版
- ORC-mkX 腿甲 林地版
- ORC-mkX 胸甲 林地版
- ORC-mkX 頭盔 林地版
- ORC-mkV 臂甲
- ORC-mkV 腿甲
- ORC-mkV 胸甲

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_ASD_Desc.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL 
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' 
----------------------------    

ASD reached out to us as it seems one of their old labs, <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, still has some cargo being stored there they want to get their hands on.

You would fly there in a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>32 SCU</EM4> in size, land in the hangar, load up from the freight elevator, and then transport it all back to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Just be sure to keep your head on swivel while you’re at the facility and try not to let your curiosity get the better of you Abandoned sites like this can be home to all sort of nastiness.  And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. 

BE YOUR BEST – Take pride in the work you do and you’ll do work to be proud of.
RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_ASD_Desc.tr:
紅風物流
“您的貨物，有我保障”
----------------------------

聯合科學與開發公司(ASD)聯繫了我們，好像是他們以前的一個實驗室，，那裡還存放著一些他們想要取回的物資。

你應該駕駛一艘能夠能裝下最大  尺寸的集裝箱的飛船，降落在機庫中，通過貨運電梯裝貨，然後把所有東西運回 。

在設施那邊的時候，一定要保持警惕，別讓好奇心佔了上風。像這樣的廢棄地點可能會藏著各種危險的東西。還有別忘了隨身攜帶一個<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>。

盡力做到最好 – 為你所做的工作感到自豪，這樣你就會做出值得驕傲的成績。

searchbodyspace_desc_E.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP50122
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us potentially prevent a death. An informant has reported an active hit issued for <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and fears the worst, but the client has hired us like us to look into it. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Last known location was <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head over there and see if the person mentioned by our client is still with us. If they’re not, examine the body closely so we can report back to them with details of their death.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.
searchbodyspace_desc_E.tr:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP50122
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us potentially prevent a death. An informant has reported an active hit issued for <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and fears the worst, but the client has hired us like us to look into it. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Last known location was <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head over there and see if the person mentioned by our client is still with us. If they’re not, examine the body closely so we can report back to them with details of their death.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.

vaughn_searchbody_space_E_Desc_001.en:
A rather creative former contractor of ours with a knack for staging accidents was so swept up in their work that they forgot to confirm the death of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> for us.

The target’s body should be located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. I need you to give the hopefully deceased an inspection to ensure the job was completed to our standard. 

Do be careful when you arrive at the location. It wouldn’t surprise me if there was a few vultures lurking around.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
vaughn_searchbody_space_E_Desc_001.tr:
我們的一位相當有創意的前承包商，特別擅長製造事故，忙得忘了給我們確認  的死亡情況。

目標的屍體應該在  那裡。我需要你去檢查一下那位但願已經去世的人，確保這事兒做得符合我們的標準。

你到達地點時可得小心點。要是有幾個禿鷲在附近轉悠，我一點都不會驚訝。

此致，
沃恩

The coordinates will remain accessible as long as the accepted contract is active. When you are satisfied with the amount of material you've salvaged, you may abandon the contract early with no penalty to clear the coordinates from your Starmap.

Claim #[CLAIM]:
• SHIP: [SHIP]
• CAUSE OF ACCIDENT: [SHIPSTORY]
• LOCATION: [LOCATION]

Adagio Rights Division

Adagio_BasicSalvage_Desc_01.tr:
請注意：

現有新的打撈權利可供購買。只要成功完成信用點支付，您將獲得監管空間內可打撈船隻已核實座標的獨家訪問權限。該座標在合約生效期間隨時可用。您可以在打撈到了足夠的材料後隨時提前終止合約，並將該座標從您的星圖上移除，此舉不會受到任何懲罰。

權利號 #[CLAIM]：
• 飛船：[SHIP]
• 事故原因：[SHIPSTORY]
• 地點：[LOCATION]

阿德吉奧權益部

TarPits_TimedSalvage_Desc_01.en:
We’ve got our eye on a [SHIP] near [LOCATION] that’s ripe for salvaging. We’re too busy to snag it ourselves, so why not spread the wealth, right?

If you send us some credits, we’ll send you the ship’s exact coordinates. Don’t take too long to think it over, though. You’ve probably got about [TIMER] minutes until security gets there to check out the wreck. Could be more, could be less.

You could either tow it somewhere else first, or you could try to scrap what you can onsite before security shows. Don’t care which as long as you get it taken care of. And once you've salvaged everything you want, just go ahead and abandon this contract to clear your map. Helps keep everything nice and tidy.
TarPits_TimedSalvage_Desc_01.tr:
我們在 [LOCATION] 附近盯上了一艘正待打撈 [SHIP]。我們太忙了，沒時間親自去打撈，於是我們決定散散財，何樂不為呢？

你給我們一些信用點，我們就會把飛船的準確座標發給你。不過可別躊躇不定，在安全人員到達現場檢查殘骸之前，你大概有[TIMER]分鐘的時間。可能更長，也可能更短。

你可以先把它拖到別的地方，也可以在保安出現之前直接在現場打撈掉船殼。只要能處理好就行。一旦你打撈了你想要的一切，就放棄這份合約，消掉地圖上的標記，保持整潔。

SalvageContractor_Difficulty_Hard.en: Be aware that due to the size of the Claim, a <EM4>Large Salvage Ship is recommended</EM4>.
SalvageContractor_Difficulty_Hard.tr: 請注意，由於許可打撈的飛船尺寸較大，建議使用<EM4>大型打撈飛船</EM4>。

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
You know when you ask someone a question and you have a feeling they’re lying, but you choose to give them the benefit of the doubt? Yeah. That’s what I’m dealing with right now.

Two “expert” haulers I hired to transport some gear for me ran into some trouble and ended up ditching my goods over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Needless to say, I’ve ordered a hit on them, but what I need from you is to go recover that cargo. The tracker says the cargo’s still on the ship, so you’ll just need a <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and your own ship to recover it.

You might run into a couple of scavengers lurking around there, but I doubt you’ll have any trouble with them.

When you’re done, take the stuff to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll sort you out with a reward.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
你有沒有過那種感覺——問別人問題時，明明覺得他在撒謊，可你還是選擇信他一回？對，我現在就處在這種狀況。

我僱了兩個自稱“專家”的運輸工，幫我運點貨，結果他們半路出事，直接把我的貨扔在了 。不用說，我已經下了追殺令，但現在我需要你去把那批貨給撈回來。追蹤器顯示貨還在船上，你只需要帶個<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>和你自己的船，直接去拖走就行。

可能會有幾個撿破爛的在那邊晃盪，不過我覺得你應付起來應該不費勁。

搞定之後，把貨送到 ，報酬少不了你的。

- 刺痛

CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_E_.en:
To help protect our pilots, Citizens for Prosperity will often recommend the use of less traditional routes through the system. However, it seems that a gang of outlaws has gotten word and has begun to stage repeated ambushes along one such flightpath. Rather than just go around the problem and risk it persisting along the new route, we feel it we be prudent to meet these outlaws head on.

You and whatever support ships you enlist will head to [LOCATION] and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_E_.tr:
為保護我方飛行員，繁榮公民常建議採用星系內不那麼傳統的航線。然而，似乎一夥不法分子已獲悉此事，並開始在其中一條航線上反覆設伏。與其繞行避險、任其隱患蔓延至新路線，我們更傾向於正面迎擊這些不法分子。

你及你召集來的支援飛船需要前往 [LOCATION]，清除所有埋伏於此的敵對勢力。據知，他們慣以小股編隊行動，因此務必確保全部敵人都已被殲滅後方可撤離。

非常感謝您的幫助，
利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

headhunters_sabotage_servers_E_CFP_desc_.en:
Long story, short - a Headhunter messed up real bad and now Citizens for Prosperity has gotten their hands on some data that could really do some damage to us. 

The bastard is going to need some time to heal so that leaves it to you to clean up the mess. Can you go to [LOCATION] and destroy the servers they got stored there? I wanna make sure there's no chance of this info getting out there.

-Stows out
headhunters_sabotage_servers_E_CFP_desc_.tr:
長話短說——有個獵頭幫成員搞砸了，現在繁榮公民手裡有一些可能對我們造成嚴重損害的資料。

那個傢伙需要一些時間來恢復，所以這就得由你來收拾這個爛攤子。你能去 [LOCATION] 把他們存放的伺服器砸了嗎？我想確保這些資訊絕對不會洩露出去。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

eckhart_defendship_multi_VHRT_SB_desc_00.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A longtime client needs combat support at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as fast as we can get it there. Any chance you’re interested and available? 

This client can hold their own in a dogfight, so they must be up against seriously skilled fighters to have put out this call. Don’t make the mistake of heading there thinking that this is going to be easy. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
eckhart_defendship_multi_VHRT_SB_desc_00.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：保衛飛船
授權程式碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

一位長期合作的客戶在  急需戰鬥支援，我們需要儘快趕到。你有興趣並且有時間嗎？

這位客戶在空戰中具備很強的戰鬥力，所以他們遇到的對手肯定是非常熟練的戰鬥機飛行員。不要以為這會很容易就貿然前往。

報酬將在合約順利完成後支付。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等- R97 霰彈槍
- 蒙德 臂甲
- 蒙德 胸甲
- 蒙德 腿甲
- 蒙德 頭盔
- 蒙德 臂甲 弘
- 蒙德 胸甲 弘
- 蒙德 腿甲 弘
- 蒙德 頭盔 弘
- R97 霰彈槍彈匣 (18 發)

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Easy_Descri.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Client's cargo was mid-transport when they ran into some ship trouble, and now a group of opportunistic outlaws are looking to cash in on this.

If you accept, head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and deal with the outlaws guarding the cargo. Extract it using a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>, recover the cargo, load it in to a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>, and deposit it on the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Easy_Descri.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：取回貨物
授權程式碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

客戶物資正在運輸途中，卻突遇飛船故障。眼下一群見機行事的不法分子正打算趁火打劫。

若你接下任務，請前往 ，解決看守物資的不法分子。用 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4> 將物資提取出來，然後裝入能承載  的貨運電梯卸貨。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_001.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but for our scientists to continue their efforts they need resources that the company's suppliers have been unable to deliver. 

There is a sizeable population of kopions that have been exposed to radiation near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Rayari is seeking an contractor to collect <EM4>irradiated kopion horns</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Due to the scarcity of this resource, we are prepared to pay a high service fee. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_001.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

我們拉亞利正在全力以赴阻止重生技術危機的進一步惡化，但我們的科學家要繼續他們的研究，就需要一些公司供應商無法交付的資源。

在  附近有一大群暴露在輻射下的寇駢犬。拉亞利正在尋找承包商收集 <EM4>受輻射的寇駢犬角</EM4> 並將其送至 。由於這種資源的稀缺性，我們準備支付高額的服務費。

攜手共進，我們可以讓宇宙變得更美好。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_004.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are working day and night to solve the current regen crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need rare resources that the company's suppliers cannot deliver. 

We are therefore seeking a contractor to secure an <EM4>irradiated valakkar egg</EM4>. Our scans have confirmed several radioactive storms with known a valakkar presence on Pyro I, you can find a shuttle near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that will take you inside the storm. One more thing, analysis indicates that these eggs will decay over time, the state of the egg shouldn't affect our research but sooner would be better.

Due to the health risks associated with radiation exposure that will be needed to deliver a viable sample, Rayari is ready to pay well for anyone who can safely secure and deliver this item.

Once attained, please take this valuable resource to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_004.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

我們拉亞利正在日夜不停地解決當前的再生危機，但我們的科學家需要一些公司供應商無法提供的稀有資源，以繼續他們的研究工作。

因此，我們正在尋找一位承包商來獲取一枚 <EM4>受輻射的瓦拉卡蛋</EM4>。我們的掃描確認了派羅 I 上存在幾個帶有瓦拉卡蹤跡的放射性風暴，你可以在  附近找到一艘穿梭機，它將帶你進入風暴。還有一點，分析表明這些蛋會隨時間逐漸腐壞，蛋的狀態應該不會影響到我們的研究，但越快越好。

由於獲取可靠樣本需要面對輻射暴露帶來的健康風險，拉亞利準備為任何能夠安全獲取並運送該物品的人支付豐厚報酬。

一旦收集完成，請將這份珍貴資源送到 。

攜手共進，我們可以讓宇宙變得更美好。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission01_Desc.en:
Looking to gain critical hands-on experience battling a variety of targets and situations? Then my Combat Gauntlet might be the perfect fit for you.

Please understand that this course is intended for pilots who have already mastered flying basics and are ready to take their abilities to the next level. If you’re starting off and want to learn the ropes, I’d recommend logging some hours in an Arena Commander simpod. But for those ready to face a real challenge, I firmly believe that students learn best by doing. 

That’s why I’ve designed these eight scenarios to be as realistic as possible. I promise you this is the closest thing to Navy combat pilot training you can get without enlisting, so don’t expect a lot of hand holding. <EM4>The risk of injury to yourself or your ship should be taken very seriously.</EM4>

GAUNTLET SCENARIOS:
1. Single Targets
2. Multiple Targets
3. Target Priority
4. Target Stealth
5. Missiles and Countermeasures
6. Multi-Crew Targets
7. Corvette with Escorts
8. Capital Ship Encounter

So, if you’re ready to challenge yourself and prove you got what it takes to be a great pilot, the first scenario will focus on handling a single target. Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Situational Awareness – Don’t get so focused on taking a target that you aren’t watching your flight path. No good taking out the enemy if you fly headfirst into an asteroid.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly    

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL 
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission01_Desc.tr:
想獲得與各種目標和情況作戰的關鍵實戰經驗嗎？那我的戰鬥挑戰可能正適合你。

請理解，這個課程是為那些已經掌握飛行基礎、準備將技能提升到更高水平的飛行員設計的。如果你剛開始，想學習基礎知識，我建議你在競技指揮官模擬艙中多練習幾小時。但對於那些準備迎接真正挑戰的人，我堅信學生通過實踐學習效果最好。

這就是為什麼我設計了這八個場景，儘量做到儘可能真實。我向你保證，這將是你在不參軍的情況下，最接近海軍戰鬥飛行員訓練的體驗，所以不要指望會有人過多照顧。<EM4>您自身或您飛船受傷的風險應當被極其嚴肅地對待。</EM4>

挑戰場景：
1. 單一目標
2. 複數目標
3. 目標優先級
4. 目標隱身
5. 導彈與對策
6. 多船員目標
7. 帶護航的護衛艦
8. 主力艦遭遇戰

所以，如果你準備好挑戰自己並證明你有成為優秀飛行員的能力，第一場景將專注於處理單一目標。前往  開始。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 情境意識 - 不要太專注於攻擊目標以至於忽視了你的飛行路徑。如果你一頭撞上小行星，那就沒什麼意義了。

祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission02_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part one of this eight-part course.

Scenario two will focus on how to deal with multiple targets at the same time. Goal here is give you a better handle on how to balance offense and defense.   

Whenever you’re set, grab a combat ship, and head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Pick Your Fight - For situations where you’re coming up against multiple targets of equal threat, your best strategy is to focus on neutralizing one target at a time to gradually reduce the amount of incoming fire.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission02_Desc.tr:
恭喜完成八節課程的第一部分。

場景 2 將重點訓練同時應對多個目標的能力。本環節旨在幫助你更好地掌握攻防平衡技巧。

準備就緒後，駕駛戰鬥飛船前往  開始訓練。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 逐個擊破 - 當遭遇多個威脅值相當的敵人時，最佳策略是集中火力逐個消滅，逐步減輕敵方火力壓制。

祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission03_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part two of this eight-part course.   

The third scenario throws tactical considerations into the mix. This time around the attacking ships are from distinct classes with distinct battlefield applications. Knowing what targets to prioritize is vital to surviving engagements against multiple ships.      

Whenever you’re ready, head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to get started.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Bigger They Are – Try to evaluate which threat is the most dangerous and take them out first.
- Shields – If you’re taking a lot of damage, don’t be afraid to boost away and let your shields regenerate.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission03_Desc.tr:
恭喜完成八節課程的第二部分。

場景 3 將加入戰術決策要素。本次來襲飛船分屬不同艦種，戰場職能各異。學會判斷優先打擊目標，是在混戰中存活的關鍵。

準備就緒後，請前往  開始訓練。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 擒賊先擒王 - 優先評估最具威脅的目標並集中消滅。
- 護盾管理 - 若持續遭受重創，不妨加速脫離戰場等待護盾充能。

祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission04_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part three of this eight-part course.

Good combat pilots know not all threats are apparent. It’s the threats you don’t expect that can be the most devastating. Scenario four is focused on how to identify and deal with stealth targets. Hopefully by the end, you’ll understand just how important your radar is in determining who you’re really up against. Expect to have regular and stealth ships hunting you down.    

Make your way to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> whenever you’re ready, and remember to keep your eyes on your radar.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>10 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Surprise Attacks - Pinging your surroundings can sometimes reveal hidden ships. Be ready for contacts to show up unexpectedly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission04_Desc.tr:
恭喜完成八節課程的第三部分。

優秀飛行員都明白：真正的威脅往往藏於暗處。場景 4 將重點訓練如何應對隱形目標。課程結束時，你會深刻體會到雷達在識別敵情時的重要性——本次你將同時遭遇常規飛船和隱身飛船的圍剿。

準備就緒後前往  ，切記時刻關注雷達動向。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 反隱偵查 - 主動掃描周圍空域可能發現隱藏目標，隨時做好遭遇突發敵情的準備。

祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission05_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part four of this eight-part course.   

The fifth scenario focuses on defensive tactics. Knowing when to take evasive measures and deploy either decoys or noise countermeasures is essential to your survival. That’s why the aggressors in this exercise will be armed with missiles.   

Ensure your countermeasures are fully stocked and then go to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to start.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>12 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Ready to Launch - Easy access to your decoys and countermeasures can be critical in your success in dealing with incoming missile fire. 
- Stand and Fight - Resist the temptation to hit the afterburner to escape as you’ll increase your signature and make it easier for the missile to hit you. They’re almost certainly much faster than you anyway.
- Close the Gap – While it may seem counterintuitive, getting closer to an enemy ship can be an advantage. Missiles have a minimum range and if you’re inside of it they won’t be able to get a lock on you.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission05_Desc.tr:
恭喜完成八節課程的第四部分。

場景 5 重點訓練防禦戰術。學會在何時採取規避動作、釋放誘餌彈或干擾彈是生存的關鍵。本次訓練的敵艦將配備導彈武器。

請確保攜帶足量反導裝備，隨後前往  開始訓練。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 快速反應 - 將誘餌彈和干擾彈設置為快捷鍵，這對應對導彈襲擊至關重要
- 穩住陣腳 - 不要試圖用加力燃燒逃跑，這反而會增大信號特徵讓導彈更容易鎖定你（反正導彈肯定比你快）。
- 近身戰術 - 看似違反直覺，但貼近敵艦反而有利。導彈有最小射程限制，貼身時無法鎖定你。


祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission06_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part five of this eight-part course.

I’m bringing out the big guns for scenario six. Time for you to go up against larger, multi-crewed ships, which provide a few new challenges. Not only will you have to contend with their enhanced firepower but their multifaceted shields means you’ll have to target one shield face continually to do real damage. Easier said than done when both of y’all are moving at such fast speeds.      

Find your way to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> whenever you're ready.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>14 MG Scrip</EM4>. 

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Size Advantage – When going up against a larger ship, try to stay away from their front as typically this is where the majority of their offensive fire is located. 

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission06_Desc.tr:
恭喜完成八節課程的第五部分。

場景 6 要動真格了——你將面對大型多船員飛船。這些巨獸帶來全新挑戰：不僅要應付兇猛火力，其多面護盾系統更要求你持續攻擊同一面護盾才能造成有效傷害。在高速機動中保持精準攻擊可不容易。

準備就緒後，請前往  開始訓練。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 尺寸優勢 - 對抗大型飛船時，儘量避開正前方，那裡通常是主武器集中區域

祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission07_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part six of this eight-part course.

You’ve gained a lot of experience across the past six scenarios, and now it’s time to put it all to practice. Scenario seven puts you up against a corvette-class ship and its escorts. This extended encounter will push you to the limit and test everything you got.   

The only thing left is to understand the limit of your skillset. To put it simply, you can’t do everything yourself. Developing and maintaining relationships with fellow pilots that you can call upon for support is really the last piece of the puzzle. Not saying you can't overcome encounters like this by yourself, but even the Navy doesn’t send their ace pilots on a patrol alone.    

Once you decided whether to do this alone or call in some support, head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to kick off the encounter.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Strength in Diversity – Think about the roles your allies will be filling and choose who to bring carefully to help balance strengths and weaknesses. You’ll want ships capable of taking on the Corvette while others deal with the escort.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission07_Desc.tr:
恭喜完成八節課程的第六部分。

經過前六個場景訓練，現在是檢驗成果的時候了。第七課將讓你直面一艘護衛艦級飛船及其護航編隊。這場持久戰會把你逼到極限，全面考驗所學技能。

現在只剩最後一項要領悟：個人能力的極限。說白了，單打獨鬥總有盡頭。發展和維護與其他飛行員的關係，能在關鍵時刻呼叫支援，才是終極解決方案。當然獨狼也能完成任務——但就連海軍也從不讓王牌飛行員單獨出勤。

決定好單幹還是呼叫支援後，請前往  開始戰鬥。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 優勢互補 - 慎重選擇援軍陣容，確保有人牽制護衛艦時，其他人能解決護航艦隊。合理搭配各艦職能才能揚長避短。

祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission08_Desc.en:
Welcome to the final scenario of the Combat Gauntlet.

Throughout this course, you’ve gotten to experience the advanced combat and defensive tactics needed to survive a variety of encounters. Time to take all those new skills and knowledge and see how they hold up against a large capital vessel and some escort ships.

You know the drill by now. Once you and all your allies are set, find your way to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to see how you do when truly pushed to the limits.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>20 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Patience is a Virtue – If you’ve balanced your squadron properly, you should be able to come out on top, just don’t expect it to be a quick fight. Ships this big don’t go down quickly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”
GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission08_Desc.tr:
歡迎來到戰鬥挑戰的最終場景。

通過本課程，你已掌握在各種遭遇戰中生存所需的進階戰鬥與防禦技巧。現在是將所學融會貫通的時刻——直面一艘主力艦及其護航編隊的終極考驗。

老規矩，當你和僚機準備就緒後，前往  看看當你被逼到極限時候的表現。

作為獎勵，成功完成該場景後，原始合約持有人將獲得 <EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

實戰技巧：
- 耐心制勝 - 只要編隊配置合理，勝利終將屬於你。但要做好持久戰準備，擊沉鉅艦從來不是速戰速決的事。

祝你好運，
教練吉利


關於吉利飛行學院
教練盧卡斯·“吉利”·巴拉姆斯科曾在六個飛行中隊服役，擁有超過十年的教學經驗。無論是零飛行經驗的學生，還是希望提升技能的專業人士，吉利飛行學院都提供多種課程，幫助“開啟你的飛行生涯”。

EckhartSecurity_EliminateAll_storm_data_.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Urgent request came in from Associated Science & Development to provide combat support at [LOCATION]. Apparently they have been attacked by outlaws and their security forces have been unable to handle it on their own. 

You've been cleared to go on site and aide local security elements in taking out the outlaws, but ASD reserves the right to restrict you from certain areas.

This is a confirmed combat op, so prepare accordingly.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_EliminateAll_storm_data_.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：清理地點
授權程式碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

聯合科學與開發公司發來緊急請求，要求在 [LOCATION] 提供戰鬥支援。顯然，他們遭到了不法分子的襲擊，其安全部隊無法獨自應對。

你已被授權前往現場，協助當地安全部隊消滅不法分子，但聯合科學與開發公司仍保留限制你進入某些區域的權利。

這是已經確認會戰鬥的行動，所以請做好相應準備。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

cfp_defendship_multi_SRT_desc_001.en:
I’m getting reports that a Citizens for Prosperity convoy carrying vital supplies is currently under attack at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. It’d be a big blow to our operations if we lost that cargo. 

If you’ve got the combat skills to go up against highly aggressive hostiles, we’re more than willing to pay for your help. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_multi_SRT_desc_001.tr:
我收到報告說，繁榮公民組織的一支運送關鍵物資的運輸艦隊目前正在  遭到攻擊。如果我們丟了這批貨物，對我們的行動會是個沉重打擊。

如果你有實力對抗那些超級兇猛的敵人，我們很樂意出錢請你幫忙。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
Hello,

Some sad news. Unfortunately our hauler ran into some trouble and had to abandoned the cargo they were due to deliver. We haven't heard anything back from them so we're assuming the worse.

We're in the process of contacting their family and are conscious this is a very sensitive time, but also can't afford to leave a job incomplete. Our trackers show the cargo is still intact over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

If you could finish the delivery we would be really grateful. We're not picking up on any nearby ships so it should be safe for you to collect. Bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll take care of the rest.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.tr:
你好，

壞消息。我們的運輸員途中遇險，被迫遺棄了本應送達的貨物。至今杳無音信，我們只能做最壞打算。

我們正在聯繫他們的家人，也明白現在是特別敏感的時刻，但實在沒法放著任務半途而廢。我們的追蹤器顯示，那批貨物還在  那兒，完好無損。

要是你能把這批貨送完，我們真的非常感激。目前沒探測到附近有別的飛船，應該挺安全的，你去取就行。記得帶把<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>，再開一艘能裝得下  那兒的貨運電梯就行，剩下的交給我們來處理。

謝謝，
雷耶斯·玲
貨運物流協調員
玲家快遞


玲家快遞深知宇宙危險莫測，因此制定了多項協議，以保護你和客戶貨物的安全。為確保你不會因不可控因素受罰，總報酬將按成功交付的貨物比例計算。每趟運輸都會設置交付倒計時，倒計時結束時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為被盜，並按盜竊處理。所有取貨和送貨必須通過自動裝載或貨運電梯完成。

headhunters_bombingrun_killship_M_desc_0.en:
Everyone has been talking about a new player named [TARGET] who is operating out of [LOCATION]. They've become a real concern for the Headhunters. 

It's time to shut them down. 

Head over, take out [TARGET] and then clear out any fuel stores they have there to convince anyone remaining to leave. 

Figure after you pull this off, nobody will even remember their name.

-Stows
headhunters_bombingrun_killship_M_desc_0.tr:
大家都在談論一個名叫 [TARGET] 的新人，他在 [LOCATION] 活動。對獵頭幫來說，他們已經成為了一個真正的威脅。

是時候讓他們停下來。

去那邊，幹掉 [TARGET]，然後清理掉他們那裡的任何燃料儲備，這樣能說服剩下的人離開。

我想在你完成這件事後，沒人會記得他們的名字。

- 斯托斯

cfp_defendship_multi_HRT_desc_001.en:
We just received word that a convoy of Citizen for Prosperity affiliated ships have been targeted by outlaws and that our people are in dire need of assistance. 

If you are available, we need combat ready pilots at [LOCATION] to defend our people. Note that at this dire time, we cannot afford even a single lost ship and expect with your assistance for all of our people make it out alive.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_multi_HRT_desc_001.tr:
我們剛收到消息，隸屬於繁榮公民的船隊遭到了不法分子的襲擊，我們的人員急需支援。

如果你有空，我們需要戰鬥準備好的飛行員前往 [LOCATION] 保護我們的人員。請注意，在這個危急時刻，我們無法承受任何一艘飛船的損失，並希望在你的幫助下，所有人都能安全脫離。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民


**********  **********
- R97 霰彈槍
- 蒙德 臂甲
- 蒙德 胸甲
- 蒙德 腿甲
- 蒙德 頭盔
- 蒙德 臂甲 弘
- 蒙德 胸甲 弘
- 蒙德 腿甲 弘
- 蒙德 頭盔 弘
- R97 霰彈槍彈匣 (18 發)

cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_SB_desc_001.en:
We’ve lost contact with a supply convoy and are concerned it might be under attack. Last comm we received from them reported Shattered Blade ships were incoming, but haven’t heard anything since. Are you free to hurry to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and support our forces? 

We’ve come to learn that the Shattered Blade are very protective of their hunting grounds. Our last few encounters with them were quite intense, so I’d recommend bringing some heavy firepower.   

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_SB_desc_001.tr:
我們與一支物資運輸隊失去了聯繫，擔心他們可能正遭到攻擊。我們最後收到的消息說，碎刃幫的飛船正在逼近，但從那以後就再沒消息了。你現在有空的話，能趕緊趕到  支援我們的部隊嗎？

我們瞭解到，碎刃幫對他們狩獵地的保護非常嚴，最近幾次和他們交手都挺激烈的，所以建議你帶上足夠的重火力。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

spacecollect_cargo_desc_VE_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A contractor of ours has run into some trouble and abandoned their ship over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We need someone to head to their ship, pick up the package they left there, and finish the job.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>1x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

We’re currently uncertain as to why they failed to complete the contract, so be cautious when approaching the ship.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 
RECOMMENDED EXPERIENCE LEVEL – UNIVERSAL

PICKUP LOCATION – Need a courier dispatched to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to retrieve a package from a downed ship.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package will need to be delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – <EM4>Light engagements</EM4> expected.

TRAVEL– All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

[SIGN_OFF]
FTL_RecoverItem_VE_Desc_001.tr:
所有超光速快遞的快遞員們請注意
立即執行

**合約細節** 
推薦等級 - 通用

取件地址 - 需快遞員前往<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>，從墜毀飛船中取回包裹。

交付地址 - 取回包裹後，將其運送至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>。

威脅等級 - 預計遭遇<EM4>輕度交火</EM4>。

交通安排 - 所有運輸需求均應由快遞員協調。

deadsaints_recoveritem_VE_Desc_001.en:
Need someone solid to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and finish a delivery for me. The last contractor got themselves perished and now my stash is sitting in the back of their ship.

The scavs that took out my pilot might be there too, so stay alert. Take my package to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll pay you for your time.

-Twitch
deadsaints_recoveritem_VE_Desc_001.tr:
需要一個可靠的人去  完成這次送貨任務。上一個承包商死了，現在我的物資還留在他們的飛船裡。

襲擊我飛行員的那些不法分子可能也在那裡，所以要保持警惕。把我的包裹送到 ，我會付你報酬。

-刺痛

RedWind_RecoverItem_VE_Desc_001.tr:
紅風物流
'您的貨物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我們的一名承包商遇到了麻煩，在<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>放棄了他們的飛船。我們需要有人前往他們的飛船，取走他們留下的包裹，並完成這項工作。

待回收包裹

卸貨地點
    · 交付至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>

我們目前還不確定他們為什麼未能完成合同，所以在接近這艘船時要小心。

以你的工作為榮——即使作為承包商，你也代表著紅風運輸公司。切勿故意做出任何損害公司聲譽的事情。

spacecollect_cargo_desc_E_01.en:
Not sure how the hell this happened, but my pilot’s gone and got themselves killed over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. If you want to die on your own time, that’s your business, but they did it while carrying a stash for me. Now I gotta have someone go out there and finish their work.

Take the two packages to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll have one of my crew collect it later. If you see those assholes who took out my pilot, give ‘em hell.

-Twitch

deadsaints_recoveritem_E_Desc_001.tr:
不知道這鬼事情怎麼發生的，我的飛行員居然在  那邊掛了。你想死你自己去死唄，這不關我事，但他們死的時候還揹著給我帶的貨。現在我只能找人去把他們的活兒給幹完了。

你把那兩個包裹送到 ，我手下稍後會來取。要是碰上那些幹掉我飛行員的王八蛋，替我好好教訓他們。

-刺痛

RedWind_RecoverItem_E_Desc_001.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Seems a pilot of ours ran into some trouble and left a client’s delivery unfulfilled. We suspect they may no longer be with us, but it’s important that we continue to offer outstanding levels of service and complete the job. If you accept, please head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to pick up the packages. Be advised you may encounter some <EM4>opportunistic outlaws</EM4> near the derelict ship.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>2x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.
RedWind_RecoverItem_E_Desc_001.tr:
紅風物流
'您的貨物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我們的一位飛行員似乎遇到了麻煩，導致客戶的貨物未能送達。我們懷疑他可能已經離職，但我們必須繼續提供卓越的服務並完成任務。如果您接受這項工作，請前往<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>領取包裹。請注意，您可能會在廢棄飛船附近遇到一些<EM4>伺機而動的不法之徒</EM4>。

待回收包裹

卸貨地點
    · 交付至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>

spacecollect_cargo_desc_VH_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We appreciate how hard you’ve been working for us recently, which is why we’d like to offer you this advanced contract. An important client of ours is waiting for delivery on multiple packages but the courier due to deliver them is no longer responding. The package trackers are showing that they’re at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, meaning we have some time to recover the delivery.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>5x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

We cannot stress enough how important the success of this delivery is. Since we do not know what happened to the original courier, we strongly urge you to travel with <EM4>several trustworthy combat pilots.</EM4>

Needless to say, we’re offering a substantial payout for this one proportionate to the danger of the contract.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

deadsaints_recoveritem_VH_Desc_001.en:
I got a situation I need dealing with pronto. A rival crew has intercepted a major shipment of gear I was expecting and all hell is breaking loose. The pilot’s ghosted, the ship’s busted, and it’s only a matter of time before they take my shit and leave. If you’re up for cracking these assholes, head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and get my five packages.

Head’s up though, the pilot they ghosted was one of my best, so this crew’s got to be seriously kitted out. Bring your finest mates with you and show the bastards no mercy. Understood?

When you’re done, take the gear to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll make sure you get a serious cut of the takings.

-Twitch
deadsaints_recoveritem_VH_Desc_001.tr:
我有個緊急情況需要處理。一個競爭對手的團隊截獲了我正在等待的一批重要物資，現在一片混亂。飛行員失蹤了，飛船也毀了，他們很快就會拿走我的東西然後離開。如果你願意對付這些混蛋，就前往  取回我的五個包裹。

不過要提醒你，那個失蹤的飛行員是我最得力的成員之一，所以這個對手團隊肯定裝備精良。帶上你最厲害的夥伴們，別給他們任何機會。明白了嗎？

完成後，把裝備送到 ，我會確保你得到豐厚的報酬。

-刺痛

RedWind_RecoverItem_VH_Desc_001.tr:
紅風物流
'您的貨物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我們非常感謝您最近為我們付出的辛勤努力，因此我們想為您提供這份高階合同。我們的一位重要客戶正在等待多個包裹的送達，但負責派送的郵遞員卻聯絡不上了。包裹追蹤資訊顯示包裹位於<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>，這意味著我們還有一些時間可以追回這些包裹。

待回收包裹

卸貨地點
    · 交付至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>

我們再怎麼強調這次郵遞的重要性都不為過。由於我們不知道原來的快遞員發生了什麼，我們強烈建議你與<EM4>幾位值得信賴的戰鬥機飛行員一同出行。</EM4>

不用說，我們為這次任務提供了一筆相當豐厚的報酬，與合同的危險程度成正比。

以你的工作為榮——即使作為承包商，你也代表著紅風運輸公司。切勿故意做出任何損害公司聲譽的事情。

spacecollect_cargo_desc_M_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Outlaws are making our jobs much harder to complete these days. We need a contractor with combat experience to head to our former delivery pilot’s ship location at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and recover the packages left there.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>3x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

While you're out there, be on the lookout for trouble, we’re getting <EM4>reports of multiple outlaws</EM4> in the vicinity.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

FTL_RecoverItem_M_Desc_001.en:
ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 
RECOMMENDED EXPERIENCE LEVEL – JUNIOR

PICKUP LOCATION – An FTL ship went down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Courier needed to retrieve package and continue delivery.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package must be taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – <EM4>Medium level engagements</EM4> expected.

TRAVEL –  All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

[SIGN_OFF]
FTL_RecoverItem_M_Desc_001.tr:
所有超光速快遞的快遞員們請注意
立即執行

**合約細節** 
推薦等級 - 初級

取件地址 - 一艘超光速快遞的飛船墜毀於<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>。需快遞員取回包裹並繼續投遞。

交付地址 - 取回包裹後，將其運送至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>。

威脅等級 - 預計遭遇<EM4>中度交火</EM4>。

交通安排 - 所有運輸需求均應由快遞員協調。

deadsaints_recoveritem_M_Desc_001.en:
A couple of hours ago I was supposed to receive a shipment of gear from a pilot of mine. I don’t like late, so I need you to head to their location and recover my stuff. I’ve got trackers on the packages so they should be easy enough to find.

My gut says the pilot’s been ghosted. They knew how to handle a ship well, so the scavs that took them out must be decent. When you get my three packages back, take them to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me and I’ll wire you the creds.

-Twitch
deadsaints_recoveritem_M_Desc_001.tr:
幾個小時前，我本應該收到一名飛行員運送的物資。我不喜歡遲到，所以你需要前往他們的那裡把我的東西取回來。我已經給包裹安裝了追蹤器，應該很容易找到。

我的直覺告訴我飛行員可能遭遇了不測。他們很擅長駕駛飛船，所以襲擊他們的那些不法分子應該也挺厲害的。等你把我的三個包裹取回來，把它們送到 ，我會把報酬轉給你。

-刺痛

'您的貨物，有我保障'
----------------------------

近來，歹徒讓我們的工作變得異常艱難。我們需要一位有戰鬥經驗的承包商前往我們前快遞飛行員飛船的位置 <EM4> ~missionLocation|Address </EM4> ，並回收那裡留下的包裹。

待回收包裹

卸貨地點
    · 交付至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>

你在外面的時候，要小心提防麻煩，我們收到<EM4>報告稱附近有多名不法分子</EM4>出沒。

以你的工作為榮——即使作為承包商，你也代表著紅風運輸公司。切勿故意做出任何損害公司聲譽的事情。

spacecollect_cargo_desc_H_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Need an experienced pilot for this recovery contract. Unfortunately, the original delivery pilot was targeting by a group of outlaws. Thankfully, the client’s packages are still sitting in their damaged ship located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

You’ll potentially need to <EM4>bring some backup</EM4> with you to ensure the successful collection and delivery of the packages.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>4x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Considering the danger of this contract, we’re willing to offer a slight pay increase as hazard pay.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

交付地址 - 將包裹後運送至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>。

deadsaints_recoveritem_H_Desc_001.en:
Just got a comm from the pilot who was transporting some gear for me and it sounded like they got jumped while on the call. I need someone to head to their location, grab the four packages that are still left inside their ship and bring them back to me.

Before they cut out, they told me that the ships that attacked them weren’t your standard transporters. These assholes are rocking some serious weaponry. Bring a crew, get my shit, and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. This whole thing is such a mess that I’d be willing to fork out some extra creds if you can get this done.

-Twitch
deadsaints_recoveritem_H_Desc_001.tr:
我剛收到那個為我運輸裝備的飛行員的消息，聽起來他們在執行任務時遭遇了襲擊。我需要派人去他們的位置，把他們飛船裡剩下的四個包裹拿回來帶給我。

在他們通訊中斷之前，他們告訴我襲擊他們的飛船不是普通的運輸船。那些混蛋配備了非常厲害的武器。帶上一個團隊，把我的東西拿回來，然後送到 。整個情況太混亂了，如果你們能完成這個任務，我願意多付一些報酬。

-刺痛

RedWind_RecoverItem_H_Desc_001.tr:
紅風物流
'您的貨物，有我保障'
----------------------------

需要一位經驗豐富的飛行員來執行這份回收合同。不幸的是，原定的送貨飛行員遭到了一夥不法之徒的襲擊。幸運的是，客戶的包裹仍然放在位於<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>的受損飛船上。

您可能需要<EM4>攜帶一些備用物品</EM4>，以確保包裹的順利收取和遞送。

待回收包裹

卸貨地點
    · 交付至<EM4>~missionDestination|Target|Address</EM4>

考慮到這份合約的危險性，我們願意提供一定的加薪作為風險津貼。

以你的工作為榮——即使作為承包商，你也代表著紅風運輸公司。切勿故意做出任何損害公司聲譽的事情。

vaughn_assassination_PA_H_desc.en:
<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> of the People’s Alliance, certainly seems to have a reputation about them, based on the importance our client has placed on this being handled in a timely and exacting manner.

But we’ll spare you the details. All you need to do is travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and put an end to their life. Expect a well-armed ship and highly competent backup to boot. They seem to take themselves quite seriously.

Sincerely,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_PA_H_desc.tr:
人民聯盟的，看起來確實名聲不小，從我們客戶對這件事處理時效和精確度的高要求來看就能看出來。

不過我就不細說了。你只需要前往 ，結束他們的生命即可。預計他們會有一艘武裝齊全的飛船，還有一群訓練有素的援兵。他們似乎還挺把自己當回事兒的。

此致，
沃恩

headhunters_multikillship_base_Generic_M.en:
A lotta wannabe gangs have stepped to the Headhunters over the years thinking that they could force their way into the system. We're still here. They aren't. But it seems the survivors of these groups have decided to band together and try again. Guess some people never learn.

Latest group hit a couple of our convoys while on supply runs. Shouldn't be a surprise that the Judge wants to stomp them out quick. We've learned they're out near [LOCATION] and likely rearming for another attack. 

We want you to go there and make them wish they died with their old gang.

Stows out
headhunters_multikillship_base_Generic_M.tr:
多年來，許多想當幫派的人都試圖挑戰獵頭幫，認為他們可以強行進入這個星系。現在我們還在這裡，他們都不在了。但似乎這些團體的倖存者決定重新聯合起來，再次嘗試。看來有些人永遠都學不會教訓。

最近一群人襲擊了我們的物資運輸隊，法官想要迅速消滅他們，這也不奇怪。我們得知他們位於 [LOCATION] 附近，可能正在重新武裝準備再次攻擊。

我們希望你去那裡，讓他們後悔沒有和他們的老幫派一起死去。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。


**********  **********
