civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_002.en:
I'm in desperate need of a little Luminalia magic and I hope you're the one to help.

There are some gifts stuck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that need to be delivered. 

I tried scheduling a pick up but just got notified that they won't be able to make it until after the holidays. Would you be able to take care of the deliveries for me? I'll gladly pay you what I was going to give them.

It shouldn't be too hard.[DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Whatever you decide to help or not, I hope you have a very happy holiday!

- [GIFTSENDER]
civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_002.tr:
我急需一些光燈節的“魔法”，感覺你應該能幫得上忙

在  有幾個禮物需要送一下。

我之前想安排人去取件，但剛接到通知說，他們得等到節後才會上工，你能幫我送一趟嗎？我很樂意把原本該給他們的錢付給你。

這應該不是什麼難事。[DESCRIPTIONSETUP]。

不論你是否願意幫忙，我都衷心祝你節日快樂！

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_003.en:
Hope the holiday season is treating you well.

Mine's been a bit stressful so far. It turns out that I put the wrong delivery address on a handful of gifts and I'm desperately seeking a way to get them delivered on time. 

It would mean so much to me if you could get me out of this jam. 

The presents are at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and will need to be delivered to [DESCRIPTIONSETUP]

Thank you and best holiday wishes,
[GIFTSENDER]
civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_003.tr:
希望節日期間你過得還不錯。

我這段時間都挺有壓力的。因為我原本有些禮物要送，誰知道地址居然填錯了，而我正焦急地在找方法能讓它們按時送達。

如果你能幫我解圍，那可就太好了。

那些禮物在  需要送給 [DESCRIPTIONSETUP]。

十分感謝，並祝你佳節愉快，

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_004.en:
I know things get busy around the holidays, but I was reaching out to see if you had any extra time to do a delivery run.

Got a few presents at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> for close friends that I won't be able to deliver myself. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP]

Much appreciated,
[GIFTSENDER]
civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_004.tr:
我知道假期的時候會非常忙，但我不知你是否有空能幫我去送趟東西。

有幾個禮物放在  要給那些我無法當面送去的親友們。[DESCRIPTIONSETUP]。

非常感謝，

RedWind_LocalDelivery_desc_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Need an available independent pilot for a quick local delivery.

PACKAGE FOR PICK UP
     · Package <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4> from the <EM4>[PICKUP1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Package <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4> to the <EM4>[DROPOFF1]</EM4>

Try to keep your nose clean when you're out there. If you got Red Wind packages onboard, a certain level of professionalism is appreciated. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. 

[SIGN_OFF]
RedWind_LocalDelivery_desc_01.tr:
紅風物流
“您的貨物，有我保障”
----------------------------

需要一位有空的個人飛行員去完成一次本地的快速交貨任務。

需取件包裹
     · 來自  的包裹 <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4>

投遞地點
     · 把包裹 <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4> 送到 

在外面別去招惹麻煩。你船上有紅風的貨物的時候，我們希望你能專業點。還有別忘了隨身攜帶一個<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>。

RedWind_LocalDelivery_desc_02.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'

Greetings Qualified Shipping Partner!

Looking for an excuse to hit the skies with your cargo-ready vessel? Earn credits and explore the local area with this following carefully selected itinerary -

Looking forward to working with you,

Unified Distribution Management

UDM_LocalDelivery_desc.en:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
[GIFTSENDER]

TheCollector_Ships_Ursa_Desc.en: Wikelo branching into ships too. Took a look at Ursa and improved. Bring parts for me and I will make for you. Explore planet better. Go do.
TheCollector_Ships_Ursa_Desc.tr: 維科洛也有涉足飛船領域。看看大熊座，進步了。給我拿零件來，我給你做。更好地探索星球。去做。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsPew.en:
Hello. Know you human like strange metal suit. How about metal suit with ikti? Sorry, ikti is Banu word, you call it 'gun.' 

If want, bring things I say and I will make for you. Gun will shoot. Cause many damage.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsPew.tr:
你好。我知道你們人類喜歡奇怪的金屬動力服。那麼帶 ikti 的金屬動力服怎麼樣？抱歉，ikti 是巴努語，你可以叫他“槍”。

如果你想要的話，把我說的東西帶來，我會為你製作。槍可以射擊，造成很多傷害。

再見。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_IrrArm.en:
Wikelo had exciting idea during brief work rest. Was thinking about the little glow worms in Pyro and saw armor get changed to look like.

If you get me parts, bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will make for you then you can glow too.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_IrrArm.tr:
維科洛在短暫的工作休息中，有令人興奮的想法。是在想派羅裡的小蠕蟲，並看到護甲被改造成看起來像它。

如果你給我零件，帶到  然後我將為你製作成這樣。你也能發光。

再見。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsJump.en:
Find very fun piece to add to big human suit that let you jump very high. Now you shoot and jump. Exciting.

If you want, bring me these to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>. Will make.

Wikelo
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsJump.tr:
找到一個非常有趣的部件，可以裝在大型人類動力服上，讓你跳得非常高。現在你能射擊又能跳了。令人興奮。

如果你想要，把這些東西帶來  給我。我會製作。

維科洛

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_VoltThwack.en:
You feel like gun not angry enough? VOLT shotgun very powerful, very dangerous, but not scary? Bring to me. Can make very scary and angry.

They respect you then. Bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and we make.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_VoltThwack.tr:
你感覺槍不夠憤怒嗎？VOLT 霰彈槍非常強大非常危險但是不可怕？帶來給我。能做得很可怕和憤怒。

他們就會尊敬你。帶到  然後我們製作。

再見。

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToRuinStatio.en:
Hiya, 

Looking for a hauler willing to make a run to Ruin Station. Know hauls to Pyro can give some people pause, but this is one we do regularly to help supply the station. I’ve also confirmed that everything on the cargo manifest is above board. 

If you’re interested, the cargo is ready for pick up at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.  Make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> otherwise it might be a little rough.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToRuinStatio.tr:
嗨呀，

找個運輸人員願意跑一趟廢墟空間站。我知道運到派羅的活兒會讓有些人猶豫，不過這是我們經常做的任務，主要是給站點供應物資。我也確認過了，貨單上的東西全都合法。

如果你感興趣的話，貨物已經在  準備好裝載了。記得帶上 <EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4> 和一艘能裝得下  **********
僅限 lv.6 級別合約
- VK-00 [量子 S1 軍用 A]
- 警笛iren [量子 S1 軍用 B]
- XL-1 [量子 S2 軍用 A]
- 獵人eager [量子 S2 軍用 B]
- 巴蘭丁alandin [量子 S3 軍用 B]
- TS-2 [量子 S3 軍用 A]
- 柵欄alisade [護盾 S1 工業 A]
- 城牆ampart [護盾 S2 工業 A]
- 護牆arapet [護盾 S3 工業 A]

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_DeliverAll.en:
Hiya, 

Here’s the deal, I need someone good for a special run. We’ve got an important client that’s threatening to take their business elsewhere, because their deliveries are consistently missing cargo. They’re demanding that 100% of the cargo be delivered on this run, or they won’t pay. Since this was before my time and my supervisor wants to show that it won’t happen again, they agreed with this. Anyway, I think you might be a good fit. 

If you’re willing to take that risk too, here are all the pertinent details. The cargo can be collected from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Looks like the largest cargo container you’ll need to handle is <EM4>24 SCU</EM4>, so be sure to bring a ship big enough and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to help you move those containers around.  
 
Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_DeliverAll.tr:
嗨呀，

是這樣的，我需要找個靠譜的人來搞一個特殊任務。我們有個重要客戶，說他們的貨物總是在運送過程中丟東西，現在很不滿意，揚言要把生意轉到別的地方去。他們這次提了個要求，這一單必須把貨物 100% 完整地送到，要不然就不付錢。這事兒發生在我來之前，我的主管想證明以後不會再出這種情況，所以就答應了客戶的條件。不管怎樣，我覺得你可能是幹這活兒的好手。

如果你願意冒這個險的話，這些就是全部的任務細節。貨物可以從  這個地方取，然後送到 。看起來你需要處理的最大貨物集裝箱是  尺寸的，所以一定要帶一艘足夠大的飛船，還得配備一把<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>來幫你搬運那些集裝箱。


艾拉·蒂埃諾
初級物流協調員
科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”

科瓦萊什貨運是一家有限責任公司。為了促進及時交付並防止貨運欺詐，科瓦萊什貨運會設定一個交貨期限，一旦超過這個期限，任何未交付的貨物都會被視為被盜並按盜竊處理。總付款會根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例支付。


**********  **********
僅限 lv.6 級別合約
- VK-00 [量子 S1 軍用 A]
- 警笛iren [量子 S1 軍用 B]
- XL-1 [量子 S2 軍用 A]
- 獵人eager [量子 S2 軍用 B]
- 巴蘭丁alandin [量子 S3 軍用 B]
- TS-2 [量子 S3 軍用 A]

- 城牆ampart [護盾 S2 工業 A]
- 護牆arapet [護盾 S3 工業 A]

You’ll need a ship that can fit <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to be able to move them.

Ella Tieno

 這邊有個客戶，他們的貨物需要從廢墟空間站取過來。他們在那兒已經等了一段時間了，現在有點不耐煩了。你能幫我們搞定這個嗎？

你需要一艘能裝  **********

Hey there, 

So the People’s Alliance hired us to move a load of cargo from Levski to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Honestly, I’m surprised that they export some of this stuff, but I guess they must sell something to be able to afford everything they import. 

For the run itself, you’ll need a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the containers. That should be it.  

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,
  
Ella Tieno

所以人民聯盟僱了我們從萊夫斯基運一批貨到 。說實話，我挺驚訝他們還出口這些東西的，不過我猜他們得賣點什麼才能買得起那麼多進口貨。

這趟任務的話，你需要一艘能裝  **********

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToLevski.en:
Hi, 

There’s a bunch of cargo at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that needs to be moved to Levski. The People’s Alliance has a standing order for this stuff because they desperately need it, but it’s not easy to get in Nyx. Funny how they don’t want to be part of the UEE but still rely on us for their survival.  

Anyway, you’ll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> to knock this one out. 

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 
 
Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator

To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToLevski.tr:
嘿，

 那邊有一批貨物需要運到萊夫斯基去。人民聯盟對這批貨有長期訂單，因為他們急需這東西，但在尼克斯那地方不好弄。有意思的是，他們不想加入 UEE，結果還得靠我們活著。

不管怎樣，你需要配一把 <EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4> 和一艘能裝得下  **********

Covalex_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.en:
Hi, 

Several Citizens for Prosperity outposts in Pyro need supplies. It seems like we regularly do runs like this for them, but this one looks like it might be a bit riskier. A CFP rep let me know that outlaw activity around these sites has spiked recently, but they desperately need these outposts restocked, so we’re going ahead with the delivery. <EM4>Just a head’s up that you could run into trouble, so come prepared</EM4>.       

All the cargo’s waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and here’s where it’s heading:  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]  

According to the manifest, the largest cargo container you’ll need to deal with is <EM4>16 SCU</EM4>. Aside from that, remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.    

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 
  
Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

有幾個繁榮公民的前哨站位於派羅，它們需要物資。我們經常為他們執行這樣的運輸任務，但這次看起來可能會有點風險。一位繁榮公民的代表告訴我，這些地區的不法分子活動最近有所增加，不過這些前哨站急需補貨，所以我們還是決定繼續進行這次交付。<EM4>只是提醒一下，你們可能會遇到麻煩，所以要做好準備</EM4>。

所有貨物都已經在  等著了，接下來它們的目的地是：

卸貨地點（任意順序）


根據貨物清單，你們需要處理的最大尺寸的集裝箱是  的。除此之外，記得帶上一個<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>。

BHG_Certification_Super_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Extreme
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As acknowledgment of your expertise in the craft, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Master Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Extreme-Risk Targets (ERT). These are criminals who travel in sub-capital ships with heavy escorts. This class of bounty only gets assigned to the most experienced of trackers.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend an ERT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
BHG_Certification_Super_Desc.tr:
--------------------------------------------------------
---------------------  賞金合約  ---------------------
--------------------------------------------------------

賞金獵人公會
處理與分配部門

賞金獵人公會已授權一份官方賞金

姓名：[TARGET]
星系：[SYSTEM]
風險評估：極端
最後已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知關聯：< 無 >
注意：因為認可您在飛船方面的專業知識，賞金獵人公會希望為您提供獲得“大師級賞金獵人執照”的機會。

此執照表明您有資格追蹤和逮捕極端危險目標，他們乘坐次主力艦級別的飛船，有重兵護衛。這些目標僅分配給最有經驗的賞金獵人。

您必須成功緝拿這個名為  的極端危險目標，才能通過認證，他最後一次出現是在 。


賞金獵人公會
追求正義

賞金獵人公會是一個由僱傭兵公會批准的安保服務，根據《外星貿易授權法案》被授權在 UEE 及其以外地區開展行動。

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.en:
Hey El here,

Got a weird one for you. I was checking the delivery stats for the past week and noticed some discrepancies. Seems we have a couple of deliveries marked as fulfilled but the cargo trackers are still showing as active.

One of these is located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> so I was hoping you could fly over and get to the bottom of this. The order says the hauler was using a ship that could carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you have the same. A <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> is a must for this one too.

That cargo needs to be delivered yesterday, so as soon as you've got it take it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll get your payment sorted for you.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno

*接受本合約，即視作你承擔與此處概述的工作相關的任何和所有風險，舒賓星際不對合同期間產生的任何損害承擔責任。

cfp_maintenance_E_desc_001.en:
Hi,

One of our outposts at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is in need of some light repairs. The folks onsite have estimated that you’ll need <EM4>three fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to fix up to three or so pipes.</EM4>

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks again for your help,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_E_desc_001.tr:
你好，

我們在  的一座前哨站需要進行一些簡單維修。現場人員估計你需要準備 <EM4>三個保險絲</EM4>、一個 <EM4>打撈工具</EM4>，以及 <EM4>足夠修復約三根管道的 RMC 罐子</EM4>。

若需瞭解更多維修工作事項，請查閱 mobiGlas 日誌中 <EM4>《基石開發公司維修指南》</EM4> 條目。

再次感謝你的協助，

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

cfp_maintenance_local_E_desc_001.en:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_local_E_desc_001.tr:
我們在  附近的哨站出現了機械故障需要維修。由於常規技術員正在執行其他任務，現需外包承包商協助。

需要 <EM4>更換三個保險絲</EM4>，並請攜帶 <EM4>打撈工具</EM4> 以及 <EM4>足夠修復約三根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4> 來處理剩餘問題。

維修工作詳情請參考 mobiGlas 日誌中的 <EM4>《基石開發公司維修指南》</EM4> 條目。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

Shubin_Industrial_ShipMining_Stanton_S_S.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

[LOCATION] Many of these ores are extremely rare and difficult to find, detectable only when a rock has been cracked open.

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

cfp_maintenance_M_desc_001.en:
Hello,

We've received word that a devastating storm hit <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which caused some damage to the structures. Our technician on site is still trying to figure out what they can fix but they can’t get everything. If you bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair around five pipes</EM4>, we should be able to handle any remaining repairs.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_M_desc_001.tr:
您好，

我們獲知  遭遇了破壞性風暴，導致建築結構受損。現場技術人員仍在評估可修復範圍，但無法處理全部問題。若您能攜帶 <EM4>六個保險絲</EM4>、一個 <EM4>打撈工具</EM4> 以及 <EM4>足夠修復約五根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4>，我們就能完成剩餘維修工作。

如需瞭解更多維修細節，請查閱 mobiGlas 日誌中的 <EM4>《基石開發公司維修指南》</EM4> 條目。

謝謝，

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

cfp_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.en:
If you happen to be in the area, please read this.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for a qualified mechanic to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> with the required supplies and perform some repairs.

As it stands, you’ll need <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair five pipes or so.</EM4> That should help us get the outpost functional again. We'll compensate you for your time and materials.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.tr:
若您恰好在附近，請閱讀這篇文章。

繁榮公民現需要一名合格機械師攜帶 <EM4>六個保險絲</EM4>、<EM4>打撈工具</EM4> 及 <EM4>足夠維修約五根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4> 前往 <EM4> �0�</EM4> 進行檢修。

這些物資將協助恢復前哨站運轉。我們將補償您的時間與材料損耗。

維修細則請參照 mobiGlas 日誌中 <EM4>《基石開發公司維修指南》<EM4> 條目。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

TheCollector_Ships_Starlift_Max_Desc.en: If you want to move many things. Hercules ship, very good for that. Wikelo even know souli back in Protectorate that started to use. Very big. Wikelo can give you similar version if you get what Wikelo need. Look at list and tell me.
TheCollector_Ships_Starlift_Max_Desc.tr: 如果你想移動很多東西。大力神飛船，非常適合。維基洛甚至知道商會早在保護國就開始使用了。非常大。如果你給維科洛需要的東西，維科洛就可以給你類似的版本。看看清單，然後告訴我。

TheCollector_Ships_Wolf_Unique_Desc.en: You have been good trade partner for Wikelo. Offer you this very special Wolf mod. Make trade even better - Bring me what I want and I give you the special Wolf AND Antium Armor AND a VOLT LMG. Very good deal for my very good customer.
TheCollector_Ships_Wolf_Unique_Desc.tr: 你一直是維科洛很好的貿易伙伴。給你這個非常特別的狼式改款。讓交易更划算 - 帶齊我想要的東西，我就給你特別的狼式改款和安騰護甲和一把 VOLT 輕機槍。非常好的交易給我非常好的顧客。

vaughn_searchbody_space_M_Desc_001.en:
Whilst we pride ourselves on our efficiency and general cleanliness when it comes to our work, sometimes our contractors can get a little carried away themselves. Circumstances surrounding a former contractor’s death, and more importantly, the target, are somewhat unclear to us.

We’ll need you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body so we can deliver clear confirmation to our client. As for the former contractor… you needn’t concern yourself with them. Arrangements for disposal have already been made.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
vaughn_searchbody_space_M_Desc_001.tr:
雖然我們在工作上以高效和乾淨著稱，但有時候我們的承包商自己會有點失控。關於一位前承包商的死因，更重要的是目標的情況，我們目前還不太清楚。

我們需要你前往  找到  的屍體，這樣我們就能向客戶給出明確的確認了。至於那位前承包商...你不用操心他們。處理事宜已經安排好了。

此致，
沃恩

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_M_desc.en:
Need an available trigger to take down a target in a CFP outpost. They're a real piece of work named [TARGET]. Old school merc filled with lead-pipe cruelty. 

Heard they're posted over at [LOCATION]. Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_M_desc.tr:
需要一位有空的搶手來對付位於繁榮公民前哨站的目標。他們是個真正的混蛋，名叫 [TARGET]。老派傭兵，心狠手辣。

聽說他們駐紮在 [LOCATION]。過去把他們解決掉。儘量不要造成太多損失，目標是他，而不是其他人。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。


**********  **********

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Asteroid_G.en:
Need someone taken care of. They're holed up near [LOCATION]. Not sure if you care who they are, but their name's [TARGET]. Not much to tell, local thug who killed someone who was connected.

They've been on the run, so they're gonna be skittish. I'd approach with caution.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Asteroid_G.tr:
需要處理掉一個人。他們躲在 [LOCATION] 附近。不知道你是在不在意他們是誰，他們的名字是 [TARGET]。沒什麼好說的，就是個地方流氓，殺了一個有背景的人。

他們一直在逃，所以會很緊張。我建議你小心接近。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

- 塵魔護甲 臂甲
- 塵魔護甲 胸甲
- 塵魔護甲 腿甲
- 曼提戈爾頭盔
- 劫掠者-212雙管霰彈槍彈匣 (16 發)

cfp_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_001.en:
Hi, we need to move some cargo across the system and were wondering if you could help. I know this is outside your usual purview, but I'm low on options. This would also be a great way to show your committed to Citizens for Prosperity's greater mission here.

If you head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, there should be some cargo accessible via a freight elevator that we'll need you to take to another freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Only thing to call out is that your ship must be able to handle <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. To make your life easier, be sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. Otherwise, it should be a simple run. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_001.tr:
嗨，我們需要在星系中運輸一些物資，想知道你是否能幫忙。我知道這超出了你通常的職責範圍，但我現在選擇不多。這也是一個很好的機會，展示你對繁榮公民更大使命的承諾。

如果你前往 ，應該能通過一個貨運電梯找到一些可用的物資，我們需要你把它們送到  的另一個貨運電梯。

唯一需要注意事情就是，你的飛船必須能夠處理  的貨物集裝箱。為了省點事，你最好隨身帶個<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>。這應該是一次簡單的運輸。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

headhunters_eliminateall_base_Generic_E_.en:
So here's the deal, we got some small time dirtbags who think they're hotshots running out of a base near [LOCATION]. I don't know what toxic shit they're drinking but they thought it'd be a good idea to step to some Headhunter Clips. Killed one, injured three more. So I'm looking to send someone there to blast their ambition right out of their skulls.

Head over and get it done. You'll get a nice bump of creds for it.

- Stows
headhunters_eliminateall_base_Generic_E_.tr:
事情是這樣的，我們有一些小混球，覺得自己很了不起，正在 [LOCATION] 附近的一個基地裡活動。我不知道他們喝了什麼毒東西，搞得他們以為去招惹獵頭幫飛船是個好主意。殺了一個，傷了三個。所以我想派人去把他們的雄心徹底打掉。

去把他們幹掉，你會得到一筆豐厚的獎勵。

- 斯托斯

cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_GenAttack_M.en:
The outlaw presence here has become much bolder of late and a lot of people are getting hurt. We've recently lost several clusters around [LOCATION]. While we don't like to have to resort to violence, the board has acknowledged that these locations are crucial to establishing stability in the system and authorized the use of a security detail to retake them.

We're also aware that the embedded hostiles are being led by [TARGET] who's had a history of attacking CFP interests. The board would like [TARGET] dealt with to prevent future attacks.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_GenAttack_M.tr:
這裡的不法分子最近變得更加猖獗，很多人都受到了傷害。我們最近在 [LOCATION] 附近失去了幾個集群。雖然我們不想訴諸暴力，但董事會已經承認這些地點對在星系中建立穩定至關重要，並授權使用安全小組來奪回它們。

我們也意識到，現場的敵對人員是由 [TARGET] 領導的，他有攻擊繁榮公民權益的歷史。堂會希望能解決 [TARGET] 的問題，以防止未來的攻擊。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

- 阿蒂麥斯 胸甲（改）
- 阿蒂麥斯 臂甲（改）
- 卡納 步槍電池 (35 發)

RAIN_collectresources_single_OLP_desc_01.en:
To all available contractors,

Our research team at at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is working tirelessly on solving the current ‘Regen Crisis’ and addressing the issue of unstable imprints. Their work has produced promising results, but a lack of a key resource is impeding their ability to run further experiments. 

We’ve received word from our supplier that increased demand combined with lower mining yields means that we won’t receive our scheduled shipment for another few months. Our research team can’t wait that long, and we’re hoping you can help.      

The resource is hard to come by, but we have it on good authority that the old Hathor mining facilities were built in areas with a high concentration of the ore. Since Hathor went defunct not long after establishing their operations in- system, there’s a good chance that activating one of these mining lasers could provide you with what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_collectresources_single_OLP_desc_01.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

我們在  的研究團隊正在不懈努力解決當前的“再生危機”，處理不穩定印記的問題。他們的工作取得了可喜的成果，但缺少的一項關鍵資源阻礙了他們進行進一步實驗的能力。

我們從供應商那裡得知，由於需求的增加和採礦的產量下降，我們將無法在接下來的幾個月內收到預定的貨物。我們的研究團隊等不及那麼久，我們希望您能提供幫助。

這種資源難以獲得，但我們有可靠消息稱，舊哈索爾採礦設施建造在資源濃度較高的區域。由於哈索爾在建立其系統內的運營後不久就停業，因此啟用其中一個採礦雷射器很可能能為我們提供所需的資源。

攜手共進，我們可以讓宇宙變得更美好。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_M_.en:
Got a crew that's been hitting Headhunter ships lately. Their leader's a real piece of work named [TARGET]. We've tracked them to  [LOCATION], so we're looking for someone to put them down for good.

This group likes to fight, but shouldn't be a problem for someone like you. 

Get over there and get it done.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_M_.tr:
最近有個團隊一直在襲擊獵頭幫的飛船。他們的首領是個真正的麻煩，名叫 [TARGET]。我們已經追蹤到他們位於 [LOCATION]，所以我們需要找人把他們徹底解決掉。

這個團隊喜歡打鬥，但對於你這樣的人來說應該沒問題。

“過去那裡，把事情搞定。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_H_.en:
A criminal fleet has taken up root in a sector that Citizens For Prosperity is trying to develop and all forward progress has stopped thanks to their violent actions. It is imperative to a long term goals that we find a way to neutralize this fleet before that cause any further damage.

You and your most trusted support ships will head to [LOCATION] and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_H_.tr:
一支罪犯艦隊已在繁榮公民正著力開發的星區紮根，其暴力行徑已致使所有前進步伐都停滯了。為保障長期戰略目標，我們必須在事態進一步惡化前設法徹底瓦解這支艦隊。

你及你最信賴的支援飛船需要前往 [LOCATION]，清除所有埋伏於此的敵對目標。據知，他們慣以小股編隊行動，因此務必確保全部敵人都已被殲滅後方可撤離。

非常感謝您的幫助，
利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Medium_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: Seemingly unsatisfied with their takings in Nyx, an outlaw group lead by <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has been planning a major strike against the UEE. This cannot be allowed to come to pass.

Thanks to the work of our Intelligence team, we've been able to track them down to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Head there as soon as you can and engage before they have a chance to leave the system. Based on our strategic analysis, we recommend a <EM4>well-armed and skilled fleet</EM4> will be necessary for the successful completion of this mission.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Medium_001.tr:
任務說明

行動區域：尼克斯星系
敵對勢力：不法分子
裝備規格：作戰級飛船
任務簡報：由<EM4>~missionTargetName</EM4>領導的不法分子似乎對在尼克斯的戰利品仍不滿足，正策劃對 UEE 發動重大襲擊。此等行徑絕不可容。

多虧情報部門的努力，我們已將他們的蹤跡鎖定在<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>。

請立即前往該區域，在他們逃離星系前實施攔截。根據戰略分析，建議部署<EM4>裝備精良且訓練有素的艦隊</EM4>以確保任務成功。

謹此致意，

迪肯·託賓
運營經理
互安防務

本通訊構成非約束性要約，接受後任一方均可立即終止而無需通知。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，並須遵守適用星系法律。

Intersec_KillShip_Vanduul_Desc_VeryHard_.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec is in need of a highly skilled combat pilot who can locate and neutralize a dangerous Vanduul target.

An operator of ours has identified a Vanduul ship flying within the vicinity of <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We've been given strict instructions to eliminate any Vanduul spotted on the fringes of UEE space, for fear of encroachment into the Empire's territory.

Bring a <EM4>small fleet of competent pilots</EM4> with you to engage and neutralize the target.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
Intersec_KillShip_Vanduul_Desc_VeryHard_.tr:
任務說明

行動區域：尼克斯星系
敵對勢力：凡杜
裝備規格：作戰級飛船
任務簡報：互安防務急需一名技術精湛的戰鬥飛行員，負責定位並消滅危險的凡杜目標。

我方探員已發現一艘凡杜艦船在<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>附近區域活動。根據嚴令，凡在 UEE 邊疆區域發現凡杜勢力，均須予以清除，以防其侵犯帝國疆域。

請攜帶一支<EM4>精銳飛行員組成的精銳小隊</EM4>執行任務，對目標實施攔截並予以消滅。

謹此致意，

迪肯·託賓
運營經理
互安防務

本通訊構成非約束性要約，接受後任一方均可立即終止而無需通知。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，並須遵守適用星系法律。

Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Intro_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been hired to combat the rising number of outlaws using Nyx as a staging ground for their operations, with the intention of attacking neighboring UEE systems.

As a preventative measure, we require you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and eliminate the ringleader <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> to deter their planned attack on Stanton. They and their crew are highly dangerous and you are <EM4>advised  to bring a wingman</EM4> for support.

Contractors who can prove themselves reliable and competent in executing operations will be eligible for future missions with InterSec.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

任務說明

行動區域：尼克斯星系
敵對勢力：不法分子
裝備規格：作戰級飛船
任務簡報：互安防務受僱於此，旨在打擊日益猖獗的非法組織——這些團伙正利用尼克斯星系作為行動據點，企圖襲擊鄰近的 UEE 星系。

作為預防措施，我們要求您前往<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>，消滅頭目<EM4>~missionTargetName</EM4>，以遏制其對斯坦頓星系的預謀襲擊。該團伙及其成員極具危險性，<EM4>建議攜帶僚機</EM4>提供支援。

能證明自身可靠且執行任務能力出眾的承包商，將有資格承接互安防務未來的任務。

謹此致意，

迪肯·託賓
運營經理
互安防務

searchbodyspace_desc_intro.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP38100
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Hockrow Agency is looking for new contractors with a strong stomach and familiarity with dangerous situations to handle the legwork of an active missing persons investigation. 

Reports indicate that it is highly unlikely that you will encounter any hostiles.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, search for <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, and confirm their status. If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Successful completion of this task will open up other employment opportunities within Hockrow Agency.

Hockrow_searchbody_space_Intro_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #MP38100
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
霍克羅事務所正在尋找具有較強心理承受能力且熟悉危險情況的新承包商，以處理這起正在進行的失蹤人員調查的實地工作。

報告顯示，你遇到敵對勢力的可能性非常低。

合約調查員的行動：
前往 ，尋找 ，並確認他們的狀況。如果他們已經死亡，請仔細檢查屍體，以便我們通過你的obiGlas設備驗證他們的死亡。

補充說明：
成功完成這項任務將為你在霍克羅事務所開闢其他就業機會。

TheCollector_Ships_Starlancer_ATC_Desc.en: If you like big space to move things, Wikelo can do useful and wonder things to MISC ship for you. Bring me pieces and I will give you version even better than what Xi'an can do.
TheCollector_Ships_Starlancer_ATC_Desc.tr: 如果你喜歡大空間來移動東西，維科洛可以為您做一些有用的和神奇的事情。給我帶點東西來，我會給你一個比西安更好的版本。

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’re looking for contractors with combat experience who are willing to get their hands dirty so to speak. A client of ours was double-crossed by a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’ve been waiting for an opportunity to deal with the issue. After tracking them for several weeks, we’ve identified <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as the ideal spot to intercept them. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting for the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>.

Intel suggests that they may travel with an escort. If they do, you’ll have to deal with them too. Since this is your first contract, we will have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：飛船伏擊
授權程式碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

我們正在尋找有戰鬥經驗，並願意親自動手解決問題的承包商。我們的一個客戶被  欺騙了，我們一直在尋找機會處理這個問題。經過幾周的追蹤，我們確定  是攔截他們的理想地點。那裡有一片<EM4>輻射雲</EM4>，你可以躲在裡面並關閉飛船的引擎，等待  的出現。

情報顯示他們可能會帶著護航艦隊出行。如果他們真的有，你也得一併應對他們。因為這是你的第一份合約，所以一旦你開始行動，我們也會在附近安排其他承包商提供支援。

合約完成後立即付款。主承包商還能獲得 <EM4>�1� 個僱傭兵憑證</EM4>的額外獎勵。

該合約不可轉讓。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的和/或私人資訊，該等- 輕音onicLite [發電 S1 隱形 C]
- 捲雲irrus [發電 S2 隱形 C]
- 光擊 I 能量加農炮
- 光擊 II 能量加農炮
- 光擊 III 能量加農炮

headhunters_bombingrun_E_desc_001.en:
Some competition has taken root at [LOCATION] and they've really been gumming up the works for our operations in the area.

Now part of me sees some potential in the upstarts so I'm hoping to bring them into fold, but at the same time, I can't really afford to have them flying around causing trouble.

Instead, I want you to go and blow up their fuel tanks. That should keep them grounded long enough for me to talk some sense into their thick heads.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_E_desc_001.tr:
在 [LOCATION] 出現了一些競爭者，他們真的讓我們在這個區域的操作變得很麻煩。

我心裡有一部分看到了這些新人的潛力，希望能夠把他們拉入我們的圈子，但同時，我也不能讓他們四處飛來飛去惹麻煩。

所以我想讓你去炸掉他們的燃料罐。這應該能讓他們被迫停下來，給我時間去勸說他們的腦袋冷靜下來。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

searchbodyspace_desc_S.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP70001
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
In need of a highly competent operator for a special assignment. A highly dangerous outlaw that has been evading local authorities for some time has been reported to have been involved in a large-scale ship battle, resulting in their supposed death. Our client wishes to confirm that they have been neutralized.

Contract Investigator Actions:
We require you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body and confirm their death.

Additional Notes:
Serious preparation is advised for this contract as there is a strong potential for there to be highly aggressive and dangerous hostiles still on site. Arm yourself accordingly and consider bring other skilled pilots with you.

vaughn_searchbody_space_S_Desc_001.en:
I have a very specific task that requires my best people. 

Something unusual seems to have occurred over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. One of our contractors seems to have gone rogue after completing their assignment, refusing to communicate with us, and indiscriminately attacking those they come across. Now, I have other methods for dealing with renegade assets but our client still requires confirmation of the original target’s death which we are unable to provide due to this pilot’s presence.

I need you to head to the location and identify that <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> is well and truly dead, preferably without being obliterated by this former, disgruntled contractor. As a fair warning, they were one of our most thorough, and ruthless employees, so extreme caution is advised. You will want to bring your most competent of allies to support you with this. 

Sincerely,

Vaughn
vaughn_searchbody_space_S_Desc_001.tr:
我有一個非常具體的任務，需要我最得力的人來完成。

好像在  那邊發生了一些不尋常的事情。我們的一位承包商完成任務後似乎變得叛變了，拒絕跟我們溝通，還無差別地攻擊遇到的任何人。現在，我有其他辦法對付這些叛變的人，但我們的客戶仍然需要確認原來目標已經死了，而由於這個飛行員的存在，我們無法提供這種確認。

我需要你去那個地點，確認  確實已經死了，最好是在這位前不滿的承包商摧毀他之前。作為善意提醒，他們是我們在職員工中最徹底、最無情的一個，所以必須格外小心。你最好帶上最能幹的盟友來支援你。

此致，
沃恩

TheCollector_Menu_Desc_PolarisShip.en:
Wikelo recently get many blueprints in trade with human who not very smart. Now can make very big ship. 

Not cheap and need many pieces but will make. If you want, go quick, this cost much to Wikelo so won't be able to do for long but I like new Human system so I want to thank you all for welcome.

Bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> if want.

Bye.
TheCollector_Menu_Desc_PolarisShip.tr:
維科洛最近和一個不太聰明的人類做了交易，拿到了很多藍圖。現在可以造很大的船。

不便宜。而且需要很多零件。但我們會造出來。如果你想要，就快點。這對維科洛來說成本很高，所以不能持續太久。但我喜歡新的人類星系，所以想感謝你們的歡迎。

如果想要，就帶到 。

再見。

TheCollector_Ships_Nox_Desc.en: Wikelo know many Xi'an. Talk slow but very interesting if you have patience. This is very fast little thing to get you across planet. Wikelo made a few tweaks to make it zippier. If you want, Wikelo will make for you. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Nox_Desc.tr: 維科洛認識好多希安人。你有耐心的話。他們說話很慢，但很有意思。這個小東西快快的，帶你跑遍星球。維科洛做了改動，它更快了。你要是想要，維科洛給你做一個。再見。

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_002.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are stopping at nothing to halt the ongoing regeneration crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need a rare resource that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar pearls</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have found a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is prepared to generously compensate anyone who can assist with gathering the pearls. 

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_002.tr:
致所有有空的承包商，

我們拉亞利正在不遺餘力地阻止當前的再生危機，但我們的科學家需要一種罕見的資源，而公司供應商無法獲取這種資源。

拉亞利正在尋找有經驗的承包商來收集 <EM4>受輻射的瓦拉卡珍珠</EM4>，這些珍珠可以從長期暴露在輻射下的成年瓦拉卡體內提取。我們的掃描發現，在靠近  的風暴中有一批符合條件的種群。因為這些動物極其危險，拉亞利準備慷慨地補償任何能夠協助收集珍珠的人。

一旦收集完成，請將這些珍貴的資源送到 。

攜手共進，我們可以讓宇宙變得更美好。

納麗娜·勒雷姆
高級經理
臨床研究外包

Intersec_DefendShip_Desc_Medium_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: An undercover agent of ours was compromised and is now being pursued by the outlaw pack they had infiltrated. As such, they are in need of immediate extraction at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Once on site, engage with all hostiles in order to provide cover so our operative can QT away.

<EM4>Bring additional backup</EM4> and don't underestimate these outlaws. They are violent and motivated so they are unlikely to give up anytime soon.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Intersec_DefendShip_Desc_Medium_001.tr:
任務說明

行動區域：尼克斯星系
敵對勢力：不法分子
裝備規格：作戰級飛船
任務簡報：我方一名臥底特工身份暴露，現正遭其滲透的匪幫追捕，需要立即前往<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>緊急撤離。

抵達現場後，你需要與所有敵對勢力交火以提供掩護，確保我方特工安全撤離。

切勿低估這些匪徒，<EM4>務必攜帶支援</EM4>。他們兇殘且鬥志昂揚，絕不會輕易放棄抵抗。

謹此致意，

迪肯·託賓
運營經理
互安防務

本通訊構成非約束性要約，接受後任一方均可立即終止而無需通知。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，並須遵守 UEE 及星系的法律。

Covalex_HaulCargo_AToB_Intro_desc.en:
Earning such accolades as 'Imperial Finances' Top 10 Shipping Companies' and 'Delivery Digest's 2945's Most Trusted Transport,' Covalex is busier than ever. And that means more cargo going to more places. That's where you come in.  

Covalex is looking for dependable and industrious pilots to join our expanding family. Do you have access to a ship that can hold <EM4>1 SCU cargo containers</EM4>? Can you pass an Advocacy background check if required? Then a universe of opportunity is waiting for you. 

Simply complete an 'Evaluation Trial’ by picking up a shipment of <EM4>Quartz</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and successfully delivering it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Upon satisfactory completion, you'll be eligible to become part of Covalex Shipping's vast network of independent transport specialists*.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

*Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_AToB_Intro_desc.tr:
摘得“帝國金融op10航運公司”和“投遞領域2945最值得信賴的運輸”等榮譽後，科瓦萊什比以往都更加繁忙。這意味著更多的貨物將運往更多的地方，這就是需要你發揮作用的地方。

科瓦萊什正在尋找可靠且勤奮的飛行員加入我們不斷壯大的家庭。你有能裝載尺寸為  的集裝箱貨物的飛船嗎？如果需要，你能通過督導局的背景調查嗎？那麼，一個充滿機會的宇宙正在等著你。

從  的貨運電梯裡取出  並把它成功送到  的貨運電梯，即可完成“試用評估”。

圓滿完成後，你將有資格成為擁有龐大的運輸網路的科瓦萊什貨運專員。

順便提醒，我們強烈建議承包商隨身攜帶<EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4>。


科瓦萊什貨運
“盡你所需，達你所在。”


科瓦萊什貨運是一家有限責任公司，為鼓勵及時交付和防止貨運欺詐，科瓦萊什貨運將設定交貨時間限制。到期後，任何未交付的貨物將被視為被盜。總酬金將會根據貨物成功交付的百分比按比例支付。

foxwell_DefendShip_M_desc_001.en:
Got an orange level contract for any available combat pilots. A [SHIP] is under attack around [LOCATION] and is in desperate need for assistance. We're not sure how many perpetrators there are, but they seem motivated and dangerous so exercise caution.

Once on site, engage and destroy any hostiles you encounter and protect the client. Once they've transferred the credits, we'll route you your payment.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
foxwell_DefendShip_M_desc_001.tr:
有一份橙色級別的合同提供給所有可出動的戰鬥飛行員。一艘[SHIP]正在[LOCATION]附近遭受攻擊，急需支援。目前我們無法確定敵方人數，但他們顯然來勢洶洶，極具危險性，請務必小心應對。

抵達現場後，立即與所有敵對目標交戰並將其消滅，保護我們的客戶安全。一旦客戶完成信用點轉賬，我們會立刻將你的報酬打到你的賬戶上。

馬庫斯·克倫
福克斯韋爾安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韋爾安保是一家獲得EE全境執業許可的擔保安全專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊。如果您或您認識的人有興趣，請聯絡我們的合同代表。

Foxwell_bombingrun_H_desc_001.en:
An opportunity has presented itself for a client to take action against a group of criminals who have been harassing their business.

According to reports, this group of outlaws are currently laying low at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The client thinks this is a good time to catch them off guard and bring them to justice. The job is to take out their fuel tanks and putting an end to their smuggling operations once and for all.

These folks are not to be underestimated. You better bring some backup and fly low to avoid the turrets. Priority as always is the fuel tanks.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_bombingrun_H_desc_001.tr:
客戶迎來一次良機，可對長期騷擾其生意的一夥罪犯採取行動。

據情報顯示，這群不法分子目前正蟄伏於 。客戶認為眼下正是出其不意、將其繩之以法的絕佳時機。任務目標是摧毀其燃料罐，徹底終結他們的走私活動。

切勿輕敵，務必攜帶支援力量，並低空飛行以規避炮塔火力。一如往常，燃料罐始終是最高優先級目標。

祝你好運，

凱文·沃爾頓
調度員，福克斯韋爾安保
“安全，盡在掌握”

福克斯韋爾安保是一家獲得 UEE 全境執業許可的擔保安全專家公司。我們始終歡迎新的幹員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的任何人對此感興趣，請與我們的合約代表聯繫。

Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des.en:
A splinter group of outlaws have broken off from one of the main gangs in the system and have been trying to strike out on their own. With the amount of trouble they've been causing its clear they're looking to establish a name for themselves as quickly as they can. It's going to be up to you and your support crew to put a stop to them.

Once your crew is ready, head over to [LOCATION] and engage with the gang. Not all of them will just be waiting there on site. Expect reinforcements to arrive once you begin your assault. Just be sure to stay until every last one of them has been take care of.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives."
Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des.tr:
星系裡從某大幫派分裂出來的一支不法分子，最近單幹鬧事，想盡快打出點名堂來。看他們惹的亂子就知道，這幫人急著立威。現在就靠你和你的支援團隊把他們摁下去了。

等你們團隊準備好了，直接去 [LOCATION] 找上那幫人開幹。並不是所有的人都會在那裡等著，等你一動手，援軍就會到達。一定要待在這裡，直到他們都被解決掉。

祝你好運，

馬庫斯·克倫
福克斯韋爾安保
“安全，盡在掌握”

福克斯韋爾安保是一家獲得 UEE 全境執業許可的擔保安全專家公司。我們始終歡迎新的幹員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的任何人對此感興趣，請與我們的合約代表聯繫。

destroyprobelegal_desc.en:
After a contractor successfully recovered data stolen from one of our clients, a security analyst verified that it was captured by unauthorized surveillance monitors illegally installed around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’re looking for someone to follow up and take out those monitors.

You will need to find the <EM4>[MONITOR_COUNT]</EM4> and destroy them before any more data can be gathered. Passive 'Skimmers' like these typically are hard to find so be thorough in your search.

Once attacked, their security protocols will cause them to begin transmitting the contents of their drives, so it’s imperative that you stop the upload before it can complete. There’s also a good chance that whoever’s responsible might be in the area, so be careful.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.en:
Several unknown ships have been spotted in areas frequented by haulers delivering goods for our client. They’re worried these ships are monitoring their haulers in preparation for an ambush, so they’ve hired us to patrol the area. 

Start by going to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan it to ensure it’s clear. After that, we’ll send you to some other areas to scan for potential threats. We recommend that you bring a <EM4>wingman</EM4> and plenty of supplies to be ready to handle whatever might come your way.     

Also know that successfully completing this contract will earn the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>14 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.tr:
我們客戶的貨運飛船經常光顧的區域發現了幾艘不明飛船。客戶擔心這些飛船正在踩點準備打劫，所以僱我們來巡邏這片空域。

先去在你 HUD 上的<EM4>地點標記</EM4>掃描確認是否安全。之後，我們會派你去其他區域掃描潛在威脅。我們建議你帶上一名<EM4>僚機</EM4>和充足的物資，以便應對任何可能出現的情況。

同時請注意，成功完成這份合約將使主承包商獲得  **********
- 視差 “血紅” 能量突擊步槍

Foxwell_DefendLocation_H_Desc_001.en:
The folks at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are under attack and need our support. Their ships in the wider area are being targeted and there’s a growing concern that this is only a precursor to something bigger.  

The situation is evolving, but I’m being fed constant updates on what’s going on and will keep you informed as the contract progresses. 

Are you available to come to their aid? Would be smart to recruit some friends to help. These are important clients and we can’t afford to fail them. The main contractor will earn a bonus payment of <EM4>7 MG Scrip</EM4> if you get the job done.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendLocation_H_Desc_001.tr:
的人們正遭受攻擊，需要我們的支援。他們在它處的飛船也成為了攻擊目標，人們越來越擔心這只是另一次更大攻擊的前兆。 [
情況在不斷變化，我也在不斷收到最新訊息，隨著合同的進展，我們會隨時向你通報。

福克斯韋爾安保是獲得地球聯合帝國全域運營許可的註冊安保專家。我們長期招募新成員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的人有興趣，請聯絡我們的合約代表。]

Foxwell_ShipAmbush_H_desc_001.en:
Recently, a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> baited Foxwell forces with a bogus rescue beacon. By the time our forces realized what was happening, a squad of ships unleashed a devastating attack and only one Foxwell contractor survived. Their scan logs identified the bait ship, and we’ve had scouts monitoring them ever since.

Our surveillance has revealed the squad has a regular flight pattern that we think we can exploit. There’s a sizable emission cloud at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that makes it an ideal spot to post up. Think you have what it takes to handle this for us? 

It’ll be you against the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, other large craft, and a sizable escort. Wish I could be more specific than that but this crew regularly rotates ships in and out of the squad. Would be smart to bring some support, so you don’t get overwhelmed by their numbers.   

Complete the job and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>8 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_ShipAmbush_H_desc_001.tr:
最近， 用一個假救援信標誘捕了福克斯韋爾的部隊。當我們的部隊意識到發生了什麼時，一支飛船小隊發起了毀滅性的攻擊，只有一名福克斯韋爾的承包商倖存下來。他們的掃描日誌識別出了誘餌船，從那時起我們就有偵察員在監視他們。

我們的監視顯示這支小隊有一個規律的飛行路線，我們認為可以加以利用。在  處有一片巨大的輻射雲，非常適合我們設伏。你覺得自己能處理好這一切嗎？

這將是你對抗 、其他大型飛船和一支龐大的護航隊。真希望我能提供更具體的資訊，但這支隊伍經常輪換飛船。最好帶上點支援，以免被他們的人數壓倒。

活幹完我們就會給主承包商  **********

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.en:
A client is concerned about activity near some of their interests. We’ve been contracted to patrol the area and run scans at several locations. Interested? If so, head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD to start the patrol.

The client wasn’t specific about the threats, but they don’t think everything’s on the level out there. Hopefully we’ll be able to bring them some peace of mind.

Additionally, the client arranged for us to offer a bonus payment of <EM4>8 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

客戶沒說清楚具體威脅是啥，但他們覺得那邊情況不太對勁。希望能給他們吃顆定心丸吧。

Foxwell_DefendLocation_M_Desc_001.en:
We’ve got clients reporting outlaw attacks on ships around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They got locked down tight and anybody heading in or out is a target. Any attempts to solve the issue have just been met with more outlaw reinforcements appearing. 

The client is desperate for a solution, so we’re hiring a contractor to go and restore peace in the area. If any other issues flare up once you're there, I’ll comm you directions on how to help.  

Really need someone on this fast. So to sweeten the pot, the main contractor will also get a bonus payment of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell_DefendLocation_M_Desc_001.tr:
有客戶報告，附近的船隻遭到了不法分子攻擊。他們嚴密封鎖了那塊區域，任何進出的人都會成為目標。此前任何解決這個問題的嘗試都只能換來更多的不法分子增援。 [
客戶急需解決這個問題，所以我們打算僱傭承包商去恢復該地區的和平。如果你到了那裡發現其他問題，我會告訴你如何提供幫助。

我們真的很需要人手。因此，為了增加鼓勵，主承包商還將獲得 <EM4>�0�份僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>的獎勵。

祝你好運，

凱文·沃爾頓
排程員，福克斯韋爾安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韋爾安保是一家獲得EE全境執業許可的擔保安全專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊。如果您或您認識的人有興趣，請聯絡我們的合同代表。]

Foxwell_ShipAmbush_M_desc_001.en:
Foxwell has been tracking a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> used by outlaws and discovered a pattern to its movements. The ship should be passing by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon.

Looking for a contractor willing to hustle there, hide in the emission cloud, and then spring the trap when the time is right. There’s usually escort ships with the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Careful not to jump the gun and blow your cover. The element of surprise is crucial from what I’ve read.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

我們在尋找一位願意快速趕到那裡的承包商，藏身於輻射雲中，然後在合適的時候設下圈套。 通常會有護航船。小心不要操之過急，暴露了行蹤。根據我所瞭解到的，出其不意至關重要。

Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des.en:
It seems that a couple of different small-time gangs have decided to pool their resources and start doing coordinated attacks. Alone, they weren't much, but all together they're proving to be a serious threat that has to be dealt with.

Recruit some backup you can rely on and the fly over to [LOCATION]. Once you attack the initial gang members you find there, the other groups will arrive to support them. Make sure you wait around to take out all of them.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

你先拉點信得過的幫手，然後直接飛去 [LOCATION]。等你一開打，幹掉最先碰上的那撥人，其他幾夥援軍馬上就會趕到支援。所以別急著走，多蹲會兒，把他們全清乾淨。

祝你好運，

馬庫斯·克倫

Foxwell_bombingrun_M_desc_001.en:
We're in need of a sharp contractor for a hit and run operation. Client says some local thugs have been congregating in concerning numbers and we have been tasked with disrupting their base of operations.

Get on over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you're successful we can set these folks plans back a while, and most importantly, without having to deal with them directly.

Reports are showing there's a couple of ships buzzing around the area and some defense turrets. Just focus on the fuel tanks and you should be alright.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

請立即前往 ，摧毀其燃料罐。若行動成功，可暫時打亂他們的計劃。最關鍵的是，無需與他們正面交鋒。

情報顯示，該區域有數艘飛船盤旋巡邏，並配有防禦炮塔。只需專注摧毀燃料罐，任務即可完成。

cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_GenAttack_M.tr:
我們在 [LOCATION] 附近的幾個繁榮公民前哨站集群剛剛遭到由 [TARGET] 領導的一群不法分子的襲擊。我們正在尋找任何有空的作戰專家來幫助奪回這些前哨站。

我可以在接受合約後提供具體位置，我們需要清除主要前哨站和衛星設施中的所有敵對力量，並消滅 [TARGET]，因為他們不太可能在逃脫之後就停止敵對行動。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

headhunters_bombingrun_S_desc_001.en:
We've heard news that a new gang are planning an attack on a place over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They figure if they can take out the fuel supplies there then it's theirs for the taking.

But little do they know that we're gonna send you in first to blow the fuel tanks so we can claim the place before they do. If it all goes to plan, we can clear the location out and stick it to that gang at the same time. Two birds, one stone.

Only problem is this place is armed to the teeth. Bring a crew and get those fuel tanks out of action. We'll take care of the rest.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_S_desc_001.tr:
我們聽說一夥新幫派正計劃進攻  那塊地方。他們盤算著只要端掉那裡的燃料補給，那地兒就歸他們了。

但他們不知道的是，我們要先派你去把那些油罐炸了，好在他們動手前把地盤佔下來。要是按計劃行事，咱們既能清空那塊地，又能順便給那幫混蛋點顏色看看，一舉兩得。

唯一的麻煩是那兒武裝到了牙齒。帶上一個團隊去把那些燃料罐搞定，剩下的交給我們。

-斯托斯通訊完畢

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_H_desc.en:
Headhunters are launching an attack near [LOCATION]. This ex-Marine asshole named [TARGET] has been sending their mercs to clear out nearby encampments if they don't surrender their weapons.

While all the security have been greenlit, [TARGET] has been singled out. In their last raid, they beat a squatter to death for talking back. Turns out that squatter was the cousin of one of our Clips, so they're paying extra to make sure justice is done.

Watch yourself though, [TARGET] may be a scumbag who has this coming, they're still ex-military so they won't be easy to take down.

-Stows
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_H_desc.tr:
獵頭幫正在 [LOCATION] 附近發起攻擊。如果那裡的人不投降交出武器的話，一個名叫 [TARGET] 的前海軍陸戰隊混蛋一直在派遣他的僱傭兵去清除那邊的營地。

雖然所有的安保措施都已獲批，但 [TARGET] 被特別點名。在他們的最後一次突襲中，他們把一個無家可歸者打死了，因為那人頂嘴。結果發現那個無家可歸者是我們一個小組成員的表親，所以他們願意額外支付，以確保正義得以伸張。

不過要小心，[TARGET] 可能是個該得報應的混蛋，但他們畢竟是前軍人，所以不容易對付。

- 斯托斯

CFP_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.en:
We’ve identified a sector that’s been increasingly riddled with outlaw attacks and we think that if we begin to actively patrol the area we can turn things around. We’d recommend gathering at least <EM4>two wingmen</EM4> to head out there in combat-ready ships and confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>18 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.tr:
我們盯上了一片最近老被不法分子襲擊的星域，我覺得只要咱們主動去巡邏，局勢就能扭轉回來。建議你拉上至少<EM4>兩個隊友</EM4>，都開上能打的船，碰上敵對勢力直接幹。

接了這活兒，飛到 HUD 上標出的<EM4>位置標記</EM4>，把沿途所有航路點掃一遍，確認安全。主承包商額外獎勵<EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

InterSec_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has received intelligence that outlaws are planning to launch an attack on a target within the UEE. In an effort to prevent this from happening, we need a contractor to patrol a sector we believe these outlaws are using to prepare for their attack.

Outlaw activity in this sector is higher than normal, so InterSec recommends that you <EM4>bring backup</EM4>. When ready, dispatch to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. Once you've confirmed that the entire sector is clear, the main contractor will receive a bonus of <EM4>14 MG Scrip.</EM4> 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

該區域的不法分子活動比平時更為頻繁，因此互安建議你<EM4>帶上支援</EM4>。準備好後，前往 HUD 上的<EM4>位置標記</EM4>，並掃描路線上的各個點。一旦確認整個區域安全，主承包商將獲得  **********

CFP_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.en:
Outlaws have been increasing their activity along one of the more popular routes in the system and we’re hoping to provide a deterrent before the problem gets out of hand. As such, we’d like you to head out there in a combat-ready ship and deal with any hostiles you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>8 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.tr:
最近這條熱門航線上不法分子越來越猖獗，咱們得趕緊去震懾一下，別等到事兒鬧大了。你開艘能打的船過去，碰上敵對勢力就直接幹掉。

接了這活兒，飛到 HUD 上標出的<EM4>位置標記</EM4>，把沿途所有航路點都掃一遍。等全搞定，主承包商額外獎勵<EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

CFP_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
After weeks of seeing crime rates increase, we’ve been able to identify a sector that we believe to be the source of the outlaw activity that has been leeching into the surrounding areas. While it would be too much to expect to eradicate all threats, we believe that by sending combat patrols into the area we might be able to start reversing this worrisome trend. Our in-house combat analysts recommend bringing around <EM4>three wingmen</EM4> in combat-ready ships to confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>24 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.tr:
折騰了幾個星期，總算摸清了那幫不法分子的老巢，就藏在最近鬧得最兇的那片星域。想徹底清乾淨是沒戲，但咱派巡邏隊殺過去，也許能壓一壓這股邪風。我們內部的戰鬥分析員建議你帶上三架僚機，開艘能硬剛的船以對抗你可能遇到的任何敵對勢力。

接了這活兒，飛到 HUD 上標出的<EM4>位置標記</EM4>，把沿途所有航路點都掃一遍。等全搞定，主承包商額外獎勵<EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>14 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>4 MG Scrip.</EM4>

InterSec_SecurityPatrol_VH_desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been tracking increased outlaw activity in certain sectors of the system. This activity in conjunction with other intelligence leads us to believe that outlaws are planning an attack on elements traveling from the UEE. We're aiming to patrol these sectors and disrupt any plans before they can be put into action.

Currently, we need someone who can help patrol a highly dangerous sector. Once you've accepted the mission, you can proceed to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there, we'll send you along a specific route with additional waypoints to scan. Complete the patrol and we'll send the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>18 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Due to the high probability of attack and general threat level of local outlaws, we recommend <EM4>recruiting trusted wingmen</EM4> to provide combat support.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

CFP_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.en:
We need someone with combat experience to patrol a travel lane for us. Over the years, we’ve found that it's good to get out there and make ourselves visible. Sometimes a pilot like yourself traveling through an area is enough to deter any potential outlaws. But in case you run into any that are feeling a bit more ambitious, a ship ready for combat is recommended.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you’ve scanned all the waypoints and ensured that the route is secure, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>2 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.tr:
我們想找有實戰經驗的飛行員幫我們巡邏一條航路。這些年我們發現，只要有人在那兒來回溜達，就能嚇退不少不法分子。當然，萬一碰上幾個膽子大的，還是建議你開艘能打的船去。

接了這活兒，飛到 HUD 上標出的<EM4>位置標記</EM4>，把所有航路點都掃一遍，確認路線安全。主承包商額外獎勵<EM4>�0� 個僱傭兵公會憑證</EM4>。

InterSec_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: There's a growing concern that Vanduul hunting parties are pushing further into Nyx. The first line of defense against this encroachment is increased patrols. InterSec has identified a sector that has seen an uptick in Vanduul activity and are looking for someone to patrol the region and provide an update on it.

You'll begin your patrol at a <EM4>location marker</EM4> sent to your HUD and then scan a series of waypoints along a designated route. The Vanduul ships in this sector are highly skilled and aggressive, so InterSec highly recommends that you <EM4>bring several combat-ready ships along as backup</EM4>.

InterSec understands the immense danger you'll be under on this patrol, so we'll send a special bonus of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor once the sector is clear.      

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Vanduul 
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships 
Briefing: We've just lost contact with a pilot who engaged with Vanduul forces at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Travel to their last known location and if they're still alive, defend them long enough to ensure they can escape. Ensuring the safety of the operative is crucial, as is eliminating any Vanduul threats to the UEE.

You'll most likely need a <EM4>strong group of ships</EM4> to successfully neutralize these Vanduul.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Intersec_DefendShip_Vanduul_Desc_VeryHar.tr:
任務說明

行動區域：尼克斯星系
敵對勢力：凡杜
裝備規格：作戰級飛船
任務簡報：我們剛剛與一名在<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>與凡杜部隊交戰的飛行員失去聯絡.

請前往其最後已知位置，若該飛行員尚存，務必為其提供足夠長時間的掩護以確保其脫險。保障行動人員安全至關重要，同時必須清除凡杜對 UEE 構成的所有威脅。

你很可能需要組建一支<EM4>強大的艦隊</EM4>才能成功消滅這些凡杜敵人。

謹此致意，

迪肯·託賓
運營經理
互安防務

本通訊構成非約束性要約，接受後任一方均可立即終止而無需通知。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，並須遵守適用星系法律。

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Defector_d.en:
This shit saddens me. Not sure if you've ever crossed paths with [TARGET] in your dealings with us. Thought they were a real good one. Been with the Headhunters for years, but something must have happened because they went running to CFP for protection. Sold out some of our brothers and sisters along the way.

All the Judges are furious and wants blood. That's where you come in. Go to [LOCATION], find [TARGET], and kill them.

Doesn't have to be anything fancy. Just want the result.

Damn shame.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Defector_d.tr:
這真讓我感到悲傷。不知道你在與我們打交道時是否遇到過 [TARGET]。我一直以為他們是個好人。和獵頭幫在一起多年，但肯定發生了什麼事，他們跑去找繁榮公民求保護了，在這個過程中還背叛了我們的一些兄弟姐妹。

所有法官都怒火中燒，想要血債血償，這就是你的任務。前往 [LOCATION]，找到 [TARGET]，然後殺了他。

不需要什麼花哨的，只要結果。

真他媽可惜。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

Hockrow_searchbody_space_E_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP50122
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us potentially prevent a death. An informant has reported an active hit issued for <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and fears the worst, but the client has hired us like us to look into it. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Last known location was <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head over there and see if the person mentioned by our client is still with us. If they’re not, examine the body closely so we can report back to them with details of their death.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.
Hockrow_searchbody_space_E_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件文檔 #MP50122
首席調查員：阿爾肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
需要一名特工幫助我們可能防止一起死亡事件的發生。一名線人報告稱，針對  的暗殺行動已經啟動，線人擔心最壞的情況會發生，但客戶還是像我們一樣僱傭了我們來進行調查。

合約調查員的行動：
最後一次確認的位置是 。前往那裡，確認客戶提到的那個人是否還在。如果不在了，仔細檢查屍體，以便我們能向客戶提供他們的死亡細節。

補充說明：
此合約已被標記為<EM4>可能有戰鬥風險</EM4>，請做好相應準備。

Foxwell_EliminateSpecific_NonHostiles_de.en:
Got a line on a bounty named <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Someone spotted them along with known criminal accomplices at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Need you to get there before they get going. 

<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has a reputation for only showing their face in places with civs. Really need you to take down this bounty without there being any civilian collateral damage. Foxwell can’t afford to be caught in the shitstorm that would erupt over the loss of innocent life. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateSpecific_NonHostiles_de.tr:
我們得到了一個名為  的賞金目標的消息。有人發現他們與已知的犯罪同夥一起出現在 。需要你在他們離開之前趕到那裡。

 以只在有平民的地方露面而聞名。真的需要你在不造成任何平民附帶傷害的情況下拿下這個賞金目標。福克斯韋爾可不想捲入因無辜生命損失而引發的胡攪蠻纏當中。

馬庫斯·克倫
福克斯韋爾安保
“安全，盡在掌握”

福克斯韋爾安保是一家獲得 UEE 全境執業許可的擔保安全專家公司。我們始終歡迎新的幹員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的任何人對此感興趣，請與我們的合約代表聯繫。

Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Hard_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec requires a skilled contractor to eliminate a highly dangerous group of criminals based in Nyx who are planning a coordinated strike on a prominent member of the UEE Navy.

We have intercepted a crucial piece of intelligence suggesting a known terrorist by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> intends to carry out this assassination along with the help of local criminal elements.

They are currently located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, making this an ideal time for us to strike. Be warned, these outlaws are experienced killers - bringing a <EM4>group of trustworthy allies</EM4> is advised.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

行動區域：尼克斯星系
敵對勢力：不法分子
裝備規格：作戰級飛船
任務簡報：互安防務急需一名技術嫻熟的承包商，清除盤踞在尼克斯星系、正策劃對 UEE 海軍重要成員發動協同襲擊的極度危險的犯罪集團。

我們截獲的關鍵情報顯示，名為<EM4>~missionTargetName</EM4>的知名恐怖分子意圖聯合當地犯罪勢力實施此次刺殺行動。

目前他們藏匿於<EM4>~missionLocation|Address</EM4>，此刻正是我們出擊的絕佳時機。需警惕的是，這些亡命之徒皆是經驗豐富的殺手——建議攜帶<EM4>可靠的盟友團隊</EM4>。

謹此致意，

迪肯·託賓
運營經理
互安防務

bhg_bounty_desc_FPS_intro.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: Stanton
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: This preliminary bounty is being offered to you as a formal evaluation of your skills. Successful completion of this contract will lead to additional bounty work being made available. 

It is believed that the target will be on foot and well armed, so be prepared to engage in a firefight. Additionally, there may be other hostiles forces at the site, while they should not be your primary focus, you may have to engage with them while in pursuit of the target.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
bhg_bounty_desc_FPS_intro.tr:
--------------------------------------------------------
---------------------  賞金合約  ---------------------
--------------------------------------------------------


賞金獵人公會
處理與分配部門

賞金獵人公會已授權一份官方賞金

姓名：[TARGET]
星系：斯坦頓星系
風險評估：中等
最後已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知關聯：< 無 >
注意：這個初步的賞金任務是為了正式評估你的能力而提供的。成功完成這個合約後，還會有更多的懸賞任務開放給你。

據信目標沒有使用交通工具並且全副武裝，所以要做好交火的準備。此外，現場可能還有其他敵對勢力，雖然他們不是你的主要目標，但在追捕目標的過程中，你可能不得不與他們交戰。

賞金獵人公會
追求正義

賞金獵人公會是一個由僱傭兵公會批准的安保服務，根據《外星貿易授權法案》被授權在 UEE 及其以外地區開展行動。

headhunters_killship_cfp_vhrt_desc_001.en:
Got a platinum target that needs to get taken down. [TARGET] is a heavy hitter who's one of the people running security for Citizens for Prosperity. Although [TARGET] might have forgotten, the Headhunters remember their work with a merc company a few years ago that lead to the deaths of five brothers and sisters. We want blood for blood.

They've been spotted poking around [LOCATION], so you should still be able to find them there.

They're a mean bastard, so bring some friends but make sure they end up dead.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_cfp_vhrt_desc_001.tr:
有一個白金目標需要被解決。[TARGET] 是個重磅人物，是繁榮公民的安全負責人之一。雖然 [TARGET] 可能已經忘記了，但獵頭幫還記得，幾年前與一家僱傭軍公司合作的事情，導致五位兄弟姐妹的死亡，我們要血債血償。

他們最近在 [LOCATION] 附近出現過，所以你應該還能在那找到他們。

他們是個狠角色，所以帶上些朋友，但一定要確保他死。

- 斯托斯通訊完畢。

northrock_bounty_prisoner_desc_intro.en:
Hey There,

My name is Braden Corchado and I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system. I may have reached out already, but we try to make it a point of approaching anyone who meets our high standards and encouraging them to complete a pro tem contract. 

You can't do much better than become a Northrock contractor. We have a solid reputation for offering challenging and interesting work at a higher rate of pay then many of our competitors in system. 

Now, to get approved, you will need to apprehend one [TARGET]. They have recently escaped from the detention center and your job will be to track them down before they can disappear completely off the grid. 

A little hint is that it's safe to assume that the target is going to go try to clear their record. I recommend triangulating your search between the detention center they escaped from and locations where they can hack into the record system.

Get this done and we'll see about getting you more work.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
northrock_bounty_prisoner_desc_intro.tr:
你好，

我叫佈雷登·科查多，北境之巖服務團隊的後勤官，斯坦頓星系內最大的獨立安保公司。我可能已經找過你了，但我們希望能聯繫上每個達到高標準的人，並去完成我們的臨時合約。

成為北境之巖的承包商絕對是你的不二之選。我們良好的聲譽能為你提供一些既有趣又不乏挑戰性的工作，且報酬高於星系內的其它競爭者。

如果，你想獲得認證的話，你需要去抓捕 。他們最近剛從拘留中心裡逃出來，而你的工作就是在他們消聲滅跡前，把他們抓回去。

有些線索能幫得上忙，可以假設他們此時應該趕著要去清除記錄，我建議你在拘留中心的位置，和他們有機會能駭入記錄系統的地方進行下三角定位。

搞定這事我再看看能不能安排給你更多的活。

希望儘快收到你的答覆，

佈雷登·科查多
後勤官 - 斯坦頓分部
北境之巖服務團隊

TheCollector_Ships_MISC_Prospector_Desc.en: Wikelo loves rocks. Wants to help you get more better rocks. Made this Prospector more better for that tough job. Trade items and you can have.
TheCollector_Ships_MISC_Prospector_Desc.tr: 維科洛喜歡石頭。想要幫你搞到更多更好的石頭。把這個勘探者改得更厲害，適合幹這種硬活。拿東西來換，你就能得到。

cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_001.en:
We’ve learned that XenoThreat is about to launch an attack on [LOCATION]. If they are successful, the number of casualties is expected to be high. I’m hoping that with your aid in defending them, we can make sure that doesn’t happen.
 
We know from past encounters that XenoThreat sends several raiding parties to carry out their attacks, so make sure you don’t leave the outpost until you’ve fought off all the reinforcements. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_001.tr:
我們得知異種威脅即將對 [LOCATION] 發動攻擊。如果他們成功，可能會造成大量傷亡。我希望你能來協助防守，這樣我們就可以確保這種情況不會發生。

根據以往的遭遇，我們知道異種威脅會派遣幾個突擊隊進行攻擊，所以在你確定擊退所有增援之前，請不要離開前哨站。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_003.en:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is mobilizing for a massive incursion to wipe [LOCATION] off the map. You’re their only hope of enduring this assault and protecting them from XenoThreat’s cruelty.

I know I’m asking you to put yourself in the line of fire, but this system won’t change unless people like you are brave enough to take on these dangers. No amount of credits could measure up to how much good you’d be doing by stepping in.

If you’re willing and able to take on this mission, make sure to take some allies with you. XenoThreat will certainly send in stronger reinforcements once they realize they’re taking losses.

We believe in you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_003.tr:
緊急情況！

異種威脅正在準備大規模入侵，企圖將 [LOCATION] 從地圖上抹去。你是他們唯一的希望，擋下這次攻擊，保護他們免受異種威脅的殘害。

我知道我是在要求你把自己置身險境，但只有像你這樣面對危險能挺身而出的人，才能改變這個星系。再多的錢也抵不上你的壯舉帶來的益處。

如果你願意並有能力執行這項任務，一定要帶上一些盟友。如果異種威脅發現自己損失慘重，他們肯定會派出更強大的援軍。

我們相信你。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_002.en:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is targeting [LOCATION] to send a message to other settlers about what happens if they accept our support. 

If you’re able to fend off the attackers, I’m sure they’ll send additional forces, so you’ll need to dig in for multiple assaults. Since XenoThreat has a lot of resources at their disposal, you should think about recruiting others to help you keep everyone safe.

We’re all counting on you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_002.tr:
緊急情況！

異種威脅打算威脅 [LOCATION] 的定居者，因為他們支持我們。

即使你能擊退攻擊者，他們應該也還會派出更多的部隊，所以你需要防禦多次攻擊。異種威脅擁有大量資源，你應該考慮招募盟友來幫助你保護大家的安全。

我們都指望著你。

利瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_E_.en:
Some morons with some seriously inflated notion of their place in 'verse made the damn foolish choice of attacking the <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We've got some things in play over there so we can’t let ‘em get away with it.

If you're interesting in helpin' out, get there and deal with these luggers before they can do too much damage. Don't figure you'll break too much of a sweat dealin' with them.

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_E_.tr:
一些腦子進水的傢伙抱著極度膨脹的自我認知，竟敢愚蠢地襲擊了  那邊的 。那邊我們已經部署了一些人手，絕不能讓他們得逞。

如果你有興趣幫忙，就趕緊過去，在他們造成太大破壞前收拾掉這些蠢貨。對付他們，你估計不會費多大勁。

另外，為了表示感謝，我會給主承包商額外加賞 <EM4>�0� 個堂會憑證</EM4>。

斯托斯通訊完畢。

EckhartSecurity_Defend_M_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve gotten word that outlaws have their sights set on attacking <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Our client is concerned the attack is imminent and requested that security be deployed to the site immediately. If you’re interested and available, gather all the supplies and support you may need and head to the location pronto.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

Headhunters_DefendLocation_E_Desc_001.en:
Some idiots with a deathwish are attacking our ships around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Can’t let ‘em do that without paying the price. Want to do the honors?

If so, head out and get after ‘em. The crew there is tracking the attacker’s movements and I’ll pass along situational updates as they come in. 

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation.
